meanings.meaning_en: in, into, or to the place or position where someone or something was before
meanings.example: I’ll be back in a minute.
meanings.example_cn: 我马上回来。

meanings.meaning_en: the part of something that is furthest from the front
meanings.example: Put that book back where you found it!
meanings.example_cn: 把那本书放回原处！

meanings.meaning_en: at or in the back of something
meanings.example: He was back home by half past eleven.
meanings.example_cn: 他是11点半之前回家的。

meanings.meaning_en: in the opposite direction from the way you are facing
meanings.example: It’s possible to travel there and back in a day.
meanings.example_cn: 到那里一天来回是可以的。

meanings.meaning_en: having an important effect or influence, especially on what will happen in the future
meanings.example: His most significant political achievement was the abolition of the death penalty.
meanings.example_cn: 他政治上最重大的成就是废除了死刑。

meanings.meaning_en: an ability to do something well, especially because you have learned and practised it
meanings.example: Reading and writing are two different skills.
meanings.example_cn: 阅读和写作是两种不同的技能。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to all the ordinary people in a country, who are not members of the government or do not have important jobs
meanings.example: We have to show that publishing this story is in the public interest (= helpful or useful to ordinary people ) .
meanings.example_cn: 我们必须证明刊登这篇报道有利于公众。

meanings.meaning_en: ordinary people who do not work for the government or have any special position in society
meanings.example: full public access to information
meanings.example_cn: 公众对信息的充分知情权

meanings.meaning_en: to move in a particular way, or to do something as you are moving
meanings.example: The plate went crashing to the floor.
meanings.example_cn: 盘子哗啦一声掉在地板上。

meanings.meaning_en: an animal that lives in water, and uses its  fins  and tail to swim
meanings.example: Over 1,500 different species of fish inhabit the waters around the reef.
meanings.example_cn: 那片礁石周围的水域生活着1,500多种不同的鱼类。

meanings.meaning_en: to try to catch fish
meanings.example: The stonefish is the most deadly of all fishes.
meanings.example_cn: 石鱼是所有鱼类中毒性最强的。

meanings.meaning_en: a group of similar things that belong together or are related in some way
meanings.example: a chess set
meanings.example_cn: 一副国际象棋

meanings.meaning_en: to carefully put something down somewhere
on one occasion only
meanings.example: I’ve only met her once.
meanings.example_cn: 我只见过她一面。

meanings.meaning_en: from the time when something happens
meanings.example: Paul’s been to Wexford once before.
meanings.example_cn: 保罗曾去过韦克斯福德一次。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of furniture with a flat top supported by legs
meanings.example: The food was served on long tables.
meanings.example_cn: 食物放在长餐桌上供应。

meanings.meaning_en: the need or desire that people have for particular goods and services
meanings.example: Production is still increasing faster than demand.
meanings.example_cn: 生产仍比需求增长快。

meanings.meaning_en: a period of 24 hours
meanings.example: We spent three days in Paris.
meanings.example_cn: 我们在巴黎度过了三天。

meanings.meaning_en: the direction that is at the bottom of a map of the world, below the Equator. It is on the right if you are facing the rising sun.
meanings.example: Which way is south?
meanings.example_cn: 哪面是南？

meanings.meaning_en: in the south, or facing the south
in or to the southern part of England
nearly, but not completely or not quite
meanings.example: Have you almost finished?
meanings.example_cn: 你差不多完成了吗？

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the particular area you live in, or the area you are talking about
meanings.example: local hospital
meanings.example_cn: 当地医院

meanings.meaning_en: someone who lives in the place where you are or the place that you are talking about
meanings.example: local residents
meanings.example_cn: 本地居民

meanings.meaning_en: not closed, so that things, people, air etc can go in and out or be put in and out
meanings.example: He threw the door open and ran down the stairs.
meanings.example_cn: 他猛地打开门，往楼下跑去。

meanings.meaning_en: to move a door, window etc so that people, things, air etc can pass through, or to be moved in this way
meanings.example: an open window
meanings.example_cn: 打开的窗户

meanings.meaning_en: to include or deal with a particular subject or group of things
meanings.example: a course covering business law
meanings.example_cn: 一门包括商业法的课程

meanings.meaning_en: the outer front or back part of a magazine, book etc
meanings.example: Are there any areas you feel are not covered adequately in the book?
meanings.example_cn: 书中是否有哪些方面你觉得论述得还不够详细？

meanings.meaning_en: the purpose of something is what it is intended to achieve
meanings.example: Nick had no particular purpose in mind when he started.
meanings.example_cn: 尼克开始的时候头脑中并没有明确的目标。

meanings.meaning_en: if someone or something reaches a particular point in their development or in a process or competition, they get to that point
meanings.example: Chelsea could reach the final of the European Cup.
meanings.example_cn: 切尔西队会进入欧洲杯决赛。

meanings.meaning_en: the limit of someone’s power or ability to do something

meanings.meaning_cn: 不同的,多样的,多方面的
meanings.meaning_en: if there are various things, there are several different types of that thing
meanings.example: The jacket is available in various colours.
meanings.example_cn: 这种夹克有好多种颜色可选。

meanings.meaning_en: arriving, happening, or done after the time that was expected, agreed, or arranged
meanings.example: Sorry I’m late – I overslept.
meanings.example_cn: 对不起，来晚了——我睡过头了。

meanings.meaning_en: after the usual time
meanings.example: The train was even later than usual.
meanings.example_cn: 火车到得甚至比平时还晚。

meanings.meaning_en: at a time in the future or in the past, although you do not know exactly when
meanings.example: The sales figures won't be released until sometime next month.
meanings.example_cn: 销售数据要到下个月的某个时候才会公布。

meanings.meaning_en: former
the purpose that something has, or the job that someone or something does
meanings.example: The nervous system regulates our bodily functions (= eating, breathing, going to the toilet etc ) .
meanings.example_cn: 神经系统控制着我们身体的功能。

meanings.meaning_en: to work in the correct or intended way
meanings.example: Bauhaus architects thought that function was more important than form.
meanings.example_cn: 包豪斯学派的建筑师认为功能重于形式。

meanings.meaning_en: Someone who is able is very intelligent or very good at doing something
meanings.example: ...one of the brightest and ablest members of the government.
meanings.example_cn: …最聪明、最有才能的政府成员之一。

meanings.meaning_en: to accept that something is correct or true, or that something is acceptable according to the rules or law
meanings.example: The judge allowed the evidence.
meanings.example_cn: 法官接受了这项证据。

meanings.meaning_en: the part that is nearest the centre of something, and furthest from the sides, edges, top, bottom etc
meanings.example: There are plenty of small houses for sale, and quite a lot of very large ones, but very little in the middle.
meanings.example_cn: 在售的小房子很多，大房子也有不少，但是不大不小的很少。

meanings.meaning_en: nearest the centre and furthest from the edge, top, end etc
the house, apartment, or place where you live
meanings.example: They have a beautiful home in California.
meanings.example_cn: 他们在加州有个美丽的家。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to Europe or its people
meanings.example: European languages
meanings.example_cn: 欧洲的语言

meanings.meaning_en: someone from Europe
meanings.example: our European partners
meanings.example_cn: 我们的欧洲伙伴

meanings.meaning_en: why something happens, or why someone does something
meanings.example: She has reason to feel guilty.
meanings.example_cn: 她有理由感到内疚。

meanings.meaning_en: to increase in number, amount, or value
meanings.example: The police seem unable to cope with the rising tide of (= large increase in ) car crime.
meanings.example_cn: 面对日益增多的汽车罪案，警方似乎无能为力。

meanings.meaning_en: a person or country that belongs to a group or organization
meanings.example: The majority of union members voted in favour of a strike.
meanings.example_cn: 大多数工会成员投票赞成罢工。

meanings.meaning_en: a building that someone lives in, especially one that has more than one level and is intended to be used by one family
meanings.example: a four-bedroom house
meanings.example_cn: 一幢有四间卧室的房子

meanings.meaning_en: to provide someone with a place to live
meanings.example: Why don’t you all come over to our house for coffee?
meanings.example_cn: 你们全都上我们家来喝咖啡如何？

meanings.meaning_en: a quality or feature of something or someone that is typical of them and easy to recognize
meanings.example: Genes determine the characteristics of every living thing.
meanings.example_cn: 基因决定每个生物的特征。

meanings.meaning_en: very typical of a particular thing or of someone’s character
The last event, person, thing, or period of time is the most recent one
meanings.example: Much has changed since my last visit.
meanings.example_cn: 自我上次来访后，变化很大。

meanings.meaning_en: most recently before now
meanings.example: I split up with my last boyfriend three years ago.
meanings.example_cn: 我和前任男友在3年前分手了。

meanings.meaning_en: If an event, situation, or problem lasts for a particular length of time, it continues to exist or happen for that length of time
meanings.example: The marriage had lasted for less than two years.
meanings.example_cn: 这桩婚姻持续了不到两年。

meanings.meaning_en: a particular place, especially in relation to other areas, buildings etc
meanings.example: His apartment is in a really good location.
meanings.example_cn: 他的公寓地段很好。

meanings.meaning_en: the day that is happening now
meanings.example: Today is my birthday!
meanings.example_cn: 今天是我的生日！

meanings.meaning_en: the beliefs, way of life, art, and customs that are shared and accepted by people in a particular society
meanings.example: We speak Danish at home so that the boys don’t lose touch with their language and culture.
meanings.example_cn: 我们在家说丹麦语，这样男孩子们就不会脱离他们的语言和文化。

meanings.meaning_en: a baby or very young child
meanings.example: An infant’s skin is very sensitive.
meanings.example_cn: 幼儿的皮肤非常敏感。

meanings.meaning_en: your left side is the side of your body that contains your heart
meanings.example: She held out her left hand.
meanings.example_cn: 她伸出左手。

meanings.meaning_en: towards the direction or side that is on the left
meanings.example: a scar on the left side of his face
meanings.example_cn: 他左脸上的伤疤

meanings.meaning_en: the side of your body that contains your heart
having happened or started only a short time ago
meanings.example: Irving’s most recent book
meanings.example_cn: 欧文最新的书

meanings.meaning_en: the continent that is north of the Mediterranean and goes as far east as the Ural Mountains in Russia
meanings.example: eastern Europe
meanings.example_cn: 东欧

meanings.meaning_en: a group of people who are related to each other, especially a mother, a father, and their children
meanings.example: Do you know the family next door?
meanings.example_cn: 你认识隔壁那家人吗？

meanings.meaning_en: a place where something important or interesting happened
meanings.example: an archaeological site
meanings.example_cn: 考古现场

meanings.meaning_en: If something is sited in a particular place or position, it is put there or built there
meanings.example: He said chemical weapons had never been sited in Germany.
meanings.example_cn: 他说从未在德国部署过化学武器。

meanings.meaning_en: not correct or true
meanings.example: The information you gave us was incorrect.
meanings.example_cn: 你给我们的信息不准确。

meanings.meaning_en: Agricultural means involving or relating to agriculture
meanings.example: Farmers struggling for survival strip the forests for agricultural land.
meanings.example_cn: 为生存而挣扎的农民们把森林伐光来作农业用地。

meanings.meaning_en: by or to most people
meanings.example: It could be five years before the drug is generally available.
meanings.example_cn: 这种药可能还要过五年才能广泛投入市场。

meanings.meaning_en: the thing or things that someone owns
meanings.example: The hotel is not responsible for any loss or damage to guests’ personal property .
meanings.example_cn: 宾馆对住客个人财物的丢失和损坏概不负责。

meanings.meaning_en: the feeling that an event or place gives you
meanings.example: The hotel had a lovely relaxed atmosphere .
meanings.example_cn: 那家宾馆的气氛轻松愉快。

meanings.meaning_en: used to show that the people who do something are affected by their own action
meanings.example: Teachers have no choice but to take measures to protect themselves.
meanings.example_cn: 教师们别无选择，只能采取措施来保护自己。

meanings.meaning_en: used to introduce a statement that makes the main statement coming after it seem surprising, unlikely, or unexpected
meanings.example: Though she’s almost 40, she still plans to compete.
meanings.example_cn: 尽管已经快40岁了，她仍然打算参加比赛。

meanings.meaning_en: used after adding a fact, opinion, or question which seems surprising after what you have just said, or which makes what you have just said seem less true
meanings.example: Pascal went ahead with the experiment even though he knew it was dangerous.
meanings.example_cn: 虽然帕斯卡知道这个试验很危险，但他仍然进行下去。

meanings.meaning_en: having a lot of physical power so that you can lift heavy things, do hard physical work etc
meanings.example: He was a big strong man.
meanings.example_cn: 他高大健壮。

meanings.example: Snowplows have been out clearing the roads.
meanings.example_cn: 扫雪机已经出动，去清扫路面了。

meanings.meaning_en: to make somewhere emptier or tidier by removing things from it
meanings.example: Dad cleared a space (= moved things so there was room ) in the garage for Jim’s tools.
meanings.example_cn: 爸爸在车库里清理出一个地方来放吉姆的工具。

meanings.meaning_en: if a liquid clears, it becomes more transparent and you can see through it
meanings.example: It’s Kelly’s turn to clear the table (= remove the dirty plates, forks etc ) .
meanings.example_cn: 轮到凯利收拾桌子了。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something smaller or less in size, amount, or price
meanings.example: The governor announced a new plan to reduce crime.
meanings.example_cn: 州长宣布了一项降低犯罪率的新计划。

meanings.meaning_en: to put something down in a particular place
meanings.example: The female deposits her eggs directly into the water.
meanings.example_cn: 雌性把卵直接产在水中。

meanings.meaning_en: an amount of money that is paid into a bank account
the direction towards which the sun goes down, and which is on the left if you are facing north
meanings.example: There’s a slight chance of some sunshine in the west.
meanings.example_cn: 西部地区见晴的可能性不大。

meanings.meaning_en: in the west or facing the west
towards the west
as a result of something that you have just mentioned
meanings.example: Most of the evidence was destroyed in the fire. Thus it would be almost impossible to prove him guilty.
meanings.example_cn: 大多数证据已在大火中烧毁，因而要证明他有罪几乎是不可能的。

meanings.example: You cannot have both together.
meanings.example_cn: 你不能二者兼得。

meanings.meaning_en: something you say or write, especially publicly or officially, to let people know your intentions or opinions, or to record facts
meanings.example: In an official statement, she formally announced her resignation.
meanings.example_cn: 在一份官方声明中，她正式宣布辞职。

meanings.meaning_en: to end an argument or solve a disagreement
meanings.example: We hope the factions will be able to settle their differences (= agree to stop arguing ) by peaceful means.
meanings.example_cn: 我们希望各派系能以和平方式解决分歧。

meanings.meaning_en: if something solid melts or if heat melts it, it becomes liquid
meanings.example: It was warmer now, and the snow was beginning to melt.
meanings.example_cn: 现在天气暖和了，雪开始融化。

meanings.meaning_en: The Pacific or the Pacific Ocean is a very large sea to the west of North and South America, and to the east of Asia and Australia
meanings.example: ...an island in the Pacific.
meanings.example_cn: ...太平洋上的一个岛。

meanings.meaning_cn: 可利用的,可得到的,有空的
meanings.meaning_en: something that is available is able to be used or can easily be bought or found
meanings.example: Tickets are available from the box office.
meanings.example_cn: 售票处有票出售。

meanings.example: All genuine knowledge originates in direct experience.
meanings.example_cn: 一切真知都是从直接经验发源的。

meanings.meaning_en: to aim something in a particular direction or at a particular person, group etc
meanings.example: The workers' movement poses a direct threat to their interests.
meanings.example_cn: 工人运动对他们的利益造成了直接威胁。

meanings.meaning_en: businesses that produce a particular type of thing or provide a particular service
meanings.example: I work in the oil industry.
meanings.example_cn: 我在石油行业工作。

meanings.meaning_en: a system of communication by written or spoken words, which is used by the people of a particular country or area
meanings.example: How many languages do you speak?
meanings.example_cn: 你能说几种语言？

meanings.meaning_en: if something varies, it changes depending on the situation
meanings.example: Quentin’s mood seems to vary according to the weather.
meanings.example_cn: 昆廷的情绪似乎随天气而变化。

meanings.meaning_en: a transparent solid substance used for making windows, bottles etc
meanings.example: a glass bowl
meanings.example_cn: 玻璃碗

meanings.meaning_en: the limits within which amounts, quantities, ages etc vary
meanings.example: a temperature range of 72-85˚
meanings.example_cn: 72 度到85度之间的温度范围

meanings.meaning_en: to put things in a particular order or position
meanings.example: Even the cheapest property was out of our price range (= too expensive for us ) .
meanings.example_cn: 即使是最便宜的房子也超出了我们能承受的价格范围。

meanings.meaning_en: the thing you are talking about or considering in a conversation, discussion, book, film etc
meanings.example: Paul has strong opinions on most subjects.
meanings.example_cn: 保罗在大多数问题上观点激烈。

meanings.meaning_en: to force a country or group of people to be ruled by you, and control them very strictly
meanings.example: The subjects covered in this chapter are exercise and nutrition.
meanings.example_cn: 本章涵盖的主题是运动和营养。

meanings.meaning_en: going far in from the outside or from the front edge of something
meanings.example: a deep wound
meanings.example_cn: 很深的伤口

meanings.meaning_en: a long way into or below the surface of something
meanings.example: She was sitting in a deep leather chair.
meanings.example_cn: 她坐在一张很深的皮椅子里。

meanings.meaning_en: having the colour of grass or leaves
meanings.example: beautiful green eyes
meanings.example_cn: 漂亮的碧眼

meanings.meaning_en: to fill an area with growing plants in order to make it more attractive
meanings.example: Raw coffee beans are green in colour.
meanings.example_cn: 生咖啡豆是绿色的。

meanings.meaning_en: to state officially that someone may be guilty of a crime
meanings.example: Even local nurseries charge $150 a week.
meanings.example_cn: 即便当地的托儿所每周也要收$150的费用。

meanings.meaning_en: to be passed quickly from one person or place to another
meanings.example: News travels fast.
meanings.example_cn: 消息传起来很快。

meanings.meaning_en: without water or liquid inside or on the surface
meanings.example: I need to change into some dry clothes .
meanings.example_cn: 我要换上干衣服。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something dry, or to become dry
meanings.example: Make sure that the surface is clean and dry before you start to paint.
meanings.example_cn: 油漆之前一定先要确保表面清洁干燥。

meanings.meaning_en: the way in which someone or something is involved in an activity or situation, and how much influence they have on it
meanings.example: Until now scientists had very little clear evidence about the drug's role in preventing more serious effects of infection.
meanings.example_cn: 到目前为止，科学家们几乎没有该药物在防止更严重的感染后果的功能的明确证据。

meanings.meaning_en: to start a company, organization, system, etc that is intended to exist or continue for a long time
meanings.example: The city of Boerne was established by German settlers in the 1840s.
meanings.example_cn: 博恩市是德国移民于19世纪40年代建立的。

meanings.example: I stood at her right.
meanings.example_cn: 我站在她的右边。

meanings.example: We should right the poor and the oppressed.
meanings.example_cn: 我们应当公正对待穷人和受压迫的人民。

meanings.meaning_en: exactly in a particular position or place
below something else, especially below something of the same type
meanings.example: Nina chewed her lower lip anxiously.
meanings.example_cn: 尼娜焦虑不安地咬着下唇。

meanings.meaning_en: to reduce something in amount, degree, strength etc, or to become less
meanings.example: Ruth went down to the lower deck (= lower level on a ship ) .
meanings.example_cn: 露丝到下层甲板去了。

meanings.example: The builder designed a new shopping center for the company.
meanings.example_cn: 那名设计者为该公司设计了一个新的购物中心。

meanings.example: Whatever is at the center of your life is what you worship.
meanings.example_cn: 你的生活中心无论是什么都是你所崇拜的那个。

meanings.meaning_en: roman type or print
if something tends to happen, it happens often and is likely to happen again
meanings.example: People tend to need less sleep as they get older.
meanings.example_cn: 随着年龄的增长，人需要的睡眠通常会减少。

meanings.meaning_en: to look after someone or something
meanings.example: My car tends to overheat in the summer.
meanings.example_cn: 我的车夏天经常会变得过热。

meanings.meaning_en: exactly
meanings.example: A good strong cup of coffee is just what I need right now.
meanings.example_cn: 我现在正需要喝一杯浓浓的咖啡。

meanings.meaning_en: morally right and fair
meanings.example: The house was large and roomy; just right for us.
meanings.example_cn: 那幢房子大而宽敞，正合我们的需要。

meanings.meaning_en: when there is not enough of something, or none of it
meanings.example: Too many teachers are treated with a lack of respect.
meanings.example_cn: 有太多老师得不到尊重。

meanings.meaning_en: to consider two or more things or people, in order to show how they are similar or different
meanings.example: The report compares the different types of home computer available.
meanings.example_cn: 这份报告比较了市场上不同类型的家用计算机。

meanings.meaning_en: a quality that is beyond compare is the best of its kind
used to say that someone leaves a place or person, or stays some distance from a place or person
meanings.example: Go away!
meanings.example_cn: 走开！

meanings.meaning_en: a small creature such as a fly or ant, that has six legs, and sometimes wings
meanings.example: an insect bite
meanings.example_cn: 昆虫的叮咬

meanings.meaning_en: knowledge or skill that you gain from doing a job or activity, or the process of doing this
meanings.example: The advice in the booklet reflects the practical experience we have gained (= experience gained by actually doing something, rather than knowledge from books etc ).
meanings.example_cn: 小册子中的建议反映了我们所获得的实践经验。

meanings.meaning_en: an action, especially an official one, that is intended to deal with a particular problem
meanings.example: New safety measures were being demanded after last night’s horrific train crash.
meanings.example_cn: 昨晚发生严重的火车相撞事故后，民众要求制定新的安全措施。

meanings.meaning_en: to find the size, length, or amount of something, using standard units such as  inch es  ,metres etc
meanings.example: The new bridge was erected as a temporary measure to replace the one which was destroyed by floods.
meanings.example_cn: 建这座新桥是为了临时代替被洪水毁坏的那座桥。

meanings.meaning_en: to start doing something instead of another person, or start being used instead of another thing
meanings.example: I’m replacing Sue on the team.
meanings.example_cn: 我将接替队里的休。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone interested in something, or make them want to take part in something
meanings.example: I’m not usually attracted to blondes.
meanings.example_cn: 我一般不喜欢金发女子。

meanings.meaning_en: soft white pieces of frozen water that fall from the sky in cold weather and cover the ground
meanings.example: Snow was falling heavily as we entered the village.
meanings.example_cn: 我们进村的时候雪下得正大。

meanings.meaning_en: if it snows, snow falls from the sky
meanings.example: I could see footprints in the snow.
meanings.example_cn: 我看到雪地里有脚印。

meanings.meaning_en: a natural white mineral that is added to food to make it taste better or to preserve it
meanings.example: This might need some salt and pepper.
meanings.example_cn: 这里面也许要加点盐和胡椒粉。

meanings.meaning_en: to add salt to food to preserve it
meanings.example: a pinch of salt
meanings.example_cn: 一撮盐

meanings.meaning_en: to look for someone or something very carefully
meanings.example: The police are still hunting the killer.
meanings.example_cn: 警方仍在追捕杀人凶手。

meanings.meaning_en: a type of heavy sticky earth that can be used for making pots, bricks etc
meanings.example: Bricks are made from clay.
meanings.example_cn: 砖是用黏土制成的。

meanings.meaning_en: to move your body so that you are looking in a different direction
meanings.example: Ricky turned and walked away.
meanings.example_cn: 里基转身走了。

meanings.meaning_en: a part of something that you notice because it seems important, interesting, or typical
meanings.example: Air bags are a standard feature in most new cars.
meanings.example_cn: 气囊是大多数新车的标准配置。

meanings.meaning_en: to include or show something as a special or important part of something, or to be included as an important part
meanings.example: Striped tails are a common feature of many animals.
meanings.example_cn: 尾巴上有条纹是许多动物的共同特征。

meanings.example: the enormous variety of marine life
meanings.example_cn: 海洋生物繁多的种类

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the sea and the creatures that live there
meanings.example: the effects of oil pollution on marine mammals
meanings.example_cn: 石油污染对海洋哺乳动物的影响

meanings.meaning_en: the temperature and other conditions such as sun, rain, and wind
meanings.example: What’s the weather like today?
meanings.example_cn: 今天天气如何？

meanings.meaning_en: if rock, wood, or someone’s face is weathered by the wind, sun, rain etc, or if it weathers, it changes colour or shape over a period of time
meanings.example: The weather turned bitterly cold.
meanings.example_cn: 天气变得很冷了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 流行的,通俗的,受欢迎的
meanings.meaning_en: liked by a lot of people
meanings.example: Hilary was popular at school.
meanings.example_cn: 希拉里在学校里很受欢迎。

meanings.meaning_en: to think about something carefully, especially before making a choice or decision
meanings.example: We will have to consider your offer carefully .
meanings.example_cn: 我们得仔细考虑你的提议。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is necessary is what you need to have or need to do
meanings.example: The booklet provides all the necessary information about the college.
meanings.example_cn: 这本小册子提供了关于那所学院的所有必需信息。

meanings.meaning_en: things such as food or basic clothes that you need in order to live
meanings.example: No further changes were considered necessary.
meanings.example_cn: 没有必要作出进一步改变。

meanings.example: The Cloud Mouse is a project of Microsoft researcher Richard Harper and his collaborators at Microsoft Research Asia.
meanings.example_cn: 云鼠标是微软研究员理查德哈珀和他的合作者在微软亚洲研究院的一个项目 。

meanings.meaning_en: in a higher position than something else
meanings.example: the upper lip
meanings.example_cn: 上唇

meanings.meaning_en: including or involving a large variety of different people, things, or situations
meanings.example: a man with a wide experience of foreign affairs
meanings.example_cn: 外交事务经验丰富的人

meanings.meaning_en: a large area of land that is covered with trees
meanings.example: a tropical forest
meanings.example_cn: 热带森林

meanings.example: the danger of forest fires
meanings.example_cn: 发生森林火灾的危险

meanings.meaning_en: happening or existing now
meanings.example: the current President
meanings.example_cn: 现任总统

meanings.example: In its current state, the car is worth £1,000.
meanings.example_cn: 这辆车按现在的车况来看值1,000英镑。

meanings.meaning_en: to gain knowledge of a subject or skill, by experience, by studying it, or by being taught
meanings.example: What’s the best way to learn a language?
meanings.example_cn: 学习语言的最佳方法是什么？

meanings.meaning_en: to choose something or someone by thinking carefully about which is the best, most suitable etc
meanings.example: a group of students selected at random
meanings.example_cn: 随机挑选出来的一组学生

meanings.meaning_en: a select group of people or things is a small special group that has been chosen carefully
to make something better, or to become better
meanings.example: a course for students wishing to improve their English
meanings.example_cn: 为想提高英语水平的学生开设的一门课

meanings.meaning_en: in or from the west of a country or area
meanings.example: the western end of the bay
meanings.example_cn: 海湾的西端

meanings.example: Western Australia
meanings.example_cn: 西澳大利亚

meanings.meaning_en: a large area of water surrounded by land
meanings.example: Lake Michigan
meanings.example_cn: 密歇根湖

meanings.meaning_en: the amount of money that something is worth
meanings.example: The value of his investment has risen by more than $50,000.
meanings.example_cn: 他的投资价值已经增长$50000多。

meanings.meaning_en: to think that someone or something is important
a building or group of buildings in which goods are produced in large quantities, using machines
meanings.example: a car factory
meanings.example_cn: 汽车制造厂

meanings.meaning_en: a place where children are taught
meanings.example: His mother always used to pick him up from school.
meanings.example_cn: 他母亲以前一直去学校接他。

meanings.meaning_en: to train or teach someone to have a certain skill, type of behaviour, or way of thinking

meanings.example: She snuggled up to him to get warm.
meanings.example_cn: 她偎依着他来暖和自己的身体。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone or something warm or warmer, or to become warm or warmer
meanings.example: Spring rains and warm sunlight quickened the earth.
meanings.example_cn: 春雨和温暖的阳光使大地复苏了。

meanings.meaning_en: about or related to science, or using its methods
meanings.example: We believe in investing in scientific research.
meanings.example_cn: 我们相信科学研究的投资价值。

meanings.example: Can you raise the lamp so I can see?
meanings.example_cn: 你能把灯举高点好让我看清吗？

meanings.meaning_en: to move or lift something to a higher position, place, or level
meanings.example: William raised his hat and smiled at her.
meanings.example_cn: 威廉抬一抬帽子，朝她笑了笑。

meanings.meaning_en: Political means relating to the way power is achieved and used in a country or society
meanings.example: All other political parties there have been completely banned.
meanings.example_cn: 那里的其他所有政党都已经完全被取缔了。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something continue in the same way or at the same standard as before
meanings.example: Careers Officers maintain contact with young people when they have left school.
meanings.example_cn: 年轻人离开学校以后，职业指导员和他们保持联系。

meanings.meaning_en: a small insect that lives in large groups
meanings.example: Ants swarmed up out of the ground and covered her shoes and legs.
meanings.example_cn: 蚂蚁从地里成群地爬出来，爬满了她的鞋和腿。

meanings.meaning_en: to do something that produces an effect or change in something or in someone’s situation
meanings.example: the areas affected by the hurricane
meanings.example_cn: 受飓风影响的地区

meanings.meaning_en: to put a piece of equipment into a place, or a new part onto a machine, so that it is ready to be used
meanings.example: The sash, kimono, and other garments were made to fit a child.
meanings.example_cn: 这些腰带、和服和其他衣服都做得适合孩子穿。

meanings.meaning_en: happening a number of times, usually at regular times
meanings.example: periodic home visits by nurses
meanings.example_cn: 护士的定期上门探访

meanings.meaning_en: a hard, usually shiny substance such as iron, gold, or steel
meanings.example: The gate is made of metal.
meanings.example_cn: 这扇大门是用金属做成的。

meanings.example: a small black metal box
meanings.example_cn: 一个黑色的金属小盒子

meanings.meaning_en: the quality of being important
meanings.example: He was full of his own importance (= he behaved in an annoying way which showed that he thought he was very important ).
meanings.example_cn: 他自以为很了不起。

meanings.meaning_en: your native country, town etc is the place where you were born
meanings.example: They never saw their native land again.
meanings.example_cn: 他们再也没见到故土。

meanings.meaning_en: a person who was born in a particular place
meanings.example: He spent most of his professional life outside his native Poland.
meanings.example_cn: 他大部分的职业生涯都没在祖国波兰度过。

meanings.meaning_en: to recognize and correctly name someone or something
meanings.example: He was too far away to be able to identify faces.
meanings.example_cn: 他离得太远，没法看面孔认出谁是谁。

meanings.meaning_en: an area of lower land between two lines of hills or mountains, usually with a river flowing through it
meanings.example: the San Fernando Valley
meanings.example_cn: 圣费尔南多山谷

meanings.meaning_en: a specific thing, person, or group is one particular thing, person, or group
meanings.example: games suitable for specific age groups
meanings.example_cn: 适合特定年龄组的游戏

meanings.meaning_en: happening or continuing for only a little time or for less time than usual
meanings.example: a short meeting
meanings.example_cn: 一个短会

meanings.meaning_en: the part of your body that you stand on and walk on
meanings.example: My foot hurts.
meanings.example_cn: 我脚痛。

meanings.meaning_en: a particular way of doing, designing, or producing something, especially one that is typical of a particular place, period of time, or group of people
meanings.example: an attempt to use Japanese management style in a European business
meanings.example_cn: 将日本的管理方式用于欧洲企业的尝试

meanings.meaning_en: firm, stiff, and difficult to press down, break, or cut
meanings.example: a hard wooden chair
meanings.example_cn: 一把硬木椅

meanings.meaning_en: using a lot of effort, energy, or attention
meanings.example: the hardest substance known to man
meanings.example_cn: 已知的最硬物质

meanings.meaning_en: the place or situation in which something begins to exist
meanings.example: The tradition has its origins in the Middle Ages.
meanings.example_cn: 这一传统源于中世纪。

meanings.meaning_en: a single very small piece of a substance such as sand or salt
meanings.example: There were crumbs and grains of sugar on the table.
meanings.example_cn: 桌子上有面包屑和糖粒。

meanings.meaning_en: related to a whole nation as opposed to any of its parts
meanings.example: Religion matters very much at a national level.
meanings.example_cn: 宗教事务在全国都非常重要。

meanings.meaning_en: soon before a particular time or event
meanings.example: I didn’t remember to phone until near the end of the week.
meanings.example_cn: 快到周末我才想起要打电话。

meanings.meaning_en: to come closer to a place
meanings.example: They should send us more details nearer the time of the concert.
meanings.example_cn: 临近音乐会时他们应该会给我们发更多详细信息。

meanings.meaning_en: only a short distance away from someone or something
a human being, especially considered as someone with their own particular character
meanings.example: He was a very nice person, always pleasant and friendly.
meanings.example_cn: 他是个很好的人，始终彬彬有礼。

meanings.meaning_en: most important
meanings.example: Our primary concern is to provide the refugees with food and health care.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的头等大事是向难民提供食品和医疗。

meanings.example: Many of the villagers rely on fishing as their primary source of income.
meanings.example_cn: 很多村民以打鱼作为他们的主要收入来源。

meanings.meaning_en: a type of animal that drinks milk from its mother’s body when it is young. Humans, dogs, and whales are mammals.
meanings.example: A whale is a kind of mammal.
meanings.example_cn: 鲸是一种哺乳动物。

meanings.meaning_en: the process of starting a new organization or group
meanings.example: We now know a lot more about the early stages of planetary formation.
meanings.example_cn: 我们现在对行星形成过程的早期阶段有了更多的了解。

meanings.meaning_en: a large wild animal that can run very fast, eats grass, and has horns
meanings.example: The hunter wounded the deer.
meanings.example_cn: 猎人打伤了鹿。

meanings.meaning_en: consisting of many different parts and often difficult to understand
meanings.example: a complex system of highways
meanings.example_cn: 复杂的公路网

meanings.meaning_en: done, used, or experienced before now
meanings.example: Judging by her past performance, Jane should do very well.
meanings.example_cn: 从以往的表现来看，简应该会干得很好。

meanings.example: From past experience she knew that it was no use arguing with him.
meanings.example_cn: 根据过去的经验，她知道和他争论是没有用的。

meanings.meaning_en: used to say that an unpleasant experience has ended and can be forgotten
meanings.example: Study some past exam papers to get an idea of the questions.
meanings.example_cn: 仔细看看以前的一些考卷，了解一下考题。

meanings.meaning_en: to express an idea, feeling, thought etc using words
meanings.example: ‘I’m so tired,’ she said.
meanings.example_cn: “我太累了。”她说。

meanings.meaning_en: a smooth steady movement of liquid, gas, or electricity
meanings.example: a new road system to improve traffic flow through the city centre
meanings.example_cn: 疏导市中心车流的新道路系统

meanings.meaning_en: a period of time when you stop working in order to rest, eat etc
meanings.example: We’ll have a short break for lunch, then start again at two o'clock.
meanings.example_cn: 我们稍微休息一下吃午饭，两点钟再开始。

meanings.meaning_en: to end a period of silence by talking or making a noise
meanings.example: Let’s take a ten-minute break .
meanings.example_cn: 我们休息十分钟吧。

meanings.example: He had to duck his head to get through the low doorway.
meanings.example_cn: 他只得把头低下才能通过那低矮的门道。

meanings.meaning_en: a player or team in a competition that is given a particular position, according to how likely they are to win
meanings.example: He’s been top seed for the past two years.
meanings.example_cn: 他在过去两年中一直是头号种子选手。

meanings.meaning_en: to give a player or team in a competition a particular position, according to how likely they are to win
used to say that something may be true, but you are not sure
meanings.example: Perhaps she’s next door.
meanings.example_cn: 她也许在隔壁。

meanings.meaning_en: the hot mist that water produces when it is boiled
meanings.example: Steam rose from the hot tub.
meanings.example_cn: 水蒸气从热腾腾的浴缸里升起。

meanings.meaning_en: shapes, lines etc painted or drawn on a surface, showing what someone or something looks like
meanings.example: The room had several pictures on the walls.
meanings.example_cn: 那个房间墙上有几幅画。

meanings.meaning_en: to describe something in a particular way
meanings.example: a book with pictures in it
meanings.example_cn: 带插图的书

meanings.meaning_en: the direction from which the sun rises, and which is on the right if you are facing north
meanings.example: Which way is east?
meanings.example_cn: 哪边是东？

meanings.meaning_en: towards the east
the practice or science of farming
meanings.example: More than 75% of the land is used for agriculture.
meanings.example_cn: 75%以上的土地用于农耕。

meanings.meaning_en: a very small piece of something
meanings.example: dust particles
meanings.example_cn: 尘埃

meanings.meaning_en: one part of a situation, idea, plan etc that has many parts
meanings.example: The storm outside gave the room a sinister aspect.
meanings.example_cn: 外面的暴风雨使房间里变得阴森可怕。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to industry or the people working in it
meanings.example: By 1900, Britain was a mainly industrial society.
meanings.example_cn: 到1900年英国已基本进入工业社会。

meanings.meaning_en: an area of land in the country, especially one where crops are grown or animals feed on grass
meanings.example: a view of green fields and rolling hills
meanings.example_cn: 田野青翠、丘陵起伏的景色

meanings.meaning_en: a scientific test done to find out how something reacts under certain conditions, or to find out if a particular idea is true
meanings.example: The astronauts are conducting a series of experiments to learn more about how the body adapts to weightlessness.
meanings.example_cn: 那些宇航员正在进行一系列实验，以便更多地了解人体如何适应失重状态。

meanings.meaning_en: to try using various ideas, methods etc to find out how good or effective they are
used to show that a thing, organization, animal, or baby that does something is affected by its own action
meanings.example: The cat lay on the sofa, washing itself.
meanings.example_cn: 猫躺在沙发上把自己舔干。

meanings.meaning_en: if two things relate, they are connected in some way
meanings.example: I don’t understand how the two ideas relate.
meanings.example_cn: 我不明白这两个观点有什么联系。

meanings.meaning_en: used to emphasize how much time will pass before something happens, or how long a situation will continue
meanings.example: ‘When’s your holiday?’ ‘Oh, not for ages yet.’
meanings.example_cn: “你什么时候去休假？”“噢，不知何年何月呢。”

meanings.meaning_en: used to introduce a fact, situation, or quality that is surprising after what you have just said
meanings.example: It could be months yet before they know their fate.
meanings.example_cn: 可能要好几个月他们才能知道自己的命运。

meanings.meaning_en: a small tool used in work such as science or medicine
meanings.example: surgical instruments
meanings.example_cn: 外科(手术)器械

meanings.meaning_en: the rate at which something moves or travels
meanings.example: The truck was travelling at a speed of 50 mph.
meanings.example_cn: 卡车正以 50 英里的时速在行驶。

meanings.example: particles that travel at the speed of light
meanings.example_cn: 以光速运动的粒子

meanings.meaning_cn: 一千(个),许许多多,成千上万
meanings.meaning_en: the number 1,000
meanings.example: a journey of almost a thousand miles
meanings.example_cn: 将近1,000英里的旅程

meanings.meaning_en: to produce many printed copies of a book, newspaper etc
meanings.example: Over five million copies of the paper are printed every day.
meanings.example_cn: 这份报纸每日印量超过五百万。

meanings.meaning_en: as a result of something that has just been mentioned
meanings.example: Their car was bigger and therefore more comfortable.
meanings.example_cn: 他们的车大些，所以更舒适些。

meanings.meaning_en: a belief, custom, or way of doing something that has existed for a long time, or these beliefs, customs etc in general
meanings.example: the traditions of South East Asia
meanings.example_cn: 东南亚的传统

meanings.meaning_en: things that are produced in order to be sold
meanings.example: the large market for consumer goods
meanings.example_cn: 庞大的消费品市场

meanings.meaning_en: to officially speak or take action for another person or group of people
meanings.example: Mr Kobayashi was chosen to represent the company at the conference.
meanings.example_cn: 小林先生被选中代表公司出席会议。

meanings.meaning_en: a very large mass of ice floating in the sea, most of which is under the surface of the water

meanings.example: They partook of our triumph.
meanings.example_cn: 他们分享我们的胜利。

meanings.meaning_en: an adult male human
meanings.example: There were two men and a woman in the car.
meanings.example_cn: 车上有两男一女。

meanings.meaning_en: to put things away and keep them until you need them
meanings.example: Store the beans in an airtight jar.
meanings.example_cn: 把豆子贮存在密封罐内。

meanings.meaning_en: a place where goods are sold to the public. In British English, a store is large and sells many different things, but in American English, a store can be large or small, and sell many things or only one type of thing.
If you depend on someone or something, you need them in order to be able to survive physically, financially, or emotionally
meanings.example: He depended on his writing for his income.
meanings.example_cn: 他靠写作谋生。

meanings.example: His heavy boots cumbered him in walking.
meanings.example_cn: 他的笨重的靴子使他行走不便。

meanings.meaning_en: involving the whole of a situation, group, or thing, rather than specific parts of it
meanings.example: There has been a general decline in standards.
meanings.example_cn: 道德水准普遍下降。

meanings.meaning_en: a description of how something happened, that is intended to entertain people, and may be true or imaginary
meanings.example: a book of short stories
meanings.example_cn: 短篇小说集

meanings.meaning_en: new machines, equipment, and ways of doing things that are based on modern knowledge about science and computers
meanings.example: Modern technology makes moving money around much easier than it used to be.
meanings.example_cn: 现代科技使货币流动比以前便捷得多。

meanings.meaning_en: water that falls in small drops from clouds in the sky
meanings.example: a night of wind and rain
meanings.example_cn: 风雨交加的夜晚

meanings.meaning_en: if it rains, drops of water fall from clouds in the sky
meanings.example: There will be heavy rain in most parts of the country.
meanings.example_cn: 全国大部分地区将有大雨。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is very different from something else
meanings.example: The sauce is quite sweet, so add dried thyme as a contrast.
meanings.example_cn: 这调味汁很甜，所以要加点干百里香作为陪衬。

meanings.meaning_en: an animal that kills and eats other animals
meanings.example: With no natural predators on the island, the herd increased rapidly.
meanings.example_cn: 由于岛上没有天然食肉动物，牧群的数量迅速增加。

meanings.meaning_en: in the opposite direction to the movement or flow of something
meanings.example: sailing against the wind
meanings.example_cn: 逆风航行

meanings.meaning_en: to continue to live after an accident, war, or illness
meanings.example: Only 12 of the 140 passengers survived.
meanings.example_cn: 140 名乘客中只有 12 人生还。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the natural processes performed by living things
meanings.example: the biological functions of the body
meanings.example_cn: 人体的生物机能

meanings.meaning_en: everything in the physical world that is not controlled by humans, such as wild plants and animals, earth and rocks, and the weather
meanings.example: We grew up in the countryside, surrounded by the beauties of nature.
meanings.example_cn: 我们在乡村长大，周围是美丽的大自然。

meanings.meaning_en: something you say, write, or do that shows what you think or feel
meanings.example: Student leaders are demanding greater freedom of expression (= the right to say what you think without being punished ).
meanings.example_cn: 学生领袖要求得到更多的言论自由。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the sun
meanings.example: a solar eclipse
meanings.example_cn: 日食

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to teach, especially in a school
meanings.example: a primary school teacher
meanings.example_cn: 小学教师

meanings.meaning_en: away from a place
meanings.example: He got into his car and drove off.
meanings.example_cn: 他上了车，随即开车走了。

meanings.meaning_en: a large area with houses, shops, offices etc where people live and work, that is smaller than a city and larger than a village
meanings.example: an industrial town in the Midlands
meanings.example_cn: 英格兰中部的一座工业城镇

meanings.meaning_en: the style and design of a building or buildings
meanings.example: He studied architecture at university.
meanings.example_cn: 他在大学里读的是建筑学。

meanings.meaning_en: to teach someone the skills of a particular job or activity, or to be taught these skills
meanings.example: a highly trained workforce
meanings.example_cn: 训练有素的劳动力

meanings.meaning_en: to give money, help, ideas etc to something that a lot of other people are also involved in
meanings.example: The three sons also contribute to the family business.
meanings.example_cn: 3个儿子也为家族企业做贡献。

meanings.example: Who knows most says least.
meanings.example_cn: 懂得最多的人， 说得最少。

meanings.meaning_en: to come up to a particular place, person, or object and go past them
meanings.example: The crowd parted to let the truck pass.
meanings.example_cn: 人群分开让卡车通过。

meanings.meaning_en: all the time, at all times, or every time
meanings.example: Always lock your bicycle to something secure.
meanings.example_cn: 每次都要把自行车锁在牢固的物体上。

meanings.meaning_en: usual, typical, or expected
meanings.example: A normal working week is 40 hours.
meanings.example_cn: 一个正常的工作周是40小时。

meanings.meaning_en: a substance that is formed naturally in the earth, such as coal, salt, stone, or gold. Minerals can be dug out of the ground and used
meanings.example: The area is very rich in minerals .
meanings.example_cn: 该地区矿产非常丰富。

meanings.meaning_en: mainly
meanings.example: The advertisement is aimed primarily at children.
meanings.example_cn: 这则广告的对象主要是儿童。

meanings.meaning_en: the information, skills, and understanding that you have gained through learning or experience
meanings.example: He did not have much knowledge of American history.
meanings.example_cn: 他对美国历史所知不多。

meanings.meaning_en: to speak or write to someone in order to get an answer, information, or a solution
meanings.example: ‘What’s your name?’ she asked.
meanings.example_cn: “你叫什么名字？”她问道 。

meanings.meaning_en: to see and notice some­thing
meanings.example: Scientists have observed a drop in ozone levels over the Antarctic.
meanings.example_cn: 科学家已经观察到南极洲上方的臭氧浓度有所下降。

meanings.meaning_en: not difficult or complicated to do or understand
meanings.example: a simple but effective solution to the problem
meanings.example_cn: 对这个问题简单而有效的解决办法

meanings.meaning_en: not moving, being done, or happening quickly
meanings.example: The car was travelling at a very slow speed.
meanings.example_cn: 汽车正以非常慢的速度行驶。

meanings.meaning_en: to become slower or to make something slower
meanings.example: a slow walker
meanings.example_cn: 慢慢走着的人

meanings.meaning_en: a long passage dug into the ground and filled with water, either for boats to travel along, or to take water to a place
meanings.example: We walked along by the side of the canal.
meanings.example_cn: 我们沿着运河边往前走。

meanings.meaning_en: a job or activity in which you make things with your hands, and that you usually need skill to do
meanings.example: traditional rural crafts
meanings.example_cn: 传统的乡村手工艺

meanings.meaning_en: what someone is called
meanings.example: Her name is Mandy Wilson.
meanings.example_cn: 她的名字是曼迪•威尔逊。

meanings.meaning_en: to give someone or something a particular name
meanings.example: What’s your name?
meanings.example_cn: 你叫什么名字？

meanings.meaning_en: if a person or a thing is reflected in a mirror, glass, or water, you can see an image of the person or thing on the surface of the mirror, glass, or water
meanings.example: The drop in consumer spending reflects concern about the economy.
meanings.example_cn: 消费支出的下降反映出人们对经济的担忧。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of adding something to something else
meanings.example: This is a fine book; a worthy addition to the series.
meanings.example_cn: 这是一本好书——是对这套丛书有价值的增补。

meanings.meaning_en: to disagree with someone in words, often in an angry way
meanings.example: We could hear the neighbours arguing.
meanings.example_cn: 我们听到邻居在争吵。

meanings.meaning_en: to produce a picture of something using a pencil, pen etc
meanings.example: Katie had drawn a cottage with a little stream running next to it.
meanings.example_cn: 凯蒂画了一间小茅舍，旁边流淌着一条小溪。

meanings.example: It ushered in the new theater season.
meanings.example_cn: 它预示了新的戏剧旺季的来临。

meanings.example: Our office is above the hairdresser’s.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的办公室在理发店上面。

meanings.meaning_en: in a higher position than something else
meanings.example: He had a bruise just above his left eye.
meanings.example_cn: 就在他左眼上方有块瘀伤。

meanings.meaning_en: used to emphasize that something is more important or happens more with one particular thing than with others
meanings.example: I never liked long walks, especially in winter.
meanings.example_cn: 我向来不喜欢长距离散步，尤其在冬天。

meanings.meaning_en: in the middle of an area or an object
meanings.example: He lives in central London.
meanings.example_cn: 他住在伦敦市中心。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a formal request, usually written, for something such as a job, a place at a university, or permission to do something
meanings.example: We need to apply for planning permission to build a garage.
meanings.example_cn: 我们建车库需要申请规划许可。

meanings.meaning_en: fast
meanings.example: We need to get this finished as quickly as possible.
meanings.example_cn: 我们必须尽快完成此事。

meanings.meaning_en: Every is also an adjective
meanings.example: His every utterance will be scrutinized.
meanings.example_cn: 他说的每句话都会被细查。

meanings.meaning_en: achieving what you wanted, or having the effect or result you intended
meanings.example: The operation was successful.
meanings.example_cn: 手术成功了。

meanings.meaning_en: happening or doing something often
meanings.example: Trains rushed past at frequent intervals .
meanings.example_cn: 火车频频驶过。

meanings.meaning_en: to be all around someone or something on every side
meanings.example: He glared at the people who surrounded the tent.
meanings.example_cn: 他怒视着围住帐篷的那些人。

meanings.meaning_en: when you do a particular thing, often regularly, in order to improve your skill at it
meanings.example: It takes hours of practice to learn to play the guitar.
meanings.example_cn: 学习弹吉他需要长时间的练习。

meanings.meaning_en: if you introduce someone to another person, you tell them each other’s names for the first time
meanings.example: Have you two been introduced? Tom, this is Greg.
meanings.example_cn: 有人给你们俩互相介绍了吗？汤姆，这位是格雷格。

meanings.meaning_en: an aggressive disease spreads quickly in the body
meanings.example: an aggressive form of breast cancer
meanings.example_cn: 一种侵袭性乳腺癌

meanings.meaning_en: to do something in a particular way or for a particular reason
meanings.example: The company acted correctly in sacking him.
meanings.example_cn: 公司解雇他做得对。

meanings.meaning_en: one thing that you do
meanings.example: The jury decided that Walker had acted in self-defence.
meanings.example_cn: 陪审团裁定沃克的行为属于自卫。

meanings.example: She was domiciliated in Canada.
meanings.example_cn: 她在加拿大定居。

meanings.meaning_en: very great in degree
meanings.example: Extreme poverty still exists in many rural areas.
meanings.example_cn: 许多农村地区仍处于赤贫状态。

meanings.meaning_en: a situation, quality etc which is as great as it can possibly be – used especially when talking about two opposites
meanings.example: extreme cold
meanings.example_cn: 严寒

meanings.meaning_en: a set of questions, exercises, or practical activities to measure someone’s skill, ability, or knowledge
meanings.example: Did you get a good mark in the test?
meanings.example_cn: 你这次测验成绩好吗？

meanings.meaning_en: relating to ice and glaciers, or formed by glaciers
meanings.example: a glacial valley
meanings.example_cn: 冰川谷

meanings.meaning_en: if you sense something, you feel that it exists or is true, without being told or having proof
meanings.example: Perhaps he sensed your distrust.
meanings.example_cn: 也许他感觉到了你的不信任。

meanings.meaning_en: to put food in your mouth and chew and swallow it
meanings.example: Felix chatted cheerfully as he ate.
meanings.example_cn: 费利克斯一边吃一边兴奋地聊天。

meanings.meaning_en: only one
meanings.example: A single tree gave shade from the sun.
meanings.example_cn: 唯有一棵树遮阴。

meanings.meaning_en: how good or bad something is
meanings.example: Much of the land was of poor quality.
meanings.example_cn: 很多地的土质很差。

meanings.meaning_en: to give lessons in a school, college, or university, or to help someone learn about something by giving them information
meanings.example: She taught me fractions and counting.
meanings.example_cn: 他教我分数和计算。

meanings.meaning_en: a large mass of land surrounded by sea
meanings.example: the continents of Asia and Africa
meanings.example_cn: 亚洲及非洲大陆

meanings.meaning_en: a number of related events that happen again and again in the same order
meanings.example: a woman’s menstrual cycle
meanings.example_cn: 女性的月经周期

meanings.meaning_en: to travel by bicycle
A previous event or thing is one that happened or existed before the one that you are talking about
meanings.example: She has a teenage daughter from a previous marriage.
meanings.example_cn: 她有个出自前一次婚姻的十几岁的女儿。

meanings.meaning_en: in or from the north of a country or area
meanings.example: a man with a northern accent
meanings.example_cn: 带有北方口音的男子

meanings.meaning_en: if something separates two places or two things, it is between them so that they are not touching each other
meanings.example: Ed stepped in to separate the two dogs.
meanings.example_cn: 埃德上前把这两条狗分开。

meanings.meaning_en: the amount of money that you have to pay in order to buy, do, or produce something
meanings.example: I offered to pay the cost of the taxi.
meanings.example_cn: 我提出支付出租车费。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone suffer a lot or to lose something important
meanings.example: Insurance to cover the cost of a funeral is possible.
meanings.example_cn: 可以用保险支付葬礼费用。

meanings.meaning_en: something that helps you to be more successful than others, or the state of having this
meanings.example: Younger workers tend to be at an advantage (=  have an advantage  ) when applying for jobs.
meanings.example_cn: 年轻点的工人申请工作时往往处于优势地位。

meanings.example: It might be to your advantage (=  it might help you  ) to take a computer course of some kind.
meanings.example_cn: 上一门计算机课程可能对你有利。

meanings.meaning_en: a system or method for carrying passengers or goods from one place to another
meanings.example: The city needs to improve its public transportation (= buses, trains etc ) .
meanings.example_cn: 这座城市需要改善公共交通。

meanings.meaning_en: a fact or thing that someone finds out about, when it was not known about before
meanings.example: I felt I'd made an incredible discovery.
meanings.example_cn: 我感到自己有了一个惊人的发现。

meanings.meaning_en: a natural flow of water that moves across the land and is narrower than a river
meanings.example: There was a small stream at the end of the garden.
meanings.example_cn: 这个花园的尽头有一条小溪。

meanings.meaning_en: to flow quickly and in great amounts
to get something that you want, especially through your own effort, skill, or work
meanings.example: Evans was trying to obtain a false passport and other documents.
meanings.example_cn: 埃文斯当时正试图获取假护照和其他文件。

meanings.meaning_en: to know who someone is or what something is, because you have seen, heard, experienced, or learned about them in the past
meanings.example: I didn’t recognize you in your uniform.
meanings.example_cn: 你穿上制服我认不出你了。

meanings.meaning_en: the father or mother of a person or animal
meanings.example: Children under 14 should be accompanied by a parent.
meanings.example_cn: 14 岁以下儿童须由一位家长陪同。

meanings.meaning_en: an idea that is suggested as an explanation for something, but that has not yet been proved to be true
meanings.example: One hypothesis is that the victim fell asleep while driving.
meanings.example_cn: 一种假设是受害人开车时睡着了。

meanings.meaning_en: happening in or relating to the countryside, not the city
meanings.example: a rural setting
meanings.example_cn: 乡村环境

meanings.meaning_en: if a story, book, report etc concerns someone or something, it is about them
meanings.example: This study concerns couples’ expectations of marriage.
meanings.example_cn: 这项研究是关于夫妻对婚姻的期望。

meanings.meaning_en: to obtain something by finding it, asking for it, or paying for it
meanings.example: We need to get help quickly!
meanings.example_cn: 我们需要马上得到帮助！

meanings.meaning_en: a particular type of solid, liquid, or gas
meanings.example: The leaves were covered with a strange sticky substance.
meanings.example_cn: 树叶上覆着一层黏糊糊的怪东西。

meanings.meaning_en: existing or happening first, before other people or things
meanings.example: The land was returned to its original owner.
meanings.example_cn: 这块土地归还给了原主。

meanings.meaning_en: without problems or difficulties
meanings.example: They won quite easily.
meanings.example_cn: 他们赢得相当轻松。

meanings.meaning_en: a television station and all the programmes that it broadcasts
meanings.example: the news on Channel 4
meanings.example_cn: 第四频道播出的新闻

meanings.meaning_en: If something belongs to you, you own it
meanings.example: The house had belonged to her family for three or four generations.
meanings.example_cn: 这座房子属于她家已有三四代了。

meanings.meaning_en: the process of building things such as houses, bridges, roads etc
meanings.example: a road construction project
meanings.example_cn: 道路修建计划

meanings.meaning_en: to move yourself through water using your arms and legs
meanings.example: Let’s go swimming this afternoon.
meanings.example_cn: 今天下午我们游泳去吧。

meanings.meaning_en: in or from the south of a country or area
meanings.example: a southern accent
meanings.example_cn: 南部口音

meanings.meaning_en: used to say that you gain something from an action
meanings.example: It was a lot of hard work, but it was worth it .
meanings.example_cn: 虽然非常辛苦，但是值得。

meanings.meaning_en: an amount of something worth ten pounds, $500 etc
to organize or be in charge of an activity, business, organization, or country
meanings.example: For a while, she ran a restaurant in Boston.
meanings.example_cn: 有一段时间她在波士顿开餐馆。

meanings.meaning_en: to suggest that something is true, without saying this directly
meanings.example: an implied threat
meanings.example_cn: 隐含的威胁

meanings.meaning_en: forming the most important or most necessary part of something
meanings.example: the basic principles of chemistry
meanings.example_cn: 化学的基本原理

meanings.meaning_en: within a particular country
meanings.example: We have no interest in interfering in the internal affairs of other countries.
meanings.example_cn: 我们对干涉其他国家内政不感兴趣。

meanings.meaning_en: very high quality clear glass
meanings.example: a set of six crystal glasses
meanings.example_cn: 六件套水晶玻璃杯

meanings.meaning_en: the reasons you give for why something happened or why you did something
meanings.example: She told the court she would give a full explanation of the prosecution's decision on Monday.
meanings.example_cn: 她告诉法庭她将在星期一就控方的决定做出详尽的解释。

meanings.meaning_en: if an animal or plant evolves, it changes gradually over a long period of time
meanings.example: Animals have evolved camouflage to protect themselves from predators.
meanings.example_cn: 动物进化形成了伪装，以保护自身不被捕食性动物所捕食。

meanings.meaning_en: completely
meanings.example: I’m not a hundred percent sure where she lives.
meanings.example_cn: 我不能完全确定她住在哪里。

meanings.meaning_en: to do something that you were not doing before, and continue doing it
meanings.example: There’s so much to do. I don’t know where to start.
meanings.example_cn: 有那么多的事情要做，我都不知道从哪里开始。

meanings.meaning_en: to ask for something in an anxious or urgent way, because you want it very much
meanings.example: She begged and pleaded with them until they finally agreed.
meanings.example_cn: 她一再恳求，后来他们终于同意了。

meanings.meaning_en: happening or done very quickly and in a very short time
meanings.example: The patient made a rapid recovery.
meanings.example_cn: 病人迅速康复。

meanings.meaning_en: an amount of something that can be counted or measured
meanings.example: Your work has improved in quantity and quality this term.
meanings.example_cn: 这学期你的作业在完成数量和质量上都有提高。

meanings.meaning_en: to make the meaning of something clearer by giving examples
meanings.example: Let me give an example to illustrate the point.
meanings.example_cn: 让我举个例子来说明这一点。

meanings.meaning_en: to put or build something in a particular place
meanings.example: Large retail chains are usually only prepared to locate stores in areas of high population density.
meanings.example_cn: 大型零售连锁店一般只愿意开在人口密集的地区。

meanings.meaning_en: to take something away from, out of, or off the place where it is
meanings.example: Remove the old wallpaper and fill any holes in the walls.
meanings.example_cn: 撕下旧墙纸，把墙上的洞都填平。

meanings.meaning_en: having the usual features or qualities of a particular group or thing
meanings.example: typical British weather
meanings.example_cn: 典型的英国天气

meanings.meaning_en: a subject or situation that you have to think about or deal with
meanings.example: There are more important matters we need to discuss.
meanings.example_cn: 我们有更重要的事情需要讨论。

meanings.meaning_en: to be important, especially to be important to you, or to have an effect on what happens
something such as useful land, or minerals such as oil or coal, that exists in a country and can be used to increase its wealth
meanings.example: Canada’s vast mineral resources
meanings.example_cn: 加拿大丰富的矿产资源

meanings.meaning_en: in or from the east of a country or area
meanings.example: the eastern shore of the island
meanings.example_cn: 岛的东岸

meanings.meaning_en: one of two equal parts of something
meanings.example: Two halves make a whole.
meanings.example_cn: 两个一半构成一个整体。

meanings.meaning_en: when large numbers of people go to live in another area or country, especially in order to find work
meanings.example: What does this migration not do?
meanings.example_cn: 这种迁移不能做什么？

meanings.meaning_en: a period of time or process during which something happens
meanings.example: You must pass the examination to get credit for the course.
meanings.example_cn: 你必须通过考试才能获得那门课程的学分。

meanings.meaning_en: a particular day of the month or year, especially shown by a number
meanings.example: The date on the letter was 30th August 1962.
meanings.example_cn: 信上的日期是1962年8月30日。

meanings.example: What’s today’s date?
meanings.example_cn: 今天几号？

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to buy and sell wine, coal etc, or a small company that does this
meanings.example: He had a job with an Edinburgh wine merchant.
meanings.example_cn: 他在爱丁堡的一个葡萄酒商那里做过事。

meanings.meaning_en: the front part of your head, where your eyes, nose, and mouth are
meanings.example: She had a beautiful face.
meanings.example_cn: 她面容秀美。

meanings.meaning_en: if you face or are faced with a difficult situation, or if a difficult situation faces you, it is going to affect you and you must deal with it
meanings.example: Her face was white with fear.
meanings.example_cn: 她吓得脸煞白。

meanings.meaning_en: the area where the land meets the sea
meanings.example: We drove along the Pacific coast to Seattle.
meanings.example_cn: 我们沿着太平洋海岸驾车前往西雅图。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of equipment with moving parts that uses power such as electricity to do a particular job
meanings.example: Could you get me a coffee from the drinks machine ?
meanings.example_cn: 给我从自动饮料机里买一罐咖啡好吗？

meanings.meaning_en: to state that something is true, even though it has not been proved
meanings.example: I don’t claim to be a feminist, but I’d like to see more women in top jobs.
meanings.example_cn: 我不会自称是女权主义者，但我希望看到更多的女性担任高职。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to religion in general or to a particular religion
meanings.example: I don’t share her religious beliefs .
meanings.example_cn: 她的宗教信仰和我的不同。

meanings.example: One twentieth of the total output was exported.
meanings.example_cn: 产量中有二十分之一出口。

meanings.meaning_en: in every part of a particular area, place etc
meanings.example: a large organization with offices throughout the world
meanings.example_cn: 在世界各地都设有办事处的一家大型机构

meanings.meaning_en: Throughout is also an adverb
meanings.example: The disease spread rapidly throughout Europe.
meanings.example_cn: 疾病迅速在整个欧洲蔓延开来。

meanings.meaning_en: not ordinary or usual, but different in some way and often better or more important
meanings.example: a special place in the classroom for reading
meanings.example_cn: 教室里的阅读专区

meanings.meaning_en: used in the names of sports competitions or races in which the winner gets a silver plate …
meanings.example: This horse won the Galway Plate.
meanings.example_cn: 这匹马在戈尔韦银碟赛中获胜了。

meanings.meaning_en: a cut, hole, or other small sign of damage
meanings.example: What do those strange marks at the top mean?
meanings.example_cn: 顶端那些奇怪的记号是什么意思？

meanings.meaning_en: to write or draw on something, so that someone will notice what you have written
relating to the energy produced by splitting atoms or the weapons that use this energy
meanings.example: atomic power
meanings.example_cn: 核动力

meanings.meaning_en: very quickly and in a very short time
meanings.example: The disease was spreading more rapidly than expected.
meanings.example_cn: 疾病的蔓延比预期的要快。

meanings.meaning_en: the material that trees are made of
meanings.example: Put some more wood on the fire.
meanings.example_cn: 往火上再添些木柴。

meanings.meaning_en: the person who directs or controls a group, organization, country etc
meanings.example: the largest ever gathering of world leaders
meanings.example_cn: 全世界领导人史无前例的大聚会

meanings.meaning_en: uncontrolled flames, light, and heat that destroy and damage things
meanings.example: The warehouse was completely destroyed by fire.
meanings.example_cn: 仓库全给烧毁了。

meanings.meaning_en: to force someone to leave their job
meanings.example: Thirty people died in a fire in downtown Chicago.
meanings.example_cn: 30人死于芝加哥市中心的一场火灾。

meanings.meaning_en: used when you want to emphasize that you mean all of a group, period of time, amount etc
meanings.example: It was the worst day in my entire life.
meanings.example_cn: 那是我一生中最糟糕的一天。

meanings.meaning_en: a large area of flat dry land
meanings.example: The grassy plain gave way to an extensive swamp.
meanings.example_cn: 青草覆盖的平原被广阔的沼泽地所取代。

meanings.meaning_en: very clear, and easy to understand or recognize
meanings.example: the vast plains of central China
meanings.example_cn: 华中地区的广阔平原

meanings.meaning_en: to continue for a particular distance or over a particular area
meanings.example: We plan to extend the kitchen by six feet.
meanings.example_cn: 我们打算把厨房扩建六英尺。

meanings.meaning_en: if you have difficulty doing something, it is difficult for you to do
meanings.example: If you have any difficulties, give me a call.
meanings.example_cn: 如果你遇到困难，就给我打电话。

meanings.meaning_en: the hard central part of a fruit such as an apple
meanings.example: Remove the cores, and bake the apples for 40 minutes.
meanings.example_cn: 去除果心，然后把苹果烤40分钟。

meanings.meaning_en: not difficult to do, and not needing much effort
meanings.example: The test was easy.
meanings.example_cn: 考试很容易。

meanings.meaning_en: happening regularly or all the time
meanings.example: There was a constant stream of visitors to the house.
meanings.example_cn: 参观这幢房子的游客川流不息。

meanings.meaning_en: a fully-grown person, or one who is considered to be legally responsible for their actions
meanings.example: Some children find it difficult to talk to adults.
meanings.example_cn: 一些孩子觉得与大人很难谈得来。

meanings.example: My diet consisted almost exclusively of chocolate-covered cookies and glasses of milk.
meanings.example_cn: 我的饮食几乎只包含裹上巧克力的曲奇饼和一杯杯牛奶。

meanings.meaning_en: a  geometric  shape
meanings.example: A hexagon is a six-sided figure.
meanings.example_cn: 六边形是一种有六条边的几何图形。

meanings.meaning_en: to form a particular opinion after thinking about a situation
something that is cold has a low temperature
meanings.example: She splashed her face with cold water.
meanings.example_cn: 她往脸上泼冷水。

meanings.meaning_en: a common illness that makes it difficult to breathe through your nose and often makes your throat hurt
meanings.example: a blast of cold air
meanings.example_cn: 一股冷空气

meanings.meaning_en: the process of teaching and learning, usually at school, college, or university
meanings.example: She also hopes her children will get a good education.
meanings.example_cn: 她也希望她的孩子可以受到良好的教育。

meanings.meaning_en: a railway or the railway
meanings.example: The supplies were sent on the railroad.
meanings.example_cn: 补给经由铁路运送。

meanings.example: a railroad station
meanings.example_cn: 火车站

meanings.meaning_en: the whole system of rules that people in a particular country or area must obey
meanings.example: Elected officials ought to obey the law.
meanings.example_cn: 民选官员理应遵守法律。

meanings.meaning_en: not alike
meanings.example: Now I see that, unlike her, they were my positive models.
meanings.example_cn: 现在我知道了，那些人不像她，他们是我的正面的表率。

meanings.meaning_en: completely different from a particular person or thing
to become larger in size, number, or amount, or to make something become larger
meanings.example: Water expands as it freezes.
meanings.example_cn: 水结冰时会膨胀。

meanings.meaning_en: the organ inside your head that controls how you think, feel, and move
meanings.example: Messages from the brain are carried by the central nervous system.
meanings.example_cn: 大脑发出的信息是通过中枢神经系统传递的。

meanings.meaning_en: a chemical substance that exists in a pure form as diamonds,  graphite  etc, or in an impure form as coal, petrol etc. It is a chemical  element  : symbol C
meanings.example: I dread to think what the carbon footprint must be like of moving that coal but we have no choice.
meanings.example_cn: 我都不敢想象为了运这些煤产生了多少碳足迹，但我们没有选择。

meanings.meaning_en: to go or come back to a place where you were before
meanings.example: It was forty five minutes before she returned.
meanings.example_cn: 过了45分钟她才回来。

meanings.meaning_en: the smallest part of a living thing that can exist independently
meanings.example: cancer cells
meanings.example_cn: 癌细胞

meanings.meaning_en: used to show that a negative statement is also true about another thing or person, or to add a different negative statement about something or someone
meanings.example: I haven’t seen the movie and my brother hasn’t either (= he also has not seen it ).
meanings.example_cn: 我没看过这部电影，我弟弟也没看过。

meanings.example: ‘I can’t swim.’ ‘I can’t either.’
meanings.example_cn: “我不会游泳。”“我也不会。

meanings.meaning_en: a business organization that makes or sells goods or services
meanings.example: Which company do you work for?
meanings.example_cn: 你在哪家公司上班？

meanings.meaning_en: an area of grass, especially an area where the grass is kept cut short
meanings.example: I walked across the grass.
meanings.example_cn: 我走在草地上。

meanings.meaning_en: the part of a vehicle that produces power to make it move
meanings.example: Is the engine running smoothly?
meanings.example_cn: 发动机运转平稳吗？

meanings.meaning_en: something that helps a process to develop more quickly or more strongly
meanings.example: Tax cuts provided the stimulus which the slow economy needed.
meanings.example_cn: 减税为不景气的经济带来了其所需的刺激。

meanings.meaning_en: a unit for measuring time. There are 60 minutes in one hour, and 24 hours in one day.
meanings.example: The interview will last about two hours.
meanings.example_cn: 面试大概要持续两小时。

meanings.meaning_en: a set of instructions given to a computer to make it perform an operation
meanings.example: a word processing program
meanings.example_cn: 文字处理程序

meanings.meaning_en: to give a computer a set of instructions that it can use to perform a particular operation
to stop something from happening, or stop someone from doing something
meanings.example: The rules are intended to prevent accidents.
meanings.example_cn: 这些规定旨在预防事故。

meanings.meaning_en: during each hour etc
meanings.example: The park attracts four million visitors per year.
meanings.example_cn: 那座公园每年吸引400万游客。

meanings.meaning_en: to give something to someone in exchange for money
meanings.example: If you offer him another hundred, I think he’ll sell.
meanings.example_cn: 如果你再加一百元钱，我想他会卖的。

meanings.meaning_en: physical harm that is done to something or to a part of someone’s body, so that it is broken or injured
meanings.example: These chemicals have been found to cause serious environmental damage.
meanings.example_cn: 经发现，这些化学物质会造成严重的环境破坏。

meanings.meaning_en: different from what is usual or normal
meanings.example: an unusual feature
meanings.example_cn: 不寻常的特点

meanings.meaning_en: to be in a position in which your body is flat on the floor, on a bed etc
meanings.example: The dog was lying dead on the floor.
meanings.example_cn: 那只狗躺在地上死了。

meanings.meaning_en: an upright flat structure made of stone or brick, that divides one area from another or surrounds an area
meanings.example: the Great Wall of China
meanings.example_cn: 中国的长城

meanings.example: We climbed over the wall into the orchard.
meanings.example_cn: 我们翻墙进了果园。

meanings.meaning_en: an area of countryside or land of a particular type, used especially when talking about its appearance
meanings.example: the beauty of the New England landscape
meanings.example_cn: 新英格兰风光之美

meanings.meaning_en: to make a park, garden etc look attractive and interesting by changing its design, and by planting trees and bushes etc
a short spoken or written statement giving facts about a law case
meanings.example: The ACLU filed a brief (=  gave one to the court  ) opposing the decision.
meanings.example_cn: 美国公民自由联盟提交了辩护状反对这个判决。

meanings.meaning_en: continuing for a short time

meanings.example: When bad men combine,good men must associate.
meanings.example_cn: 当坏人朋比为奸时，好人应该联合起来。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who you work or do business with
someone who is a member etc of something, but who is at a lower level and has fewer rights
not seen or found very often, or not happening very often
meanings.example: This species of plant is becoming increasingly rare.
meanings.example_cn: 这种植物越来越罕见。

meanings.meaning_en: small and not very important or serious, especially when compared with other things
meanings.example: We have made some minor changes to the program.
meanings.example_cn: 我们对那个程序做了一些小改动。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who does skilled work, making things with their hands
meanings.example: That allowed England to harness the creative potential of its artisan classes in a way that no other country had managed before.
meanings.example_cn: 如此，使得英国得以在某种程度上利用本国工匠阶层创造性潜能产生巨大的能量，此为他国以前没有做到之事。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of rock or metal from space that has landed on Earth
meanings.example: I close the meteorite room and try the door across thecorridor.
meanings.example_cn: 我关上陨石房间的门，又打开了走廊对面的门。

meanings.meaning_en: to describe something correctly and thoroughly, and to say what standards, limits, qualities etc it has that make it different from other things
meanings.example: the ability to define clients’ needs
meanings.example_cn: 确定客户需求的能力

meanings.meaning_en: to make something slightly colder, or to become slightly colder
meanings.example: The air conditioning doesn’t seem to be cooling the room much.
meanings.example_cn: 这空调系统好像没怎么把房间变凉快。

meanings.meaning_en: a gas that has no colour or smell, is present in air, and is necessary for most animals and plants to live. It is a chemical element: symbol O
meanings.example: Carbon dioxide  consists of carbon and oxygen.
meanings.example_cn: 二氧化碳是由碳和氧组成的。

meanings.meaning_en: happening or done every day
meanings.example: daily flights to Miami
meanings.example_cn: 每日飞往迈阿密的航班

meanings.example: The giraffe ranges in Africa.
meanings.example_cn: 长颈鹿生长在非洲。

meanings.meaning_en: the process by which rock or soil is gradually destroyed by wind, rain, or the sea
meanings.example: the problem of soil erosion
meanings.example_cn: 水土流失的问题

meanings.meaning_en: to have a desire for something
meanings.example: I really want a drink.
meanings.example_cn: 我很想喝一杯。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is done as a reaction to something that has happened or been said
meanings.example: His immediate response was one of disbelief.
meanings.example_cn: 他的第一反应是不相信。

meanings.meaning_en: one of three equal parts of something
meanings.example: Divide it into thirds.
meanings.example_cn: 把它分成三等份。

meanings.meaning_en: a period of 10 years
meanings.example: We hope to have test flights in this decade.
meanings.example_cn: 我们希望在这十年进行试验飞行。

meanings.meaning_en: to say something in a strong way
meanings.example: The report emphasizes the importance of improving safety standards.
meanings.example_cn: 报告强调了改进安全标准的重要性。

meanings.meaning_en: a very young child who has not yet learned to speak or walk
meanings.example: The baby is crying.
meanings.example_cn: 宝宝在哭。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to or caused by a volcano
meanings.example: black volcanic sand
meanings.example_cn: 黑色的火山砂

meanings.meaning_en: a group such as a club or business that has formed for a particular purpose
meanings.example: The public expect high standards from any large organization.
meanings.example_cn: 公众对任何大型机构都期望很高。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to a country that controls and rules other countries, usually ones that are far away
meanings.example: the struggle against colonial rule
meanings.example_cn: 反抗殖民统治的斗争

meanings.meaning_en: to save something or someone from being harmed or destroyed
meanings.example: We must encourage the planting of new trees and preserve our existing woodlands.
meanings.example_cn: 我们必须鼓励栽种新树木，同时也要保护现有的林地。

meanings.meaning_en: a single feature, fact, or piece of information about something
meanings.example: This issue will be discussed in more detail in Chapter 5.
meanings.example_cn: 这个问题将在第五章里作更为详细的论述。

meanings.meaning_en: to list things or give all the facts or information about something
one of the hard parts that together form the frame of a human, animal, or fish body
meanings.example: The X-ray showed that the bone was broken in two places.
meanings.example_cn: X光检查显示有两处骨折。

meanings.meaning_en: the place where someone or something is, especially in relation to other objects and places
meanings.example: Our hotel was in a superb central position near St Mark’s Square.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的酒店处于极佳的中心位置，在圣马克广场附近。
