meanings.meaning_en: to carefully put something in a particular position
meanings.example: the strategic position (= useful or important position ) of Egypt in relation to the Arabian peninsula
meanings.example_cn: 埃及相对于阿拉伯半岛的战略位置

meanings.meaning_en: to keep someone or something safe from harm, damage, or illness
meanings.example: Are we doing enough to protect the environment?
meanings.example_cn: 我们在保护环境方面做得够吗？

meanings.example: However, after years of labor in their chosen field, they begin to hate their jobs.
meanings.example_cn: 然而，他们在选择的领域工作了几年后，便开始痛恨自己的工作。

meanings.meaning_en: a unit for measuring temperature. It can be shown as a symbol after a number. For example, 70° means 70 degrees.
meanings.example: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees.
meanings.example_cn: 把烘箱预热至425度。

meanings.meaning_en: a complete change in ways of thinking, methods of working etc
meanings.example: the French Revolution of 1789
meanings.example_cn: 1789年法国大革命

meanings.meaning_en: to look at written words and understand what they mean
meanings.example: I can’t read your writing.
meanings.example_cn: 我看不懂你写的东西。

meanings.meaning_en: if you are positive about things, you are hopeful and confident, and think about what is good in a situation rather than what is bad
meanings.example: the power of positive thinking
meanings.example_cn: 正向思考的力量

meanings.meaning_en: to be given something
meanings.example: All the children will receive a small gift.
meanings.example_cn: 每个孩子都会收到一份小礼物。

meanings.meaning_en: a way from one place to another
meanings.example: the most direct route home
meanings.example_cn: 最直接的回家路线

meanings.meaning_en: an image of a person or animal that is made in solid material such as stone or metal and is usually large
meanings.example: Churchill’s statue stands outside the parliament building.
meanings.example_cn: 丘吉尔的塑像矗立在议会大厦外。

meanings.example: The iris of the eye is photographed from up to one meter away.
meanings.example_cn: 眼睛的虹膜最远可在一公尺外的距离接受摄影。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to farming or gardening methods of growing food without using artificial chemicals, or produced or grown by these methods
meanings.example: Organic farming is better for the environment.
meanings.example_cn: 有机耕作对环境更有利。

meanings.meaning_en: easy to notice
meanings.example: The difference in quality was immediately apparent .
meanings.example_cn: 质量的差异显而易见。

meanings.meaning_en: the process of moving or the way that someone or something moves
meanings.example: Newton’s first law of motion
meanings.example_cn: 牛顿第一运动定律

meanings.meaning_en: used to refer to a person or group of people when speaking or writing to them
meanings.example: Hi, Kelly. How are you?
meanings.example_cn: 嗨，凯利，你好吗？

meanings.meaning_en: the way in which something is made up of different parts, things, or members
meanings.example: Some minerals have complex chemical compositions.
meanings.example_cn: 有些矿物的化学构成很复杂。

meanings.meaning_en: a particular time or state that something reaches as it grows or develops
meanings.example: We’re getting to the stage where we hardly ever go out together.
meanings.example_cn: 我们快要到几乎不一起外出的地步了。

meanings.meaning_en: to divide something or separate something from its main part, using scissors, a knife etc
meanings.example: Do you want me to cut the cake?
meanings.example_cn: 要我切蛋糕吗？

meanings.meaning_en: plants in general
meanings.example: Lefkas has an abundance of lush green vegetation.
meanings.example_cn: 莱夫卡斯有葱郁茂盛的植被。

meanings.meaning_en: the season after autumn and before spring, when the weather is coldest
meanings.example: Soon it will be winter.
meanings.example_cn: 很快要到冬天了。

meanings.meaning_en: to spend the winter somewhere
after a long time, or after a lot of things have happened
meanings.example: He eventually escaped and made his way back to England.
meanings.example_cn: 他终于逃脱并返回英格兰。

meanings.meaning_en: to show something that is usually covered or hidden
meanings.example: He lifted his T-shirt to expose a jagged scar across his chest.
meanings.example_cn: 他撩起T恤衫，露出横贯胸部的锯齿状伤疤。

meanings.meaning_en: one of a group of  reptile s  that lived millions of years ago
meanings.example: How then would this dinosaur have moved?
meanings.example_cn: 那么这种恐龙要如何移动呢？

meanings.meaning_en: books, plays, poems etc that people think are important and good
meanings.example: He has read many of the major works of literature.
meanings.example_cn: 他读过许多重要的文学作品。

meanings.meaning_en: a carefully planned piece of work to get information about something, to build something, to improve something etc
meanings.example: The project aims to provide an analysis of children’s emotions.
meanings.example_cn: 该计划旨在对儿童情绪作出分析。

meanings.meaning_en: to see someone by chance and talk to them
meanings.example: You’ll never guess who I met in town.
meanings.example_cn: 你绝对猜不出我在镇上碰到谁了。

meanings.meaning_en: an advantage, improvement, or help that you get from something
meanings.example: I never had the benefit of a university education.
meanings.example_cn: 我从未受过大学教育。

meanings.meaning_en: if you benefit from something, or it benefits you, it gives you an advantage, improves your life, or helps you in some way
meanings.example: The new credit cards will be of great benefit to our customers.
meanings.example_cn: 新信用卡将大大方便我们的客户。

meanings.meaning_en: used when talking about a choice you have to make or about something that is not certain
meanings.example: Maurice asked me whether I needed any help.
meanings.example_cn: 莫里斯问我是否需要帮助。

meanings.meaning_en: at a slow speed
meanings.example: He shook his head slowly.
meanings.example_cn: 他慢慢地摇了摇头。

meanings.meaning_en: an idea, action, feeling, or fact that someone thinks, does, says, or talks about, or that happens
meanings.example: People say things they don’t mean when they are angry.
meanings.example_cn: 人生气时就会口不择言。

meanings.meaning_en: on your face or relating to your face
meanings.example: Victor’s facial expression didn’t change.
meanings.example_cn: 维克托脸上的表情没有变化。

meanings.meaning_en: a substance that is not a solid or a gas, for example water or milk
meanings.example: Add a little more liquid to the sauce.
meanings.example_cn: 在酱汁中再加一点水。

meanings.meaning_en: in the form of a liquid instead of a gas or solid
belonging or relating to a particular society and its way of life
meanings.example: the very real historical and cultural differences between our two societies
meanings.example_cn: 我们两个社会之间非常现实的历史和文化差异

meanings.meaning_en: to be different from something in some way
meanings.example: The two systems differ in many respects.
meanings.example_cn: 这两个系统在许多方面不同。

meanings.example: Experts have differing views on the subject.
meanings.example_cn: 在这个问题上专家们意见不同。

meanings.meaning_en: not at any time, or not once
meanings.example: He’s never been to Australia.
meanings.example_cn: 他从未去过澳大利亚。

meanings.meaning_en: knowledge about the world, especially based on examining, testing, and proving facts
meanings.example: Many leading scientists do not consider that science can give absolutely reliable knowledge.
meanings.example_cn: 许多杰出科学家都不认为科学能够提供绝对可靠的知识。

meanings.meaning_en: to open something out or arrange a group of things so that they cover a flat surface
meanings.example: She spread a towel on the sand and lay on it.
meanings.example_cn: 她把一块浴巾铺在沙地上，然后躺在上面。

meanings.meaning_en: A Whig was a member of an American political party in the 19th century that wanted to limit the powers of the president
to give someone the courage or confidence to do something
meanings.example: I want to thank everyone who has encouraged and supported me.
meanings.example_cn: 我要感谢每一位鼓励和支持过我的人。

meanings.meaning_en: a set of large folded sheets of printed paper containing news, articles, pictures, advertisements etc which is sold daily or weekly
meanings.example: She had read about it in the newspapers.
meanings.example_cn: 关于这件事她已经在报纸上看到了。

meanings.meaning_en: a social event when a lot of people meet together to enjoy themselves by eating, drinking, dancing etc
meanings.example: We’re having a small party this evening to celebrate our wedding anniversary.
meanings.example_cn: 我们今晚有个小聚会，庆祝我们的结婚纪念日。

meanings.meaning_en: information or facts
meanings.example: The research involves collecting data from two random samples.
meanings.example_cn: 该项研究需要从两个随机样本里收集资料。

meanings.meaning_en: a hard black mineral which is dug out of the ground and burnt to produce heat
meanings.example: Put some coal on the fire.
meanings.example_cn: 往火里加点煤。

meanings.meaning_en: if you combine two or more different things, or if they combine, they begin to exist or work together
meanings.example: Diets are most effective when combined with exercise.
meanings.example_cn: 节食和锻炼相结合是最有效的。

meanings.meaning_en: when something happens, there is an event, especially one that is not planned
meanings.example: When did the accident happen?
meanings.example_cn: 事故什么时候发生的？

meanings.meaning_en: the number 5
meanings.example: There is also a golf course five miles away.
meanings.example_cn: 五英里外还有个高尔夫球场。

meanings.meaning_en: a set of printed pages that are held together in a cover so that you can read them
meanings.example: I’ve just started reading a book by Graham Greene.
meanings.example_cn: 我刚开始看格雷厄姆·格林写的一本书。

meanings.meaning_en: You use quite to indicate that something is the case to a fairly great extent
meanings.example: I felt quite bitter about it at the time.
meanings.example_cn: 当时我对此感到相当痛苦。

meanings.meaning_en: before now, or before a particular time
meanings.example: The design of the new house is similar to those that have already been built.
meanings.example_cn: 新房的设计与那些已建好的房子相似。

meanings.meaning_en: almost, but not quite or not completely
meanings.example: It took nearly two hours to get here.
meanings.example_cn: 到这里花了将近两小时。

meanings.meaning_en: to get things of the same type from different places and bring them together
meanings.example: After 25 years of collecting recipes, she has compiled them into a cookbook.
meanings.example_cn: 她搜集了25年食谱，把它们编成一本烹饪书。

meanings.meaning_en: a substance consisting of very small pieces of rocks and minerals, that forms beaches and deserts
meanings.example: a mixture of sand and cement
meanings.example_cn: 沙和水泥的混合物

meanings.meaning_en: food that tastes hot has a burning taste because it contains strong spices
meanings.example: a hot curry
meanings.example_cn: 一种辛辣的咖喱

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the Earth rather than to the moon or other  planets
meanings.example: ...terrestrial life forms.
meanings.example_cn: …地球上的生命形态。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the flat green parts of a plant that are joined to its stem or branches
meanings.example: a flowering bush with large shiny leaves
meanings.example_cn: 叶子大而油亮的开花灌木

meanings.meaning_en: the order that something happens or exists in, or the order it is supposed to happen or exist in
meanings.example: Be careful to perform the actions in the correct sequence .
meanings.example_cn: 注意要按正确的顺序来完成动作。

meanings.meaning_en: a large ball of burning gas in space that can be seen at night as a point of light in the sky
meanings.example: I lay on my back and looked up at the stars.
meanings.example_cn: 我仰卧着看天上的星星。

meanings.meaning_cn: 以星状物装饰,变成演员
meanings.example: The sky was filled with stars.
meanings.example_cn: 满天繁星。

meanings.meaning_en: a calculation of the value, size, amount etc of something made using the information that you have, which may not be complete
meanings.example: We just need an estimate of the number of people who will come.
meanings.example_cn: 我们只需估算一下有多少人会来。

meanings.meaning_en: a tool or machine used for making holes in something
meanings.example: an electric drill
meanings.example_cn: 电钻

meanings.meaning_en: to teach students, sports players etc by making them repeat the same lesson, exercise etc many times
meanings.example: a whine like a dentist’s drill
meanings.example_cn: 像牙钻发出的那种呜呜声

meanings.meaning_en: a system or method for carrying passengers or goods from one place to another
meanings.example: commuters who travel on public transport
meanings.example_cn: 乘坐公共交通车辆上下班的人

meanings.meaning_en: water that is below the ground
meanings.example: There are fears that groundwater might become contaminated.
meanings.example_cn: 有人担心地下水可能会遭污染。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to or involving more than one nation
meanings.example: the response of the international community
meanings.example_cn: 国际社会的反响

meanings.meaning_en: to help the customers in a shop, especially by bringing them the things that they want
meanings.example: There was only one girl serving customers .
meanings.example_cn: 只有一个女孩在接待顾客。

meanings.meaning_en: the part of a plant or tree that grows under the ground and gets water from the soil
meanings.example: tree roots
meanings.example_cn: 树根

meanings.meaning_en: to grow roots
meanings.example: These plants produce a number of thin roots.
meanings.example_cn: 这些植物会长出一些细根。

meanings.meaning_en: extremely large in size, amount, or degree
meanings.example: a huge dog
meanings.example_cn: 一条大狗

meanings.meaning_en: to move something to a particular place or position, especially using your hands
meanings.example: He put the coffee on the table.
meanings.example_cn: 他把咖啡放在桌上。

meanings.meaning_en: a very large animal that lives in the sea and looks like a fish, but is actually a mammal
meanings.example: The receding tide stranded the whale.
meanings.example_cn: 退潮把鲸鱼搁浅在海滩上。

meanings.example: So whale come out fish, because they are fish obviously.
meanings.example_cn: 所以鲸鱼就是鱼，因为他们显然是鱼。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of giving someone something and receiving something else from them
meanings.example: Four of my cassettes for your Madonna CD is a fair exchange.
meanings.example_cn: 我用四盒磁带换你的麦当娜激光唱片很公平。

meanings.meaning_en: all the animals and plants in a particular area, and the way in which they are related to each other and to their environment
meanings.example: ...the forest ecosystem.
meanings.example_cn: …森林生态系统。

meanings.meaning_en: the amount of space between two places or things
meanings.example: Measure the distance between the two points.
meanings.example_cn: 量出两点之间的距离。

meanings.meaning_en: to think that something is true, although you do not have definite proof
meanings.example: I think we can safely assume (=  it is almost certain  ) that interest rates will go up again soon.
meanings.example_cn: 我想我们几乎可以肯定，利率很快会再次上调。

meanings.meaning_en: a round object with a hard surface, that contains a baby bird, snake, insect etc and which is produced by a female bird, snake, insect etc
meanings.example: Blackbirds lay their eggs in March.
meanings.example_cn: 乌鸫在3月产蛋。

meanings.meaning_en: your ideas or beliefs about a particular subject
meanings.example: When choosing an insurance policy it’s best to get an independent opinion.
meanings.example_cn: 选择保险时，最好听听专家的独立意见。

meanings.meaning_en: a moral rule or belief about what is right and wrong, that influences how you behave
meanings.example: Schools try to teach children a set of principles.
meanings.example_cn: 学校设法教给孩子们一套道德准则。

meanings.meaning_en: affecting or including the whole world
meanings.example: global climate change
meanings.example_cn: 全球气候变化

meanings.meaning_en: to make something happen, especially something bad
meanings.example: Heavy traffic is causing delays on the freeway.
meanings.example_cn: 交通拥挤使高速公路通行不畅。

meanings.meaning_en: a person, event, or thing that makes something happen
meanings.example: The fire caused £15,000 worth of damage.
meanings.example_cn: 这场火灾造成了价值1.5万英镑的损失。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the two parts of the body that you use to see with
meanings.example: He’s got beautiful eyes.
meanings.example_cn: 他有一双漂亮的眼睛。

meanings.meaning_en: said or written at the beginning of a book, speech etc in order to explain what it is about
meanings.example: as the chairman said in his introductory remarks
meanings.example_cn: 正如主席在开场白中所说的

meanings.meaning_en: how heavy something is when you measure it
meanings.example: The average weight of a baby at birth is just over seven pounds.
meanings.example_cn: 婴儿的平均出生体重是七磅多一点。

meanings.meaning_en: If you weight something, you make it heavier by adding something to it, for example, in order to stop it from moving easily
meanings.example: It can be sewn into curtain hems to weight the curtain and so allow it to hang better.
meanings.example_cn: 可以把它缝在窗帘的摺边里以增加窗帘的重量，使之更有下垂感。

meanings.meaning_en: a difference between similar things, or a change from the usual amount or form of something
meanings.example: Most of his poems are variations on the theme of love.
meanings.example_cn: 他的大部分诗作都是有关爱情主题的形式不同的作品。

meanings.meaning_en: an object made out of stone, wood, clay etc by an artist
meanings.example: ...stone sculptures of figures and animals.
meanings.example_cn: …人物及动物石雕。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is studying at a university, school etc
meanings.example: He’s obviously an excellent student of human nature.
meanings.example_cn: 显然他对人性的研究很深入。

meanings.meaning_en: very small living things, some of which cause illness or disease
meanings.example: Is it possible to multiply bacteria in the laboratory?
meanings.example_cn: 有可能在实验室繁殖细菌吗?

meanings.meaning_en: when someone or something is present in a particular place
meanings.example: Your presence is requested at the club meeting on Friday.
meanings.example_cn: 敬请出席于周五举行的俱乐部会议。

meanings.meaning_en: to take something that someone offers you, or to agree to do something that someone asks you to do
meanings.example: Rick accepted her offer of coffee.
meanings.example_cn: 她请里克喝咖啡，他接受了。

meanings.meaning_en: to gradually get more and more money, possessions, knowledge etc over a period of time
meanings.example: It is unjust that a privileged few should continue to accumulate wealth.
meanings.example_cn: 少数特权阶级继续积聚财富，这是不公平的。

meanings.meaning_en: a country or area that is under the political control of a more powerful country, usually one that is far away
meanings.example: Algeria was formerly a French colony.
meanings.example_cn: 阿尔及利亚以前是法国的殖民地。

meanings.meaning_en: happening slowly over a long period of time
meanings.example: There has been a gradual change in climate.
meanings.example_cn: 气候渐渐发生了变化。

meanings.meaning_en: an amount of something that has been separated from the main part
meanings.example: Cut off a piece of wood 5 cm in length.
meanings.example_cn: 截下一段五厘米长的木头。

meanings.example: His trousers were held up with a piece of string.
meanings.example_cn: 他的裤子靠一根细绳系着。

meanings.meaning_en: a firm object or substance that has a fixed shape, not a gas or liquid
meanings.example: the properties of liquids and solids
meanings.example_cn: 液体和固体的特性

meanings.meaning_en: the process of doing something, especially in order to achieve a particular thing
meanings.example: The government must take action (=  do something  ) now to stop the rise in violent crime.
meanings.example_cn: 政府现在必须采取行动遏止暴力犯罪的上升。

meanings.meaning_en: the official system for providing something, especially something that everyone in a country needs to have, or the official organization that provides it
meanings.example: the health service
meanings.example_cn: 医疗保健服务

meanings.meaning_en: to provide people with something they need or want
meanings.example: the postal service
meanings.example_cn: 邮政服务

meanings.meaning_en: to damage something so badly that it no longer exists or cannot be used or repaired
meanings.example: companies that are polluting and destroying the environment
meanings.example_cn: 污染和破坏环境的公司

meanings.meaning_en: having a particular quality when compared with something else
meanings.example: The relative merits of both approaches have to be considered.
meanings.example_cn: 两种方法的相对优点都得考虑在内。

meanings.meaning_en: a member of your family
meanings.example: her opponent’s relative lack of experience
meanings.example_cn: 她的对手相对来说缺少经验

meanings.meaning_en: used by, involving, or relating to the army, navy, or airforce
meanings.example: a military helicopter
meanings.example_cn: 军用直升机

meanings.meaning_en: the military forces of a country
meanings.example: military equipment
meanings.example_cn: 军事设备

meanings.meaning_en: someone’s ability to remember things, places, experiences etc
meanings.example: He has lots of happy memories of his stay in Japan.
meanings.example_cn: 他对在日本逗留的那段时光有许多美好的回忆。

meanings.meaning_en: likely to develop into a particular type of person or thing in the future
meanings.example: The company has identified 60 potential customers.
meanings.example_cn: 该公司已确定了60位潜在的客户。

meanings.meaning_en: the possibility that something will develop in a particular way, or have a particular effect
a piece of paper, metal, or wood with words or a picture that gives people information, warnings, or instructions
meanings.example: a sign on the door
meanings.example_cn: 门上的标牌

meanings.example: {"COLLOINEXA":["road signs"]}
meanings.example_cn: 路标

meanings.meaning_en: the power that is carried by wires, cables etc, and is used to provide light or heat, to make machines work etc
meanings.example: The farm was very isolated, but it had electricity.
meanings.example_cn: 那个农场非常偏远，但有电力供应。

meanings.meaning_en: a chemical  compound  that contains two atoms of oxygen and one atom of another chemical  element
meanings.example: How much carbon dioxide you save, if any, depends on how far you live from work and how you get there, among other things.
meanings.example_cn: 如果真有的话，你可以节约多少二氧化碳？ 它取决于你住得有多远还是你如何完成目标抑或其他因素？

meanings.meaning_en: to do something to entertain people, for example by acting a play or playing a piece of music
meanings.example: Chenier and the band are performing at the Silver Palace tomorrow.
meanings.example_cn: 车尼尔和乐队明天将在银宫演出。

meanings.meaning_en: a combination of all the things that are happening and all the conditions that exist at a particular time in a particular place
meanings.example: I explained the situation to everyone.
meanings.example_cn: 我向大家介绍了一下情况。

meanings.meaning_en: the scientific idea that plants and animals develop and change gradually over a long period of time
meanings.example: the theory of evolution
meanings.example_cn: 进化论

meanings.meaning_en: in a short time from now, or a short time after something else happens
meanings.example: It will be dark soon.
meanings.example_cn: 天很快就要黑了。

meanings.meaning_en: if a container or place fills, or if you fill it, enough of something goes into it to make it full
meanings.example: He poured her a drink, then filled his own glass.
meanings.example_cn: 他给她倒了一杯，然后将自己的杯子斟满。

meanings.meaning_en: a strong building or group of buildings used by soldiers or an army for defending an important place
meanings.example: The fort flanked on a swamp.
meanings.example_cn: 堡垒侧面靠着沼泽。

meanings.meaning_en: the ideas, facts, or opinions that are contained in a speech, piece of writing, film, programme etc
meanings.example: The content of the media course includes scripting, editing and camera work.
meanings.example_cn: 大众传媒课程的内容包括稿件写作、剪辑和摄像操作。

meanings.meaning_en: to do or have something that is not what you really wanted, but is still satisfactory
when you achieve what you want or intend
meanings.example: The experiment was a big success.
meanings.example_cn: 实验非常成功。

meanings.meaning_en: a sound or action that you make in order to give information to someone or tell them to do something
meanings.example: At a prearranged signal the lights went out.
meanings.example_cn: 预定的信号一发出，灯就全灭了。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a sound or action in order to give information or tell someone to do something

meanings.meaning_cn: 一代人(或产品),产生,发生
meanings.meaning_en: all people of about the same age
meanings.example: Like most of my generation, I had never known a war.
meanings.example_cn: 和我们这一代的大多数人一样，我并没有经历过战争。

meanings.meaning_en: extremely large
meanings.example: The refugees come across the border in vast numbers.
meanings.example_cn: 大量难民涌过边境。

meanings.meaning_en: to use machines to make goods or materials, usually in large numbers or amounts
meanings.example: the company that manufactured the drug
meanings.example_cn: 生产这种药的公司

meanings.meaning_en: if one company or country competes with another, it tries to get people to buy its goods or servicesrather than those available from another company or country
meanings.example: He will be competing in the 100-metre race.
meanings.example_cn: 他将参加100米比赛。

meanings.meaning_en: if two things are linked, they are related in some way
meanings.example: Police think the murders are linked.
meanings.example_cn: 警方认为这些谋杀案互有关联。

meanings.meaning_en: a way in which two things or ideas are related to each other
the red liquid that your heart pumps around your body
meanings.example: Her body was found in a pool of blood.
meanings.example_cn: 她的尸体被发现倒在血泊之中。

meanings.example: Blood oozed from a cut on his forehead.
meanings.example_cn: 血从他额头的伤口里渗了出来。

meanings.meaning_en: related to business and the buying and selling of goods and services
meanings.example: Our top priorities must be profit and commercial growth.
meanings.example_cn: 我们必须把利润和贸易增长作为我们的第一要务。

meanings.meaning_en: to move towards or nearer to someone or something
meanings.example: As I approached the house, I noticed a light on upstairs.
meanings.example_cn: 我走近那幢房子的时候注意到楼上有灯光。

meanings.meaning_en: a method of doing something or dealing with a problem
meanings.example: She heard footsteps approaching.
meanings.example_cn: 她听到有脚步声走过来。

meanings.meaning_en: to say that something will happen, before it happens
meanings.example: Sales were five percent lower than predicted.
meanings.example_cn: 销售额比预期低5%。

meanings.meaning_en: the movement you make when you put one foot in front of or behind the other when walking
meanings.example: a video of baby’s first steps
meanings.example_cn: 一盒婴儿学步的录像带

meanings.meaning_en: to bring your foot down on something
meanings.example: He took one step and fell.
meanings.example_cn: 他走了一步就跌倒了。

meanings.meaning_en: to support yourself on your feet or be in an upright position
meanings.example: It looks like we’ll have to stand – there are no seats left.
meanings.example_cn: 看来我们只能站着——没有座位了。

meanings.meaning_en: to let someone go free, after having kept them somewhere
meanings.example: Police arrested several men, who were later released.
meanings.example_cn: 警察逮捕了几个人，后来都释放了。

meanings.meaning_en: something you have decided to do
meanings.example: His plan is to get a degree in economics and then work abroad for a year.
meanings.example_cn: 他计划先取得经济学学位，然后去国外工作一年。

meanings.meaning_en: to think carefully about something you want to do, and decide how and when you will do it
meanings.example: Do you have any plans for the weekend?
meanings.example_cn: 你周末有什么打算？

meanings.meaning_en: a small part or amount of something that is examined in order to find out something about the whole
meanings.example: They took a blood sample to test for hepatitis.
meanings.example_cn: 他们取了血样做肝炎化验。

meanings.meaning_en: when a company, business etc becomes larger by opening new shops, factories etc
meanings.example: The industry underwent a period of rapid expansion.
meanings.example_cn: 该产业经历了一轮快速扩张。

meanings.meaning_en: large in size, amount, or degree
meanings.example: The house stands in extensive grounds.
meanings.example_cn: 这栋房子占地面积很大。

meanings.meaning_en: to make known something that was previously secret or unknown
meanings.example: He may be prosecuted for revealing secrets about the security agency.
meanings.example_cn: 他可能因泄露安全部门的机密而被起诉。

meanings.meaning_en: a gas that is lighter than air and is used to make  balloons  float. It is a chemical  element  ：symbol He
meanings.example: We have a helium nucleus and one electron.
meanings.example_cn: 我们有一个氦核和一个电子。

meanings.meaning_en: happening every hour, every week, every month etc, usually with the same amount of time in between
meanings.example: The company holds regular meetings with employees.
meanings.example_cn: 公司定期召集雇员开会。

meanings.meaning_en: an attempt to do something, especially when this involves a lot of hard work or determination
meanings.example: please make an effort to be polite.
meanings.example_cn: 请尽量礼貌些。

meanings.meaning_en: a unit for measuring distance, equal to 1,760  yard s  or about 1,609 metres
meanings.example: It’s 40 miles from here to the Polish border.
meanings.example_cn: 从这里到波兰边界有40英里。

meanings.example: Rivers and lakes provide us with water transport and irrigation.
meanings.example_cn: 江河湖泽给我们以舟楫和灌溉之利。

meanings.example: You have to consider what to do next.
meanings.example_cn: 你必须考虑下一步该做什么。

meanings.example: Why should it be put off till next month?
meanings.example_cn: 为什么非要挨到下个月不可？

meanings.meaning_en: used to emphasize that something is real or exact
meanings.example: I’m not joking. Those were his actual words.
meanings.example_cn: 我没开玩笑，那都是他的原话。

meanings.meaning_en: The Egyptians are the people who come from Egypt
an act of trying to do something, especially something difficult
meanings.example: He made no attempt to hide his anger.
meanings.example_cn: 他毫不掩饰自己的愤怒。

meanings.meaning_en: after a long time
meanings.example: After several delays we finally took off at six o’clock.
meanings.example_cn: 几经耽搁后，我们终于在六点起飞了。

meanings.meaning_en: a serious situation, problem, accident etc is extremely bad or dangerous
meanings.example: the serious problem of unemployment
meanings.example_cn: 严重的失业问题

meanings.meaning_en: an instrument that shows what time it is, in a room or outside on a building
meanings.example: I heard the clock strike six (= make six loud sounds ) .
meanings.example_cn: 我听到钟敲了六下。

meanings.meaning_en: to gradually change your behaviour and attitudes in order to be successful in a new situation
meanings.example: The ability to adapt is a definite asset in this job.
meanings.example_cn: 适应能力是做这份工作的绝对有利条件。

meanings.meaning_en: the process of watching something or someone carefully for a period of time
meanings.example: He spent two nights under close observation in hospital.
meanings.example_cn: 他在医院接受了两个晚上的严密观察。

meanings.meaning_en: in good health
meanings.example: ‘How are you?’ ‘Fine, thanks, how are you?’
meanings.example_cn: “你好吗？”“很好，谢谢，你呢？”

meanings.example: Their wedding was marred by the death of Jenny’s mother a week earlier.
meanings.example_cn: 一周之前珍妮母亲的过世使他们的婚礼蒙上了一层阴影。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something less attractive or enjoyable
meanings.example: A frown marred his handsome features.
meanings.example_cn: 紧锁的眉头破坏了他俊美的面容。

meanings.meaning_en: to recognize and understand the difference between two or more things or people
meanings.example: Could he distinguish right from wrong?
meanings.example_cn: 他能辨别是非吗？

meanings.meaning_en: to become less or go down to a lower level, or to make something do this
meanings.example: The number of people who have the disease has decreased significantly in recent years.
meanings.example_cn: 近年来，这种病的患者人数明显下降。

meanings.meaning_en: people from the Netherlands
meanings.example: English, Dutch and German are cognate languages.
meanings.example_cn: 英语、荷兰语、德语是同语族的语言。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the Netherlands, its people, or its language
meanings.example: As a friend of the Dutch people, we feel truly happy for you and admire your achievements.
meanings.example_cn: 作为荷兰人民的朋友，我们对你们取得的成就感到由衷的钦佩和高兴。

meanings.meaning_en: someone from Africa
meanings.example: Fish is a staple in the diet of many Africans.
meanings.example_cn: 鱼是很多非洲人饮食中的主食。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to Africa or its people
containing a lot of something
meanings.example: Rich mineral deposits have been found in the sea bed.
meanings.example_cn: 海底发现有丰富的矿床。

meanings.meaning_en: The rich are rich people
meanings.example: Red meat is a rich source of iron.
meanings.example_cn: 红肉含有大量铁质。

meanings.meaning_en: considering only the bad qualities of a situation, person etc and not the good ones
meanings.example: students with a negative attitude to school
meanings.example_cn: 对上学抱消极态度的学生

meanings.meaning_en: a ship or large boat
meanings.example: a fishing vessel
meanings.example_cn: 渔船

meanings.meaning_en: one of the large groups of stars that make up the universe
meanings.example: Astronomers have discovered a distant galaxy.
meanings.example_cn: 天文学家们发现了一个遥远的星系。

meanings.meaning_en: to give special attention to one particular person or thing, or to make people do this
meanings.example: The focus of recent research has been on environmental issues.
meanings.example_cn: 近期的研究重点是环境问题。

meanings.meaning_en: the thing, person, situation etc that people pay special attention to
meanings.example: Eggs became the focus for the food poisoning scare.
meanings.example_cn: 鸡蛋成了食物中毒恐慌的焦点。

meanings.meaning_en: used to say what is not used, does not happen etc, when something else is used, happens etc
meanings.example: You probably picked up my keys instead of yours.
meanings.example_cn: 你可能没拿你的钥匙而错拿了我的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 民主主义者,美国民主党人
meanings.meaning_en: someone who believes in democracy, or works to achieve it
meanings.example: Murray has joined other Senate Democrats in blocking the legislation.
meanings.example_cn: 默里已经加入其他民主党参议员反对这项立法了。

meanings.meaning_en: In geology, an aquifer is an area of rock underneath the surface of the earth which absorbs and holds water
meanings.example: Know the source of your drinking water—the river, lake, or aquifer that supplies your home.
meanings.example_cn: 知道你的饮用水的来源——河流，湖泊或是你家的含水土层。

meanings.meaning_en: a specially prepared hard surface for cars, buses, bicycles etc to travel on
meanings.example: 65 Maple Road
meanings.example_cn: 枫树路65号

meanings.meaning_en: a business that keeps and lends money and provides other financial services
meanings.example: Barclays Bank
meanings.example_cn: 巴克莱银行

meanings.meaning_en: to put or keep money in a bank
meanings.example: a bank loan
meanings.example_cn: 银行贷款

meanings.meaning_en: to move slowly on water or in the air
meanings.example: Smoke drifted up from the jungle ahead of us.
meanings.example_cn: 我们前方的丛林里有烟升起。

meanings.meaning_en: when a famous person takes part in a film, concert, or other public event
meanings.example: It was his first public appearance since the election.
meanings.example_cn: 这是选举后他首次公开露面。

meanings.meaning_en: thin metal in the form of a thread, or a piece of this
meanings.example: copper wire
meanings.example_cn: 铜丝

meanings.meaning_en: to send money electronically
meanings.example: a wire fence
meanings.example_cn: 铁丝网

meanings.example: He transplanted his family to Australia.
meanings.example_cn: 他把家迁到澳大利亚。

meanings.meaning_en: the amount of money you have to pay for something
meanings.example: They may pay a high price for their few years of glory.
meanings.example_cn: 为了短短几年的辉煌，他们也许要付出高昂的代价。

meanings.meaning_en: to decide the price of something that is for sale
the part or surface of something that is furthest from the centre
meanings.example: ...the outside of the building.
meanings.example_cn: …该建筑物的外部。

meanings.meaning_en: the lowest part of something
meanings.example: The drugs had been hidden in a suitcase with a false bottom.
meanings.example_cn: 毒品藏在一个带假底板的行李箱里。

meanings.meaning_en: someone from Greece
meanings.example: I had to learn Greek.
meanings.example_cn: 我只好学希腊语。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to Greece, its people, or its language
If something declines, it becomes less in quantity, importance, or strength
meanings.example: The number of staff has declined from 217,000 to 114,000.
meanings.example_cn: 员工人数已从217000人减少到114000人。

meanings.meaning_en: the activity of making money by producing or buying and selling goods, or providing services
meanings.example: Students on the course learn about all aspects of business.
meanings.example_cn: 这门课程的学生要学习商业活动的各个方面。

meanings.meaning_en: an arrangement of things for people to look at or buy
meanings.example: a dazzling display (= very good display ) of flowers
meanings.example_cn: 令人目眩神迷的花卉展

meanings.meaning_en: happening or done at once and without delay
meanings.example: Our immediate response to the attack was sheer horror.
meanings.example_cn: 我们对攻击的第一反应就是非常惊恐。

meanings.meaning_en: a round hole in the ground made by something that has fallen on it or by an explosion
meanings.example: craters on the moon’s surface
meanings.example_cn: 月球表面的坑

meanings.meaning_en: to hit or fall against the surface of something
meanings.example: She fell heavily, striking her head against the side of the boat.
meanings.example_cn: 她重重地摔倒，头撞在船舷上。

meanings.meaning_en: to give food to a person or animal
meanings.example: Have you fed the cat?
meanings.example_cn: 你喂猫了吗？

meanings.meaning_en: the act of attacking a country, especially when that country has not attacked first
meanings.example: an unprovoked act of aggression
meanings.example_cn: 无端的侵犯

meanings.meaning_en: to learn a skill or a language so well that you have no difficulty with it
meanings.example: the skills needed to master a new language
meanings.example_cn: 掌握一门新语言所需的技能

meanings.meaning_en: to be in control of your own life or work
meanings.example: I never quite mastered the art of walking in high heels.
meanings.example_cn: 我一直学不会穿高跟鞋走路。

meanings.meaning_en: to appear or come out from somewhere
meanings.example: The flowers emerge in the spring.
meanings.example_cn: 花儿在春天开放。

meanings.meaning_en: a country, considered especially in relation to its people and its social or economic structure
meanings.example: the President’s radio broadcast to the nation
meanings.example_cn: 总统对全国的广播讲话

meanings.meaning_en: one of the pieces of flesh inside your body that you use in order to move, and that connect your bones together
meanings.example: Relax your stomach muscles , then stretch again.
meanings.example_cn: 放松腹部肌肉，然后再绷紧。

meanings.meaning_en: to make the necessary arrangements so that an activity can happen effectively
meanings.example: The course was organized by a training company.
meanings.example_cn: 这一课程是由一家培训公司组织的。

meanings.meaning_en: belonging or relating to one particular person, rather than to other people or to people in general
meanings.example: My personal view is that we shouldn’t offer him the job.
meanings.example_cn: 我个人认为我们不该给他这份工作。

meanings.meaning_en: used to tell someone to think about what they are doing so that something bad does not happen
meanings.example: Be careful - the floor’s slippery.
meanings.example_cn: 小心——地板很滑。

meanings.meaning_en: the possibility that someone or something will be harmed, destroyed, or killed
meanings.example: Danger! No boats beyond this point.
meanings.example_cn: 危险！船只不可越过此处。

meanings.meaning_en: the same in size, number, amount, value etc as something else
meanings.example: Two plus two equals four.
meanings.example_cn: 二加二等于四。

meanings.meaning_en: to be exactly the same in size, number, or amount as something else
meanings.example: Prices become more stable when supply equals demand.
meanings.example_cn: 供需相当时价格就变得较为稳定。

meanings.meaning_en: a strong hope or wish
meanings.example: The hotel has everything you could possibly desire .
meanings.example_cn: 这家酒店里你想要的东西应有尽有。

meanings.meaning_en: to arrange for a book, magazine etc to be written, printed, and sold
meanings.example: The first edition was published in 1765.
meanings.example_cn: 第一版于1765年出版。

meanings.meaning_en: to bravely accept or deal with a painful, difficult, or upsetting situation
meanings.example: She was afraid she wouldn’t be able to bear the pain.
meanings.example_cn: 她恐怕自己忍受不了这种痛苦。

meanings.meaning_en: complete, or as great as is possible
meanings.example: a total ban on cigarette advertising
meanings.example_cn: 香烟广告的全面禁止

meanings.meaning_en: the final number or amount of things, people etc when everything has been counted
meanings.example: He looked at her with a total lack of comprehension.
meanings.example_cn: 他一头雾水地望着她。

meanings.meaning_en: the particular combination of features and qualities that makes a thing or place different from all others
meanings.example: The financial concessions were of a precarious character.
meanings.example_cn: 财政优惠具有不稳定性。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the main periods into which a year is divided, each of which has a particular type of weather. The seasons are spring, summer, autumn, and winter
meanings.example: the effect on plants as the seasons start to change
meanings.example_cn: 换季对植物的影响

meanings.meaning_en: a  reptile  that lives mainly in water and has a soft body covered by a hard shell
meanings.example: ...a pet turtle.
meanings.example_cn: …一只宠物龟。

meanings.meaning_en: helping you to do or get what you want
meanings.example: useful information
meanings.example_cn: 有用的信息

meanings.meaning_en: to produce or cause something
meanings.example: a useful technique for generating new ideas
meanings.example_cn: 能产生新创意的有用技术

meanings.meaning_en: to take air into your lungs and send it out again
meanings.example: The room filled with smoke, and it was becoming difficult to breathe.
meanings.example_cn: 房间里全是烟，呼吸越来越困难。

meanings.meaning_en: a large open area with grass and trees, especially in a town, where people can walk, play games etc
meanings.example: Let’s go for a walk in the park.
meanings.example_cn: 我们去公园散步吧。

meanings.meaning_en: to put a car or other vehicle in a particular place for a period of time
meanings.example: a park bench
meanings.example_cn: 公园长椅

meanings.meaning_en: a chemical that is produced by people’s and animals’ bodies and is thought to influence the behaviour of other people or animals
meanings.example: As they groom themselves, the tears—and the pheromone—get spread around their bodies and nests.
meanings.example_cn: 随着他们刷洗全身，眼泪——还有信息素——就会散布到它们的全身和窝里。

meanings.meaning_en: to be typical of a person, place, or thing
meanings.example: Bright colours characterize his paintings.
meanings.example_cn: 明亮的色彩是他绘画作品的特点。

meanings.meaning_en: the fact of no longer having something, or of having less of it than you used to have, or the process by which this happens
meanings.example: The company is closing down two of its factories, leading to 430 job losses .
meanings.example_cn: 公司要关闭其中的两家工厂，这将造成430人失业。

meanings.meaning_cn: 付款,给予(注意等),付出代价
meanings.meaning_en: to give someone money for something you buy or for a service
meanings.example: How would you like to pay?
meanings.example_cn: 你想怎么付款？

meanings.meaning_en: money that you are given for doing your job
the fact of including many different types of people or things
meanings.example: ...the cultural diversity of Latin America.
meanings.example_cn: …拉丁美洲文化的多样性。

meanings.meaning_en: if you say or explain something simply, you say it in a way that is easy for people to understand
meanings.example: Try to express yourself more simply.
meanings.example_cn: 尽量把你的意思表达得更简单明了。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is real exists and is important
meanings.example: There is a real danger that the disease might spread.
meanings.example_cn: 这种疾病确实有蔓延的危险。

meanings.meaning_en: the condition of being steady and not changing
meanings.example: a period of relative stability
meanings.example_cn: 相对稳定的一段时期

meanings.meaning_en: a way of solving a problem or dealing with a difficult situation
meanings.example: The best solution would be for them to separate.
meanings.example_cn: 最好的解决方法是他们分开。

meanings.meaning_en: a period of time in history that is known for a particular event, or for particular qualities
meanings.example: His death marked the end of an era.
meanings.example_cn: 他的去世标志着一个时代的终结。

meanings.meaning_en: the most exciting or important part of a story or experience, which usually comes near the end
meanings.example: The festival reaches its climax with the traditional boat-burning ceremony.
meanings.example_cn: 传统的烧船仪式将节庆活动推向了高潮。

meanings.meaning_en: the level that is considered to be acceptable, or the level that someone or something has achieved
meanings.example: Students have to reach a certain standard or they won’t pass.
meanings.example_cn: 学生必须达到某一标准，否则无法通过。

meanings.meaning_en: accepted as normal or usual
meanings.example: The airline has rigorous safety standards.
meanings.example_cn: 这家航空公司有严格的安全标准。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of work that must be done, especially one that is difficult or unpleasant or that must be done regularly
meanings.example: Sara had the task of preparing the agenda for meetings.
meanings.example_cn: 萨拉的任务是准备会议议程。

meanings.meaning_en: to talk to someone about something
meanings.example: I was so shocked I couldn’t speak.
meanings.example_cn: 我震惊得说不出话来。

meanings.meaning_en: to change a situation, discussion etc by giving special attention to one idea or subject instead of to a previous one
more than what was agreed or expected
meanings.example: Additional information can be obtained from the centre.
meanings.example_cn: 可以从中心获取更多信息。

meanings.meaning_cn: 重要的,相当大的,可观的
meanings.meaning_en: fairly large, especially large enough to have an effect or be important
meanings.example: Michael has already spent considerable time in Barcelona.
meanings.example_cn: 迈克尔在巴塞罗那已经待了相当长的时间了。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to Britain or its people
meanings.example: the British government
meanings.example_cn: 英国政府

meanings.meaning_en: people from Britain
meanings.example: a British-born scientist
meanings.example_cn: 一名英国出生的科学家

meanings.example: Copper has been mined here since the sixteenth century.
meanings.example_cn: 从16世纪起这里就开始开采铜矿。

meanings.meaning_en: to dig large holes in the ground in order to remove coal, gold etc
meanings.example: This area has been mined for over 300 years.
meanings.example_cn: 这个地区采矿已经有300多年了。

meanings.example: He is also a geologist.
meanings.example_cn: 他也是一位地质学家。

meanings.meaning_en: to separate one person, group, or thing from other people or things
meanings.example: The town was isolated by the floods.
meanings.example_cn: 洪水使该镇与外界隔绝。

meanings.meaning_en: when you carefully listen to, look at, or think about someone or something
meanings.example: My attention wasn’t really on the game.
meanings.example_cn: 我的注意力其实不在比赛上。

meanings.meaning_en: one more time – used when something has happened or been done before
meanings.example: Can you say that again? I didn’t hear.
meanings.example_cn: 你能再说一遍吗？ 我没听见。

meanings.meaning_en: an official agreement or decision that ends an argument, a court case, or a fight, or the action of making an agreement
meanings.example: Union leaders and company bosses will meet tomorrow in an attempt to reach a settlement .
meanings.example_cn: 工会领导人和公司老板将于明天举行会议以期达成协议。

meanings.meaning_en: a large amount of money, property etc that a person or country owns
meanings.example: The country’s wealth comes from its oil.
meanings.example_cn: 这个国家的财富来自石油。

meanings.meaning_en: to show that something is true by providing facts, information etc
meanings.example: You’re wrong, and I can prove it.
meanings.example_cn: 你错了，我可以证明。

meanings.meaning_en: to successfully complete something or get a good result, especially by working hard
meanings.example: Frances achieved very good exam results.
meanings.example_cn: 弗朗西丝考试取得了优异成绩。

meanings.example: The first accurate census, I think, is in Copenhagen at the end of the eighteenth century.
meanings.example_cn: 我认为,第一次精确的人口普查,是在十八世纪末的哥本哈根

meanings.meaning_en: a chance to do something or an occasion when it is easy for you to do something
meanings.example: There are fewer opportunities for new graduates this year.
meanings.example_cn: 今年新毕业的大学生就业机会较少。

meanings.meaning_en: continuing to happen or exist without stopping
meanings.example: continuous economic growth
meanings.example_cn: 持续的经济增长

meanings.meaning_en: a coloured or white part that a plant or tree produces before fruit or seeds
meanings.example: a lovely rose bush with delicate pink flowers
meanings.example_cn: 一簇开着娇嫩的粉红色花朵的美丽蔷薇

meanings.meaning_en: to produce flowers
meanings.example: fields full of beautiful wild flowers
meanings.example_cn: 开满美丽野花的田野

meanings.meaning_en: a layer of rock or earth
meanings.example: people of different social strata
meanings.example_cn: 各个社会阶层的人

meanings.example: She had to battle snowstorms, landslides, snakes and loneliness on her 350 kilometer journey.
meanings.example_cn: 在350公里的行程中，她要克服暴风雪、滑坡、蛇和孤独寂寞。

meanings.meaning_en: material in the form of thin sheets that is used for writing on, wrapping things etc
meanings.example: I’ll get you a piece of paper so you can write the number down.
meanings.example_cn: 我给你找张纸，你好把号码写下来。

meanings.meaning_en: the colour of blood
meanings.example: I like the way the artist uses red in this painting.
meanings.example_cn: 我喜欢画家在这幅作品中对红色的运用。

meanings.meaning_en: to organize or make plans for something such as a meeting, party, or trip
meanings.example: Contact your local branch to arrange an appointment.
meanings.example_cn: 请联络当地分部安排预约。

meanings.meaning_en: If people promote something, they help or encourage it to happen, increase, or spread
meanings.example: You don't have to sacrifice environmental protection to promote economic growth.
meanings.example_cn: 你们没有必要牺牲环保来促进经济增长。

meanings.meaning_en: to like someone or something more than someone or something else, so that you would choose it if you could
meanings.example: This type of owl prefers a desert habitat.
meanings.example_cn: 这种猫头鹰更喜欢沙漠的生活环境。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the people who live in a particular place
meanings.example: a city of six million inhabitants
meanings.example_cn: 有600万居民的城市

meanings.meaning_en: the Mediterranean Sea
meanings.example: You have the choice of night fishing in the Mediterranean, or windsurfing on a lake in Switzerland.
meanings.example_cn: 你可选择在地中海夜间垂钓，或是在瑞士的湖上玩帆板。

meanings.meaning_en: a subject or problem that is often discussed or argued about, especially a social or political matter that affects the interests of a lot of people
meanings.example: Abortion is a highly controversial issue.
meanings.example_cn: 堕胎是个很有争议的话题。

meanings.meaning_en: a simple type of plant that has no leaves or flowers and that grows on plants or other surfaces.  mushrooms  and  mould  are both fungi.
meanings.example: It can be derived from plants, animals or other categories such as fungus or fermented products like alcohol.
meanings.example_cn: 它的来源来自植物、动物或者其他物质，例如真菌类或者像酒等发酵产品。

meanings.meaning_en: a process in which a doctor makes someone talk about their past experiences, relationships etc in order to help them with mental or emotional problems
meanings.example: She’s been in analysis for three years.
meanings.example_cn: 她接受精神分析治疗已经三年了。

meanings.meaning_en: a container with a handle and a small tube for pouring, used to make tea or coffee
meanings.example: Is there any tea left in the pot?
meanings.example_cn: 壶里还有茶吗？

meanings.meaning_en: a person who fulls cloth for his living
small in degree
meanings.example: a slight improvement
meanings.example_cn: 些许的改进

meanings.meaning_en: one of the 12 named periods of time that a year is divided into
meanings.example: I hope I’ll have finished the work by the end of the month .
meanings.example_cn: 我希望我这个月底能完成工作。

meanings.meaning_en: Hydrogen is a colourless gas that is the lightest and commonest element in the universe
meanings.example: Water contains hydrogen and oxygen.
meanings.example_cn: 水含有氢和氧。

meanings.meaning_en: how strong an emotion is or how serious a situation is
meanings.example: People need to realize the depth of the problem.
meanings.example_cn: 人们必须认识到这个问题的严重程度。

meanings.meaning_en: used to mean ‘on’ or ‘onto’
meanings.example: an honour bestowed upon the association
meanings.example_cn: 授予该协会的荣誉

meanings.meaning_en: something that is visible can be seen
meanings.example: The comet is visible to the naked eye (= can be seen without using special equipment ).
meanings.example_cn: 这颗彗星肉眼看得见。

meanings.meaning_en: the feeling that something is definitely true or definitely exists
meanings.example: When you get something wrong, it can shake your belief in yourself.
meanings.example_cn: 如果有什么事情没做好，就会动摇你对自己的信心。

meanings.meaning_en: the most important parts of something, to which more detail can be added later
meanings.example: We agreed on a skeleton outline of the proposal.
meanings.example_cn: 我们给提案商定了一个基本框架。

meanings.meaning_en: to take in liquid, gas, or another substance from the surface or space around something
meanings.example: Plants absorb nutrients from the soil.
meanings.example_cn: 植物从土壤中吸收养分。

meanings.meaning_en: to tell the public about a product or service in order to persuade them to buy it
meanings.example: They no longer advertise alcohol or cigarettes at sporting events.
meanings.example_cn: 他们不再在体育赛事上做烟酒广告了。

meanings.meaning_en: someone at a party, meal etc who has invited the guests and who provides the food, drink etc
meanings.example: Our host greeted us at the door.
meanings.example_cn: 主人在门口迎接我们。

meanings.meaning_en: to make it possible for someone to do something, or for something to happen
meanings.example: The new test should enable doctors to detect the disease early.
meanings.example_cn: 新的检验使医生能在早期发现该种疾病。

meanings.meaning_en: a round container attached to the wall in a bathroom, where you wash your hands and face
meanings.example: a wash basin
meanings.example_cn: 洗脸盆

meanings.meaning_en: what you earn by working and can use to buy things. Money can be in the form of notes and coins or cheques, and can be kept in a bank
meanings.example: Don’t spend all your money on the first day of your holiday!
meanings.example_cn: 别在度假的第一天就把钱都花完了！

meanings.meaning_en: to come together and form a group, or to make people do this
meanings.example: A crowd gathered to watch the fight.
meanings.example_cn: 一群人聚拢来围观打架。

meanings.meaning_en: information that a student writes down during a lesson, from a book etc
meanings.example: Can I borrow your lecture notes?
meanings.example_cn: 我能不能借用一下你的课堂笔记？

meanings.meaning_en: to notice or pay careful attention to something
to cover a place with water, or to become covered with water
meanings.example: Towns and cities all over the country have been flooded.
meanings.example_cn: 全国各地的城镇都被淹没了。

meanings.meaning_en: a very large amount of water that covers an area that is usually dry
meanings.example: The houses down by the river flood quite regularly.
meanings.example_cn: 沿河的房屋常遭水淹。

meanings.meaning_en: having the darkest colour, like coal or night
meanings.example: a black evening dress
meanings.example_cn: 黑色晚礼服

meanings.meaning_en: a member of the army of a country, especially someone who is not an officer
meanings.example: A British soldier was wounded in the fighting.
meanings.example_cn: 战斗中，有一名英国士兵受了伤。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to art or culture
meanings.example: artistic work
meanings.example_cn: 艺术作品

meanings.meaning_en: the hard outer part that covers and protects an egg, nut, or seed
meanings.example: Never buy eggs with cracked shells.
meanings.example_cn: 千万不要买破壳的蛋。

meanings.meaning_en: to fire shells from large guns at something
meanings.example: peanuts roasted in their shells
meanings.example_cn: 带壳的烤花生

meanings.meaning_en: one of the parts that something such as an object or place is divided into
meanings.example: The plane’s tail section was found in a cornfield.
meanings.example_cn: 飞机的尾部在玉米田里找到了。

meanings.meaning_en: of more than average size or amount
meanings.example: a big house
meanings.example_cn: 大房子

meanings.example: The recording device has activated.
meanings.example_cn: 录音装置已开动起来。

meanings.meaning_en: to stop doing something, discussing something, or continuing with something
meanings.example: The proposal was dropped after opposition from civil liberties groups.
meanings.example_cn: 遭到公民自由组织的反对后这一提案便被驳回了。

meanings.meaning_en: a reduction in the amount, level, or number of something, especially a large or sudden one
meanings.example: You can’t expect me to drop everything (= completely stop doing whatever I am doing ) whenever you’re in town.
meanings.example_cn: 你不能指望你一进城我就得放下手头的所有事情。

meanings.meaning_en: a gas that has no colour or smell, and that forms most of the Earth’s air. It is a chemical element: symbol N
meanings.example: Well, we know nitrogen has what?
meanings.example_cn: 对于氮气我们知道什么？

meanings.meaning_en: the feeling you have when something unexpected or unusual happens
meanings.example: The man had a look of surprise on his face.
meanings.example_cn: 那人脸上一副惊讶的表情。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone feel surprised
to completely change the appearance, form, or character of something or someone, especially in a way that improves it
meanings.example: Increased population has transformed the landscape.
meanings.example_cn: 人口的增加使景观发生了变化。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of electronic equipment shaped like a box with a screen, on which you can watch programmes
meanings.example: Lucy turned on the television to watch the evening news.
meanings.example_cn: 露西打开电视收看晚间新闻。

meanings.meaning_en: a group of musicians, especially a group that plays popular music
meanings.example: The band was playing old Beatles songs.
meanings.example_cn: 乐队正在演奏披头士的老歌。

meanings.meaning_en: to unite; assemble
meanings.example: I grew up playing in rock bands.
meanings.example_cn: 我是在摇滚乐队里玩音乐长大的。

meanings.meaning_en: as much as is needed for a particular purpose
meanings.example: We can only prosecute if there is sufficient evidence.
meanings.example_cn: 有了足够的证据，我们才能提出起诉。

meanings.meaning_en: for use by one person or group, not for everyone
meanings.example: Morris has a private jet.
meanings.example_cn: 莫里斯拥有一架私人喷气式飞机。

meanings.example: The European powers extended their authority in Asia.
meanings.example_cn: 欧洲列强在亚洲扩大他们的管辖权。

meanings.meaning_en: dry powder consisting of extremely small bits of earth or sand
meanings.example: The wind was blowing dust and leaves up from the ground.
meanings.example_cn: 风吹起了地上的尘土和树叶。

meanings.meaning_en: When you dust something such as furniture, you remove dust from it, usually using a cloth
meanings.example: A car sped past in a cloud of dust .
meanings.example_cn: 一辆汽车疾驰而过，扬起一片尘土。

meanings.meaning_en: the opinions and feelings that you usually have about something, especially when this is shown in your behaviour
meanings.example: As soon as they found out I was a doctor, their whole attitude changed.
meanings.example_cn: 他们一听说我是医生，态度就完全改变了。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who paints pictures
meanings.example: Gerry’s ambition was to become a portrait painter.
meanings.example_cn: 格里的志向是成为一名肖像画家。

meanings.meaning_en: if a woman gives birth, she produces a baby from her body
meanings.example: Patsy was celebrating last night after giving birth to twins.
meanings.example_cn: 帕齐生下一对双胞胎，昨天晚上在庆祝。

meanings.meaning_en: the language used in Britain, the US, Australia, and some other countries
meanings.example: Do you speak English?
meanings.example_cn: 你会说英语吗？

meanings.meaning_en: to have or express the same opinion about something as someone else
meanings.example: Teenagers and their parents rarely agree.
meanings.example_cn: 十几岁的孩子跟父母意见很少一致。

meanings.meaning_en: costing a lot of money
meanings.example: the most expensive restaurant in town
meanings.example_cn: 城里最贵的餐馆

meanings.meaning_en: worth a lot of money
meanings.example: a valuable painting
meanings.example_cn: 一幅名贵的画

meanings.meaning_en: an approximate number, amount, or time is close to the exact number, amount etc, but could be a little bit more or less than it
meanings.example: What is the approximate number of students in each class?
meanings.example_cn: 每个班大致有多少学生？

meanings.meaning_en: to be close to a particular number
meanings.example: These percentages are only approximate.
meanings.example_cn: 这些百分比仅仅是近似值。

meanings.meaning_en: a substance such as coal, gas, or oil that can be burned to produce heat or energy
meanings.example: Coal is one of the cheapest fuels.
meanings.example_cn: 煤是最廉价的燃料之一。

meanings.meaning_en: if you fuel a vehicle, or if it fuels up, fuel is put into it
the colour of the sky or the sea on a fine day
meanings.example: She nearly always dresses in blue.
meanings.example_cn: 她几乎总是穿蓝色的衣服。

meanings.meaning_en: having the colour of the sky or the sea on a fine day
meanings.example: the rich greens and blues of the tapestry
meanings.example_cn: 挂毯上浓艳的绿色和蓝色

meanings.meaning_en: relating to seeing
meanings.example: Artists translate their ideas into visual images.
meanings.example_cn: 画家把自己的思想转换成视觉画面。

meanings.meaning_en: a building or part of a building where you can buy things, food, or services
meanings.example: a barber’s shop
meanings.example_cn: 理发店

meanings.meaning_en: to go to one or more shops to buy things
meanings.example: a fish-and-chip shop
meanings.example_cn: 炸鱼薯条店

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone or something move by pressing them with your hands, arms etc
meanings.example: It didn’t move, so she pushed harder.
meanings.example_cn: 它一动不动，因此她加力去推。

meanings.meaning_en: to ask someone if they would like to have something, or to hold something out to them so that they can take it
meanings.example: A number of groups offer their services free of charge.
meanings.example_cn: 一些团体免费提供服务。

meanings.meaning_en: to have something such as clothes, shoes, or jewellery on your body
meanings.example: Susanna was wearing a black silk dress.
meanings.example_cn: 苏珊娜穿着一条黑色真丝连衣裙。

meanings.meaning_en: a substance you use to change the colour of your clothes, hair etc
meanings.example: hair dye
meanings.example_cn: 染发剂

meanings.meaning_en: to give something a different colour using a dye
to have a chance or no chance of being successful or continuing
meanings.example: Does this school have a future?
meanings.example_cn: 这所学校有前途吗？

meanings.meaning_en: to let someone have or use something that belongs to you
meanings.example: As a kid he’d never share his toys.
meanings.example_cn: 他小时候从不肯与人分享他的玩具。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who writes books, stories etc, especially as a job
meanings.example: She’s one of my favourite writers.
meanings.example_cn: 她是我最喜欢的作家之一。

meanings.meaning_en: to deliberately put or keep something or someone in a place where they cannot easily be seen or found
meanings.example: She keeps a bottle of gin hidden behind a stack of books.
meanings.example_cn: 她在一堆书的后面藏了一瓶杜松子酒。

meanings.meaning_en: an amount of money that you pay to do something or that you pay to a professional person for their work
meanings.example: You can use the gym and pool for a fee of £35 a month.
meanings.example_cn: 月付35英镑，即可使用健身房和游泳池。

meanings.meaning_en: if someone tells you something, they communicate information, a story, their feelings etc to you
meanings.example: I’ll tell you all about it when I get back.
meanings.example_cn: 我回来再告诉你这一切。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to real situations and events rather than ideas, emotions etc
meanings.example: Candidates should have training and practical experience in basic electronics.
meanings.example_cn: 应征者应该具备基础电子学方面的培训和实践经验。

meanings.meaning_en: a very small piece of matter with a negative electrical charge that moves around the nucleus(= central part ) of an atom
meanings.example: Most things are balanced - with equal numbers of electrons and protons.
meanings.example_cn: 大部分物体都是电荷平衡的——含等量的电子和质子。

meanings.meaning_en: a written list showing how much you have to pay for services you have received, work that has been done etc
meanings.example: Have you paid the phone bill?
meanings.example_cn: 电话费你付了吗？

meanings.meaning_en: to send someone a bill
a regular repeated pattern of sounds or movements
meanings.example: Drums are basic to African rhythm.
meanings.example_cn: 非洲音乐节奏少不了鼓。

meanings.meaning_en: a subject that people talk or write about
meanings.example: The environment is a popular topic these days.
meanings.example_cn: 如今环境是一个热门话题。

meanings.meaning_en: a ceremony that is always performed in the same way, in order to mark an important religious or social occasion
meanings.example: ancient pagan rituals
meanings.example_cn: 古老的异教仪式

meanings.meaning_en: the state of existing
meanings.example: Scientists have many theories about how the universe first came into existence (= started to exist ).
meanings.example_cn: 关于宇宙的起源，科学家有多种理论。

meanings.meaning_en: the season between winter and summer when leaves and flowers appear
meanings.example: spring flowers
meanings.example_cn: 春花

meanings.meaning_en: to move suddenly and quickly in a particular direction, especially by jumping
the process by which people exchange information or express their thoughts and feelings
meanings.example: Good communication is vital in a large organization.
meanings.example_cn: 在大机构里良好的沟通是极为重要的。

meanings.meaning_en: a powerful flash of light in the sky caused by electricity and usually followed by thunder
meanings.example: Two farmworkers were struck by lightning (= hit by lightning ).
meanings.example_cn: 两个农民遭闪电击中。

meanings.meaning_en: to join two or more things together
meanings.example: We’d like two rooms with connecting doors (= doors that join the rooms ) .
meanings.example_cn: 我们想要两个有门相通的房间。

meanings.meaning_en: people
meanings.example: I’m sure there are some folk who would rather they weren’t here.
meanings.example_cn: 我敢肯定有些人宁愿自己不在这里。

meanings.meaning_en: to prevent anything moving through a space by being or placing something across it or in it
meanings.example: A fallen tree is blocking the road.
meanings.example_cn: 一棵倒下的树把路阻断了。

meanings.meaning_en: a picture obtained by using a camera and film that is sensitive to light
meanings.example: a colour photograph
meanings.example_cn: 彩色照片

meanings.meaning_en: to take a photograph of someone or something
meanings.example: a black and white photograph
meanings.example_cn: 黑白照片

meanings.meaning_en: a very small town in the countryside
meanings.example: a little fishing village
meanings.example_cn: 一座小渔村

meanings.example: The dolphins disappeared beneath the waves.
meanings.example_cn: 海豚消失在波涛中。

meanings.meaning_en: in or to a lower position than something, or directly under something
meanings.example: Jo enjoyed feeling the warm sand beneath her feet.
meanings.example_cn: 乔很喜欢脚下踩着温暖沙子的感觉。

meanings.meaning_en: the top part of your body that has your face at the front and is supported by your neck
meanings.example: He kissed the top of her head.
meanings.example_cn: 他吻了一下她的头顶。

meanings.meaning_en: the state of continuing to live or exist
meanings.example: The doctors gave him a one in ten chance of survival .
meanings.example_cn: 医生说他有十分之一的生存希望。

meanings.meaning_en: an educational institution at the highest level, where you study for a degree
meanings.example: He teaches Esperanto at that university.
meanings.example_cn: 他在那所大学教世界语。

meanings.meaning_en: the ability to think about something carefully or for a long time
meanings.example: She needed all her powers of concentration to stop herself from slipping on the icy road.
meanings.example_cn: 她需要集中全部注意力才能不让自己在结冰的路上滑倒。

meanings.meaning_en: a useful machine, tool, instrument etc that has been invented
meanings.example: The dishwasher is a wonderful invention.
meanings.example_cn: 洗碗机是一项奇妙的发明。

meanings.meaning_en: an extinct type of animal or plant does not exist any more
meanings.example: Dinosaurs have been extinct for millions of years.
meanings.example_cn: 恐龙已灭绝数千万年了。

meanings.meaning_en: to prevent something bad from happening
meanings.example: Road safety is taught to young children to avoid road accidents.
meanings.example_cn: 小孩子受到道路安全知识的教育，以避免交通事故。

meanings.meaning_en: to make an object or pattern by cutting a piece of wood or stone
meanings.example: carved wooden chairs
meanings.example_cn: 木雕椅子

meanings.meaning_en: inside or indoors
meanings.example: The interior walls are all painted white.
meanings.example_cn: 室内墙壁都粉刷成了白色。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to electricity
meanings.example: The fire was caused by an electrical fault.
meanings.example_cn: 大火是电力故障引起的。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to a large mass of land
meanings.example: the warming-up of continental interiors
meanings.example_cn: 内陆地区的变暖

meanings.meaning_en: related to technology
meanings.example: The steam engine was the greatest technological advance of the 19th century.
meanings.example_cn: 蒸汽机是19世纪最伟大的技术进步。

meanings.meaning_en: a creature that looks like a human  skeleton  , used in paintings, stories etc to represent the fact that people die
meanings.example: 1.5 million people are in immediate danger of death from starvation.
meanings.example_cn: 150万人正因饥饿而即将面临死亡的危险。

meanings.meaning_en: a line of raised water that moves across the surface of the sea
meanings.example: Dee watched the waves breaking on the shore.
meanings.example_cn: 迪伊凝视着拍岸的波涛。

meanings.meaning_en: if you wave something, or if it waves, it moves from side to side
meanings.example: The ship tipped over, and finally vanished beneath the waves.
meanings.example_cn: 船倾覆了，最终沉没在海浪之下。

meanings.meaning_en: a loud sound and the energy produced by something such as a bomb bursting into small pieces
meanings.example: We heard a loud explosion.
meanings.example_cn: 我们听到一声巨大的爆炸声。

meanings.meaning_en: a system of lines, tubes, wires, roads etc that cross each other and are connected to each other
meanings.example: Hungary’s telephone network
meanings.example_cn: 匈牙利的电话网

meanings.meaning_en: the degree to which an area is filled with people or things
meanings.example: areas of high population density
meanings.example_cn: 人口密度高的地区

meanings.meaning_en: a journey in a plane or space vehicle, or the plane or vehicle that is making the journey
meanings.example: He immediately booked a flight to Toulouse.
meanings.example_cn: 他当即就订了去图卢兹的航班。

meanings.meaning_en: a period of time during which someone teaches a group of people, especially in a school
meanings.example: I missed Bible class last week.
meanings.example_cn: 上周我缺席了《圣经》课。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to money or the management of money
meanings.example: financial transactions
meanings.example_cn: 财务往来

meanings.meaning_en: the round object that you can see shining in the sky at night, and that moves around the Earth every 28 days
meanings.example: the craters on the surface of the moon
meanings.example_cn: 月球表面的环形山

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of soft thin paper, used especially for blowing your nose on
meanings.example: a box of tissues
meanings.example_cn: 一盒面巾纸

meanings.meaning_en: used to emphasize a statement or answer
meanings.example: The blood tests prove that Vince is indeed the father.
meanings.example_cn: 验血证明文斯确实是父亲。

meanings.meaning_en: to make plans or arrangements for something that will happen in the future
meanings.example: The prosecution wanted more time to prepare their case.
meanings.example_cn: 原告想要有更多的时间来准备诉讼。

meanings.meaning_en: cloth or thread made from the white hair of the cotton plant
meanings.example: a white cotton shirt
meanings.example_cn: 白色棉布衬衫

meanings.meaning_en: the hard brown outer surface of bread
meanings.example: sandwiches with the crusts cut off
meanings.example_cn: 切去边皮的三明治

meanings.meaning_en: to study or describe the history, development, or progress of something
meanings.example: Sondheim’s book traces the changing nature of the relationship between men and women.
meanings.example_cn: 桑德海姆的这本书研究了男女关系性质的变化。

meanings.meaning_en: a small sign that shows that someone or something was present or existed
when you discuss something
meanings.example: class discussions
meanings.example_cn: 课堂讨论

meanings.meaning_en: the flat surface that you stand on inside a building
meanings.example: a polished wooden floor
meanings.example_cn: 上过蜡的木地板

meanings.example: And remember nuts like almonds with their skins on have more fiber than those without.
meanings.example_cn: 记住，向杏仁那样有皮的坚果比那些没有皮的更富含纤维素。

meanings.meaning_en: Geological means relating to geology
meanings.example: With geological maps, books, and atlases you can find out all the proven sites of precious minerals.
meanings.example_cn: 有了地质地图、书籍和地图册，你就可以找到所有已探明的珍贵矿藏的位置。

meanings.meaning_en: to leave a place when someone is trying to catch you or stop you, or when there is a dangerous situation
meanings.example: He broke down the locked door and escaped.
meanings.example_cn: 他砸开上锁的门，逃走了。

meanings.meaning_en: made of or containing a lot of things or people that are very close together
meanings.example: a dense rurally-based population
meanings.example_cn: 居住在乡村的密集人口

meanings.meaning_en: to encourage or help an activity to begin or develop further
meanings.example: Her interest in art was stimulated by her father.
meanings.example_cn: 她对艺术的兴趣是她父亲激发的。

meanings.meaning_en: careful thought, or an idea or opinion based on this
meanings.example: A moment’s reflection will show the stupidity of this argument.
meanings.example_cn: 只需认真想一下便可看出这种观点多么愚蠢。

meanings.meaning_en: correct and true in every detail
meanings.example: The brochure tries to give a fair and accurate description of each hotel.
meanings.example_cn: 该手册尽量公正、准确地介绍每一家酒店。

meanings.meaning_en: all of something
meanings.example: You have your whole life ahead of you!
meanings.example_cn: 你有一辈子要过呢！

meanings.example: The commercial world is now being increasingly computerized.
meanings.example_cn: 商业界目前正在日益计算机化。

meanings.meaning_en: a particular place or area, especially a pleasant place where you spend time
meanings.example: a nice quiet spot on the beach
meanings.example_cn: 海滩上一个安静的好地方

meanings.meaning_en: to notice someone or something, especially when they are difficult to see or recognize
meanings.example: I chose a spot well away from the road.
meanings.example_cn: 我选了一个远离马路的地点。

meanings.meaning_en: the measurement of how long something is from one end to the other
meanings.example: We measured the length and width of the living room.
meanings.example_cn: 我们量了客厅的长和宽。

meanings.meaning_en: a picture, set of words, or a short film, which is intended to persuade people to buy a product or use a service, or that gives information about a job that is available, an event that is going to happen etc
meanings.example: They put an advertisement in ‘The Morning News’, offering a high salary for the right person.
meanings.example_cn: 他们在《晨报》上刊登了一则启事，出高薪寻找合适的人选。

meanings.meaning_en: the highest part of something
meanings.example: I waited at the top of the stairs.
meanings.example_cn: 我在楼梯顶端上等着。

meanings.meaning_en: coming from or existing in the hottest parts of the world
meanings.example: the tropical rain forests
meanings.example_cn: 热带雨林

meanings.meaning_en: if someone or something is efficient, they work well without wasting time, money, or energy
meanings.example: a very efficient secretary
meanings.example_cn: 效率高的秘书

meanings.meaning_en: a chemical or food that provides what is needed for plants or animals to live and grow
meanings.example: The plant absorbs nutrients from the soil.
meanings.example_cn: 植物从土壤中吸取养分。

meanings.meaning_en: the number 10
meanings.example: Snow had been falling steadily for ten days.
meanings.example_cn: 雪已经连续下了10天了。

meanings.example: And some farming systems, such as traditional pastoralist systems, are frequently under-represented, say the authors.
meanings.example_cn: 这组作者说，而且一些农业系统——诸如传统的畜牧系统——常常未被充分代表。

meanings.example: In World War Ⅱ,Britain fought against Germany.
meanings.example_cn: 第二次世界大战中，英国对德国作战。

meanings.meaning_en: to try to find someone or something by looking very carefully
meanings.example: It was too dark to search further.
meanings.example_cn: 天太暗，无法继续寻找。

meanings.meaning_en: a large turtle, Dermochelys coriacea, of warm and tropical seas, having a ridged leathery carapace: family Dermochelidae
meanings.example: Watch out of Venezuela on the critically endangered leatherback turtles.
meanings.example_cn: 请关注委内瑞拉极度濒危的棱皮龟。

meanings.meaning_en: the real or imaginary line that marks the edge of a state, country etc, or the edge of an area of land that belongs to someone
meanings.example: National boundaries are becoming increasingly meaningless in the global economy.
meanings.example_cn: 在全球经济中，国界已经变得越来越没有意义。

meanings.meaning_en: the space above the earth where clouds and the sun and stars appear
meanings.example: The sky grew dark, and a cold rain began to fall.
meanings.example_cn: 天色转暗，开始下起冰冷的雨来。

meanings.meaning_en: strong metal that can be shaped easily, consisting of iron and  carbon
meanings.example: a steel bridge
meanings.example_cn: 钢铁大桥

meanings.meaning_en: if something is thick, there is a large distance or a larger distance than usual between its two opposite surfaces or sides
meanings.example: a thick oak door
meanings.example_cn: 一扇厚实的橡木门

meanings.meaning_en: to not succeed in achieving something
meanings.example: It looks likely that the peace talks will fail.
meanings.example_cn: 看来和平谈判可能会失败。

meanings.example: They underlaid the Atlantic with a cable.
meanings.example_cn: 他们在大西洋海底铺设了一条电缆。

meanings.example: The Straits of Gibraltar are the strategic passage between the Mediterranean and the Atlantic.
meanings.example_cn: 直布罗陀海峡是地中海通向大西洋的咽喉。

meanings.meaning_en: an electronic machine that stores information and uses programs to help you find, organize, or change the information
meanings.example: a huge global computer network
meanings.example_cn: 巨大的全球计算机网络

meanings.meaning_en: something that grows on a plant, tree, or bush, can be eaten as a food, contains seeds or a stone, and is usually sweet
meanings.example: Try to eat plenty of fresh fruit .
meanings.example_cn: 尽量多吃新鲜水果。

meanings.meaning_en: a nervous worried feeling that makes it impossible for you to relax
meanings.example: The tension was becoming unbearable, and I wanted to scream.
meanings.example_cn: 这种紧张变得难以忍受，我真想大声尖叫。

meanings.meaning_en: when someone performs a play or a piece of music
meanings.example: This evening’s performance will begin at 8.00 pm.
meanings.example_cn: 今晚的演出8点开始。

meanings.meaning_en: a group of people who come to watch and listen to someone speaking or performing in public
meanings.example: The audience began clapping and cheering.
meanings.example_cn: 观众开始鼓掌欢呼。

meanings.example: We all believe in good,free education for our children.
meanings.example_cn: 我们都相信对我们孩子们的良好的、自由的教育。

meanings.meaning_en: to allow someone to leave prison or somewhere they have been kept as a prisoner
a state of disagreement or argument between people, groups, countries etc
meanings.example: the threat of industrial conflict in the coalfields
meanings.example_cn: 煤田发生劳资纠纷的风险

meanings.meaning_en: if two ideas, beliefs, opinions etc conflict, they cannot exist together or both be true
meanings.example: Marx points out the potential conflicts below the surface of society.
meanings.example_cn: 马克思指出了隐藏在社会表层之下的潜在矛盾。

meanings.meaning_en: if a liquid or something wet freezes or is frozen, it becomes hard and solid because the temperature is very cold
meanings.example: The lake had frozen overnight.
meanings.example_cn: 湖上一夜之间就结了冰。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the weather in a particular area
meanings.example: climatic conditions
meanings.example_cn: 气候情况

meanings.meaning_en: relating to music or consisting of music
meanings.example: a musical version of the fairy tale ‘Cinderella’
meanings.example_cn: 童话故事《灰姑娘》的音乐剧版

meanings.meaning_en: someone or something that is familiar is well-known to you and easy to recognize
meanings.example: a familiar tune
meanings.example_cn: 熟悉的曲调

meanings.meaning_en: people from China
meanings.example: Do you fancy going out for a Chinese?
meanings.example_cn: 你想不想出去吃顿中餐？

meanings.meaning_en: a long flat narrow board attached to a wall or in a frame or cupboard, used for putting things on
meanings.example: shelves of books
meanings.example_cn: 一层层书架的书

meanings.meaning_en: to travel by plane
meanings.example: She’s flying back to the States tomorrow.
meanings.example_cn: 她明天乘飞机回美国。

meanings.meaning_en: a small flying insect with two wings
meanings.example: Will you take the train there or fly?
meanings.example_cn: 你去那里是坐火车还是坐飞机？

meanings.meaning_en: a scientific instrument that makes extremely small things look larger
meanings.example: The slightest movement will defocus the microscope.
meanings.example_cn: 最轻微的运动都会使显微镜散焦。
