meanings.meaning_en: the limits of what is possible or acceptable

meanings.example: Like I said, perfect, if you live in Alaska.
meanings.example_cn: 像我说过的，完美，如果你住在阿拉斯加的话。

meanings.meaning_en: the words that come just before and after a word or sentence and that help you understand its meaning
meanings.example: The meaning of ‘mad’ depends on its context. mad
meanings.example_cn: 一词的意义要视上下文而定。

meanings.meaning_en: not having any mistakes, faults, or damage
meanings.example: His English was perfect.
meanings.example_cn: 他的英语很地道。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something as good as you are able to
meanings.example: The car was in perfect condition.
meanings.example_cn: 这辆车的车况极佳。

meanings.meaning_en: a period of 1,000 years
meanings.example: people who have inhabited this land for millennia
meanings.example_cn: 在这片土地上已经居住了数千年的人们

meanings.meaning_en: more than a little but not very
meanings.example: Things have changed somewhat since then.
meanings.example_cn: 从那时候起，情况就有些不一样了。

meanings.meaning_en: China is a hard white substance made from clay. It is used to make things such as cups, bowls, plates, and ornaments.
meanings.example: ...a small bowl made of china.
meanings.example_cn: …一个小瓷碗。

meanings.example: These favorable anticipations have been realized.
meanings.example_cn: 这些有利的期望已被实现。

meanings.meaning_en: a road, river, or part of someone’s body etc that is broad is wide
meanings.example: We went along a broad passage.
meanings.example_cn: 我们走在一条宽阔的走廊上。

meanings.meaning_en: the possibility that something bad, unpleasant, or dangerous may happen
meanings.example: It was a risk, sending a letter to my house.
meanings.example_cn: 将信寄到我家是冒险。

meanings.example: The kinetoscope, which could only be viewed by one person at a time, was soon replaced by screen projectors , which showed the movie to a whole room of people at once.
meanings.example_cn: 电影放映机一开始一次只能有一个观众，不过后来很快就被投影机所取代，这部机器可以让一屋子的人一起欣赏电影。

meanings.meaning_cn: 不在, 缺席, 缺乏, 没有
meanings.meaning_en: when you are not in the place where people expect you to be, or the time that you are away
meanings.example: In the absence of any evidence, the police had to let Myers go.
meanings.example_cn: 警察没有证据，只好把迈尔斯放了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 代表 a典型的, 有代表性的
meanings.meaning_en: someone who has been chosen to speak, vote, or make decisions for someone else
meanings.example: a union representative
meanings.example_cn: 工会代表

meanings.meaning_en: if you enlarge something, or if it enlarges, it increases in size or scale
meanings.example: an operation to enlarge her breasts
meanings.example_cn: 她的丰胸手术

meanings.meaning_en: a group of people or things that are all of the same type
meanings.example: people in the over-45 age category
meanings.example_cn: 属45岁以上年龄组的人

meanings.meaning_en: the quality of being felt very strongly or having a strong effect
meanings.example: The intensity of the hurricane was frightening.
meanings.example_cn: 飓风的猛烈程度令人恐惧。

meanings.meaning_en: to leave someone, especially someone you are responsible for
meanings.example: How could she abandon her own child?
meanings.example_cn: 她怎么能抛弃自己的孩子？

meanings.meaning_en: a connection between two or more things
meanings.example: The price the meat is sold for bears no relation to (= is not connected to ) the price the farmer receives.
meanings.example_cn: 肉的售价和农民拿到的价格无关。

meanings.meaning_en: a very small living thing that causes infectious illnesses
meanings.example: children infected with the Aids virus
meanings.example_cn: 感染艾滋病病毒的儿童

meanings.meaning_en: a show of paintings, photographs, or other objects that people can go to see
meanings.example: I’ve never seen such an exhibition of jealousy.
meanings.example_cn: 我从未见过如此嫉妒的表现。

meanings.meaning_en: to change, or to make someone or something change
meanings.example: Her face hadn’t altered much over the years.
meanings.example_cn: 过了这么多年，她的容貌并没有多大改变。

meanings.meaning_en: an ancient story, especially one invented in order to explain natural or historical events
meanings.example: a book of Greek myths
meanings.example_cn: 一本关于希腊神话的图书

meanings.meaning_en: arid land or an arid  climate  is very dry because it has very little rain
meanings.example: Water from the Great Lakes is pumped to arid regions .
meanings.example_cn: 五大湖中的水被输往干旱地区。

meanings.meaning_en: if the weather erodes rock or soil, or if rock or soil erodes, its surface is gradually destroyed
meanings.example: The cliffs are being constantly eroded by heavy seas.
meanings.example_cn: 悬崖正不断受到汹涌海浪的侵蚀。

meanings.meaning_en: connected with acting or plays
meanings.example: the amateur dramatic society
meanings.example_cn: 业余剧团

meanings.meaning_en: if a problem or difficult situation arises, it begins to happen
meanings.example: A crisis has arisen in the Foreign Office.
meanings.example_cn: 外交部出现了危机。

meanings.meaning_en: if a vehicle or its driver reverses, they go backwards
meanings.example: Reverse the paper in the printer.
meanings.example_cn: 把打印机中的纸翻过来。

meanings.meaning_en: the amount of space a container, room etc has to hold things or people
meanings.example: The room had seating capacity for about 80.
meanings.example_cn: 这房间能坐80个人左右。

meanings.meaning_en: a person, team, company etc that is competing with another
meanings.example: Last year they sold twice as many computers as their competitors.
meanings.example_cn: 去年他们的计算机销量是竞争对手的两倍。

meanings.meaning_en: to tell someone that you will definitely do or provide something or that something will happen
meanings.example: Last night the headmaster promised a full investigation.
meanings.example_cn: 校长昨晚允诺进行全面调查。

meanings.meaning_en: made of wood
meanings.example: a wooden bench
meanings.example_cn: 木制长椅

meanings.meaning_en: to describe or show someone or something in a particular way, according to your opinion of them
meanings.example: Romantic artists portrayed nature as wild and powerful.
meanings.example_cn: 浪漫主义艺术家描绘的大自然是狂野而强大的。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who writes music
meanings.example: ...music by Strauss, Mozart, Beethoven, and other great composers.
meanings.example_cn: …施特劳斯、莫扎特、贝多芬及其他伟大作曲家创作的音乐。

meanings.meaning_en: a long thin piece of wood, plastic etc that you use for a particular purpose
meanings.example: a pair of drum sticks
meanings.example_cn: 一对鼓槌

meanings.meaning_en: if a pointed object sticks into something, or if you stick it there, it is pushed into it
meanings.example: a measuring stick
meanings.example_cn: 量尺

meanings.meaning_en: the process in which land is covered by glaciers, or the effect this process has
meanings.example: These changes alter the intensity of sunlight hitting the Earth at high latitudes, and so affect the extent of glaciation.
meanings.example_cn: 这些变化改变了高纬度区域的日照强度，由此影响了冰河作用的范围。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the two long parts of your body between your shoulders and your hands
meanings.example: Dave has a broken arm .
meanings.example_cn: 戴夫手臂断了。

meanings.meaning_en: to provide weapons for yourself, an army, a country etc in order to prepare for a fight or a war
meanings.example: Tim’s mother put her arms around him.
meanings.example_cn: 蒂姆的母亲伸出双臂搂着他。

meanings.meaning_en: to move from one place, school, job etc to another, or to make someone do this, especially within the same organization
meanings.example: He was transferred for a fee of £8 million.
meanings.example_cn: 他以800万英镑的转会费转到了其他球队。

meanings.meaning_en: a structure with a curved top and straight sides that supports the weight of a bridge or building
meanings.example: When she passed under the arch leading out of the park, Mira whooped with delight.
meanings.example_cn: 从通向公园外的拱门下走过时，米拉高兴地喊叫起来。

meanings.meaning_en: a statement about what you think is going to happen, or the act of making this statement
meanings.example: The data can be used to make useful economic predictions .
meanings.example_cn: 这些数据可用于进行有用的经济预测。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of plastic, metal, or paper in which designs or letters have been cut out, that you put over a surface and paint over, so that the design is left on the surface
meanings.example: He then stencilled the ceiling with a moon and stars motif.
meanings.example_cn: 他接着用模版在天花板印上月亮和星星图案。

meanings.meaning_en: having a special quality, character, or appearance that is different and easy to recognize
meanings.example: a rock band with a distinctive sound
meanings.example_cn: 音色独特的摇滚乐队

meanings.meaning_en: the part that sticks out at the back of an animal’s body, and that it can move
meanings.example: The dog wagged its tail .
meanings.example_cn: 那条狗摇了摇尾巴。

meanings.meaning_en: to follow someone and watch what they do, where they go etc
containing poison, or caused by poisonous substances
meanings.example: fumes from a toxic waste dump
meanings.example_cn: 有毒废料堆产生的毒气

meanings.meaning_en: concerning or produced by  magnetism
meanings.example: magnetic forces
meanings.example_cn: 磁力

meanings.meaning_en: to go and spend time in a place or with someone, especially for pleasure or interest
meanings.example: Eric went to Seattle to visit his cousins.
meanings.example_cn: 埃里克到西雅图去看望他的表兄弟。

meanings.meaning_en: if things are apart, they are not close to each other or touching each other
meanings.example: They have offices in countries as far apart as India and Peru.
meanings.example_cn: 他们的办事处远至印度、秘鲁等国。

meanings.meaning_en: If people or groups are a long way apart on a particular topic or issue, they have completely different views and disagree about it
meanings.example: The police try to keep rival supporters apart at all matches.
meanings.example_cn: 警方在所有的比赛中都设法将双方的支持者分开。

meanings.meaning_en: a large common black and white sea bird that lives near the sea
meanings.example: You have to practice and see the real gull, the good in every one of them, and to help them see it in themselves.
meanings.example_cn: 你应该通过练习去认识真正的海鸥，要看到每只海鸥的美德，并帮助他们去认识自己的美德。

meanings.meaning_en: to fool, cheat, or hoax
an animal that only eats plants
meanings.example: The meat of the herbivore is, in comparison, far more edible , smellwise.
meanings.example_cn: 相对地，食草动物的肉闻起来要好些，更易食用。

meanings.meaning_en: an upright post of wood with another crossing it near the top, that people in the past were fastened to with nails and left to die on as a punishment
meanings.example: The by-pass crosses Wilton Lane shortly after a roundabout.
meanings.example_cn: 这条旁道绕过环岛后不久就和威尔顿巷相交。

meanings.meaning_en: if two or more roads, lines, etc cross, or if one crosses another, they go across each other
an extremely violent storm consisting of air that spins very quickly and causes a lot of damage
meanings.example: The tornado rubbished the whole village.

meanings.meaning_en: a pipe that carries water or waste liquids away

meanings.meaning_en: to know and understand something, or suddenly begin to understand it

meanings.meaning_en: measuring only a short distance from the top to the bottom

meanings.meaning_cn: 温和的,适度的,有节制的

meanings.meaning_en: always behaving in the same way or having the same attitudes, standards etc – usually used to show approval
meanings.example: She’s the team’s most consistent player.
meanings.example_cn: 她是该队中表现最为稳定的选手。

meanings.meaning_en: the country where someone was born
meanings.example: Many are planning to return to their homeland.
meanings.example_cn: 很多人正计划回到自己的祖国去。

meanings.meaning_en: a way of doing something that has been officially agreed and chosen by a political party, a business, or another organization
meanings.example: ...plans that include changes in foreign policy and economic reforms.
meanings.example_cn: …包括外交政策调整和经济改革的计划。

meanings.example: I calculate he is wrong in saying that.
meanings.example_cn: 我认为他说的那句话是错误的。

meanings.meaning_en: when something changes from one form or state to another
meanings.example: Making the transition from youth to adulthood can be very painful.
meanings.example_cn: 从青少年过渡到成年有时是一个非常痛苦的过程。

meanings.example: Alexander the Great beat every opponent between Greece and India.
meanings.example_cn: 亚历山大大帝打败了希腊和印度之间的每个敌手。

meanings.meaning_en: the part of a television or computer where the picture or information appears
meanings.example: a computer with an 18-inch colour screen
meanings.example_cn: 带18英寸彩色屏幕的电脑

meanings.meaning_en: to show a film or television programme
meanings.example: He went on staring at the TV screen .
meanings.example_cn: 他继续盯着电视屏幕看。

meanings.meaning_en: below the temperature at which water turns to ice
meanings.example: freezing fog
meanings.example_cn: 冰雾

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone believe something that is not true by giving them information that is false or not complete
meanings.example: Don’t be misled by appearances, he’s a good worker.
meanings.example_cn: 不要被表象迷惑，他工作干得挺不错的。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the back part of an animal with four legs
meanings.example: Suddenly the cow kicked up its hind legs.
meanings.example_cn: 突然奶牛踢起了后腿。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the way that your mind works and the way that this affects your behaviour
meanings.example: Sleep disorders are a serious psychological problem .
meanings.example_cn: 睡眠障碍是严重的心理疾病。

meanings.meaning_en: the Roman goddess of love
help, such as money or food, given by an organization or government to a country or to people who are in a difficult situation
meanings.example: Foreign aid from many countries poured into the famine area.
meanings.example_cn: 来自许多国家的救援物资纷纷送到饥荒地区。

meanings.meaning_en: a type of plant with green leaves shaped like large feathers, but no flowers
meanings.example: A ladder fern springs from a crack in the 1979 lava flows from Kilauea Volcano on the Big Island of Hawaii.
meanings.example_cn: 1979年，夏威夷大岛上蕨类植物生长在基拉韦厄火山所流出的阶梯形的岩浆上。

meanings.meaning_en: an atmospheric phenomenon consisting of bands, curtains, or streamers of light, usually green, red, or yellow, that move across the sky in polar regions
an animal that looks like a horse but has black and white lines all over its body
meanings.example: The neck of the zebra was nipped by a lion.
meanings.example_cn: 狮子咬断了那头斑马的脖子。

meanings.meaning_en: the organ in your chest which pumps blood through your body
meanings.example: Regular exercise is good for the heart.
meanings.example_cn: 经常锻炼对心脏有好处。

meanings.meaning_en: the bones of a person’s or animal’s head
meanings.example: Her husband was later treated for a fractured skull.
meanings.example_cn: 她丈夫后来因颅骨碎裂而接受治疗。

meanings.meaning_en: a set of names, numbers etc, usually written one below the other, for example so that you can remember or check them
meanings.example: The guidebook lists 1,000 hotels and restaurants.
meanings.example_cn: 旅游手册上列有1,000家宾馆和餐厅。

meanings.meaning_en: to write a list, or mention things one after the other
Scandinavians are people from Scandinavian countries

meanings.example: The murderer was traced to Paris.
meanings.example_cn: 那个凶手被追踪到巴黎。

meanings.meaning_en: to do the things that are necessary to complete a job
meanings.example: I handled most of the paperwork.
meanings.example_cn: 大部分文书工作是我做的。

meanings.meaning_en: money that you gain by selling things or doing business, after your costs have been paid
meanings.example: The shop’s daily profit is usually around $500.
meanings.example_cn: 这家商店每天的利润一般在500美元左右。

meanings.meaning_en: to be useful or helpful to someone
meanings.example: She sold the business and bought a farm with the profits.
meanings.example_cn: 她卖了公司，用所得利润买下了一座农场。

meanings.meaning_en: to change a piece of writing by adding new information, making improvements, or correcting mistakes
meanings.example: A couple of sections of the book will need to be revised.
meanings.example_cn: 本书部分章节需要修订。

meanings.meaning_en: if a group, country etc fractures, or if it is fractured, it divides into parts in an unfriendly way because of disagreement
meanings.example: The opposition has been fractured by bitter disputes.
meanings.example_cn: 反对党因为激烈的纠纷闹得分崩离析。

meanings.meaning_en: for this reason
meanings.example: The cost of transport is a major expense for an industry. Hence factory location is an important consideration.
meanings.example_cn: 运输成本是企业的一大支出，因此工厂选址是重要的考虑因素。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who investigates things, especially crimes
meanings.example: police investigators
meanings.example_cn: 警探

meanings.meaning_en: to regularly pay money to live in a house or room that belongs to someone else, or to use something that belongs to someone else
meanings.example: Most students rent rooms in their second year.
meanings.example_cn: 大多数学生到二年级时租房居住。

meanings.meaning_en: the money that someone pays regularly to use a room, house etc that belongs to someone else
meanings.example: I’d rather have my own house than rent.
meanings.example_cn: 我更想有自己的房子，不想租房。

meanings.meaning_en: the way in which someone explains or understands an event, information, someone’s actions etc
meanings.example: One possible interpretation is that they want you to resign.
meanings.example_cn: 一种可能的解释是，他们想要你辞职。

meanings.meaning_en: to successfully control a feeling or problem that prevents you from achieving something
meanings.example: He struggled to overcome his shyness.
meanings.example_cn: 他努力克服自己的羞怯。

meanings.meaning_en: a special wall built across a river or stream to stop the water from flowing, especially in order to make a lake or produce electricity
meanings.example: Before the dam was built, Campbell River used to flood in the spring.
meanings.example_cn: 大坝建好之前，坎贝尔河常在春季发大水。

meanings.meaning_en: a decrease in the size, price, or amount of something, or the act of decreasing something
meanings.example: strategies for noise reduction
meanings.example_cn: 减少噪音的对策

meanings.meaning_en: used to say that something will happen or be true if something else does not happen or is not true
meanings.example: Unless some extra money is found, the theatre will close.
meanings.example_cn: 要是不能找到更多资金，剧院将要关闭。

meanings.meaning_en: if you have a preference for something, you like it more than another thing and will choose it if you can
meanings.example: Do you have a colour preference ?
meanings.example_cn: 你有什么颜色上的偏好吗？

meanings.meaning_en: to find out how much something will cost, how long something will take etc, by using numbers
meanings.example: These instruments calculate distances precisely.
meanings.example_cn: 这些仪器计算距离非常精确。

meanings.meaning_en: a container made of thin pieces of plastic, wire, or wood woven together, used to carry things or put things in
meanings.example: a shopping basket
meanings.example_cn: 购物篮

meanings.meaning_en: the leaves and branches of trees, that make a kind of roof in a forest
meanings.example: the forest canopy
meanings.example_cn: 森林的树冠层

meanings.meaning_en: to move earth, snow etc, or to make a hole in the ground, using a  spade  or your hands
meanings.example: freshly dug carrots
meanings.example_cn: 刚挖出来的胡萝卜

meanings.meaning_en: the amount of energy, oil, electricity etc that is used
meanings.example: Vigorous exercise increases oxygen consumption.
meanings.example_cn: 剧烈运动增加氧的消耗。

meanings.meaning_en: a lake, especially an artificial one, where water is stored before it is supplied to people’s houses
meanings.example: All these earthquakes happened when the water level in Zipingpu reservoir was low.
meanings.example_cn: 所有这些地震都发生在紫坪铺水库水位很低的时候。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of writing or speech that gives details about what someone or something is like
meanings.example: The booklet gives a brief description of each place.
meanings.example_cn: 这本小册子对每一个地方都作了简短的介绍。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the small holes in your skin that liquid, especially  sweat  , can pass through, or a similar hole in the surface of a plant
meanings.example: The size of your pores is determined by the amount of oil they produce.
meanings.example_cn: 毛孔的大小取决于毛孔分泌油脂的多少。

meanings.meaning_en: the way the parts of a machine or system work together, or the process of making a machine or system work
meanings.example: The aircraft’s engine operation was normal.
meanings.example_cn: 飞机引擎运转正常。

meanings.meaning_en: to make light or a shadow appear somewhere
meanings.example: the shade cast by low-hanging branches
meanings.example_cn: 低垂的树枝投下的阴影

meanings.meaning_en: spoken, not written
meanings.example: oral history
meanings.example_cn: 口述的历史

meanings.meaning_en: the conditions that affect a situation, action, event etc
meanings.example: The Soviet Union had been forced by circumstances to sign a pact with Nazi Germany.
meanings.example_cn: 苏联为形势所迫同纳粹德国签订了一项条约。

meanings.meaning_en: a type of potassium used especially in farming to make the soil better
severe problems, injuries, illnesses etc are very bad or very serious
meanings.example: His injuries were quite severe.
meanings.example_cn: 他的伤势很严重。

meanings.meaning_en: a machine that has been sent into space and goes around the Earth, moon etc, used for radio, television, and other electronic communication
meanings.example: the launch of a communications and weather satellite
meanings.example_cn: 气象通信卫星的发射

meanings.meaning_en: problems or difficulties
meanings.example: Recent stock market losses point to trouble ahead.
meanings.example_cn: 最近股市的下跌预示着未来将有麻烦。

meanings.meaning_en: a strong thread made of several threads twisted together, used for tying or fastening things
meanings.example: Her key hung on a string around her neck.
meanings.example_cn: 她的钥匙穿了根绳子挂在脖子上。

meanings.meaning_en: to be spread out in a line
meanings.example: a ball of string
meanings.example_cn: 一团细绳

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to design buildings
meanings.example: But I am an architect.
meanings.example_cn: 但是我是一名建筑师。

meanings.meaning_en: An exhibitor is a person or company whose work or products are being shown in an exhibition
meanings.example: Schedules will be sent out to all exhibitors.
meanings.example_cn: 日程安排将会发送给所有的参展者。

meanings.meaning_en: belonging to a traditional style or set of ideas
meanings.example: the classical theory of relativity
meanings.example_cn: 经典相对论

meanings.meaning_en: to remove an object from somewhere, especially with difficulty
meanings.example: You’ll have to have that tooth extracted.
meanings.example_cn: 你得把那颗牙拔掉。

meanings.meaning_en: a short piece of writing, music etc taken from a particular book, piece of music etc

meanings.example: I wish I could offer you some cake but there’s none left.
meanings.example_cn: 我真想能请你吃些蛋糕，但一点也没剩的了。

meanings.meaning_en: not any amount of something or not one of a group of people or things
meanings.example: Although these were good students, none had a score above 60.
meanings.example_cn: 虽然这些都是好学生，但是没有一个考到60分以上。

meanings.meaning_en: if you undergo a change, an unpleasant experience etc, it happens to you or is done to you
meanings.example: The country has undergone massive changes recently.
meanings.example_cn: 这个国家最近经历了巨大的变化。

meanings.meaning_en: easily broken or damaged
meanings.example: Be careful with that vase – it’s very fragile.
meanings.example_cn: 小心那只花瓶——很容易打碎的。

meanings.meaning_en: a duty to be in charge of someone or something, so that you make decisions and can be blamed if something bad happens
meanings.example: Kelly’s promotion means more money and more responsibility.
meanings.example_cn: 凯利获得提升，这意味着钱多了，责任也更大了。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something seem better, larger, worse etc than it really is
meanings.example: I couldn’t sleep for three days – I’m not exaggerating.
meanings.example_cn: 我三天没睡觉了——一点不夸张。

meanings.meaning_en: the amount of goods or work produced by a person, machine, factory etc
meanings.example: Output is up 30% on last year.
meanings.example_cn: 产量比去年提高了30%。

meanings.meaning_en: a very tall modern city building
meanings.example: The skyscraper towers into the clouds.
meanings.example_cn: 那幢摩天大楼高耸入云。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the parts of a bird’s or insect’s body that it uses for flying
meanings.example: a butterfly with beautiful markings on its wings
meanings.example_cn: 翅膀上有美丽花纹的蝴蝶

meanings.meaning_en: to fly somewhere
meanings.example: The pheasant flapped its wings vigorously.
meanings.example_cn: 野鸡猛烈地拍打翅膀。

meanings.meaning_en: an illness which affects a person, animal, or plant
meanings.example: His father died of heart disease.
meanings.example_cn: 他父亲死于心脏病。

meanings.meaning_en: to try to prevent a change from happening, or prevent yourself from being forced to do something
meanings.example: He resisted pressure to resign.
meanings.example_cn: 他顶住压力，没辞职。

meanings.meaning_en: to be the best or most successful in a competition, game, election etc
meanings.example: Who’s winning (= who is most successful at this point in the game )?
meanings.example_cn: 现在谁领先？

meanings.meaning_en: a change in a price, amount, level etc
meanings.example: Prices are subject to fluctuation.
meanings.example_cn: 价格可能会有波动。

meanings.meaning_en: if a place, situation, or thing breeds a particular type of person, it produces that type
meanings.example: Society’s obsession with sex has bred a generation of unhappy children.
meanings.example_cn: 纵欲的社会生养了一代不幸的儿童。

meanings.meaning_en: a type of animal that is kept as a pet or on a farm
one of the owners of a business
meanings.example: She’s a partner in a law firm.
meanings.example_cn: 她是一家律师事务所的合伙人。

meanings.meaning_en: a situation in which two or more people disagree, often angrily
meanings.example: We need to provide a convincing argument as to why the system should be changed.
meanings.example_cn: 我们得提出有说服力的论据，证明为何要改变体制。

meanings.meaning_en: to find or provide a way of dealing with a problem
meanings.example: Charlie thinks money will solve all his problems.
meanings.example_cn: 查理认为钱能解决他所有的问题。

meanings.meaning_en: a structure made of wires or bars in which birds or animals can be kept
meanings.example: I hate to see birds in cages.
meanings.example_cn: 我不喜欢看到鸟在笼子里。

meanings.meaning_en: a smooth soft rock which breaks easily into thin flat pieces
the rate at which goods are produced, and the amount produced, especially in relation to the work, time, and money needed to produce them
meanings.example: high productivity levels in manufacturing
meanings.example_cn: 制造业中的高生产率

meanings.meaning_en: large objects such as chairs, tables, beds, and cupboards
meanings.example: I helped him choose the furniture for his house.
meanings.example_cn: 我帮他挑选房子里用的家具。

meanings.meaning_en: organized carefully and done thoroughly
meanings.example: What about all other systematic knowledge?
meanings.example_cn: 对于所有其他系统的知识呢？

meanings.meaning_en: a quality or feature, especially one that is considered to be good or useful
meanings.example: What attributes should a good manager possess?
meanings.example_cn: 一名优秀的经理应该具备哪些素质？

meanings.meaning_en: a person or company that makes a particular type of goods
meanings.example: a leading Japanese computer maker
meanings.example_cn: 日本一家主要的计算机生产商

meanings.meaning_en: likely to change often
meanings.example: Expect variable cloudiness and fog tomorrow.
meanings.example_cn: 预计明天多云有雾，天气多变。

meanings.meaning_en: something that may be different in different situations, so that you cannot be sure what will happen
meanings.example: Interest rates can be highly variable.
meanings.example_cn: 利率有时会大幅波动。

meanings.meaning_en: when something is kept in its original state or in good condition
meanings.example: methods of food preservation
meanings.example_cn: 保存食物的各种方法

meanings.meaning_en: to arrange for something important to start, such as an official process or a new plan
meanings.example: They have decided to initiate legal proceedings against the newspaper.
meanings.example_cn: 他们决定向该报提起法律诉讼。

meanings.meaning_en: the meal you have in the morning
meanings.example: We had bacon and eggs for breakfast .
meanings.example_cn: 我们早餐吃了熏肉鸡蛋。

meanings.meaning_en: to notice, see, or recognize something
meanings.example: That morning, he perceived a change in Franca’s mood.
meanings.example_cn: 那天早上，他注意到弗兰卡情绪的变化。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone feel certain that something is true
meanings.example: Her arguments didn’t convince everyone, but changes were made.
meanings.example_cn: 她的论点不能说服每个人，但还是引起了一些变化。

meanings.meaning_en: determined or trying very hard to be more successful than other people or businesses
meanings.example: Some US industries are not as competitive as they have been in the past.
meanings.example_cn: 美国有些行业不如以前有竞争力了。

meanings.meaning_en: an object or piece of information that helps someone solve a crime or mystery
meanings.example: Police have found a vital clue .
meanings.example_cn: 警方发现了至关重要的线索。

meanings.meaning_en: worried or frightened about something, and unable to relax
meanings.example: I wish you’d stop looking at me like that. You’re making me nervous.
meanings.example_cn: 我希望你不要再那样看着我了，你让我紧张。

meanings.meaning_en: to calculate the total number of things or people in a group
meanings.example: I was amazed at the number of plants - I counted 147.
meanings.example_cn: 我对植物的数量之多感到惊讶，我数了有147棵。

meanings.meaning_en: to change or move something slightly to improve it or make it more suitable for a particular purpose
meanings.example: Check and adjust the brakes regularly.
meanings.example_cn: 经常检查并调节刹车装置。

meanings.meaning_en: something that tests strength, skill, or ability, especially in a way that is interesting
meanings.example: They threw down the challenge that he couldn’t wash 40 cars in one hour (= invited him to try to do it ) .
meanings.example_cn: 他们激将他，说他不可能在1小时内擦洗40辆汽车。

meanings.meaning_en: extremely excited or nervous about something
meanings.example: No, don’t give Luke any candy - it’ll make him hyper.
meanings.example_cn: 不，别给卢克糖果，不然他会起劲折腾的。

meanings.meaning_en: to completely get rid of something that is unnecessary or unwanted
meanings.example: Recent measures have not eliminated discrimination in employment.
meanings.example_cn: 最近的举措还未能根除就业歧视。

meanings.example: As one local resident put it in May, "By day there is government.
meanings.example_cn: 正如一位当地居民在五月份对它的描述”白天有政府。

meanings.meaning_en: a hole or pipe through which gases, liquid etc can enter or escape from an enclosed space or container
meanings.example: a blocked air vent
meanings.example_cn: 堵塞的通风口

meanings.meaning_en: to express feelings of anger, hatred etc, especially by doing something violent or harmful
meanings.example: a volcanic vent
meanings.example_cn: 火山口

meanings.meaning_en: a long stick or post usually made of wood or metal, often set upright in the ground to support something
meanings.example: a telephone pole
meanings.example_cn: 电话线杆

meanings.meaning_en: the process of keeping or putting something in a special place while it is not being used
meanings.example: the storage of highly radioactive material
meanings.example_cn: 高放射性材料的存放

meanings.meaning_en: someone who gives money to a company, business, or bank in order to get a profit
meanings.example: The main investor in the project is the French bank Credit National.
meanings.example_cn: 该项目的主要投资方是法国国民信贷银行。

meanings.example: And now the anger Maggie had feared was loosed.
meanings.example_cn: 现在，玛吉所害怕的怒火发泄出来了。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something unpleasant begin

meanings.example: I don't want to miss seeing that film on television tonight.
meanings.example_cn: 我不想错过今晚在电视上看那部影片的机会。

meanings.meaning_en: to not go somewhere or do something, especially when you want to but cannot
meanings.example: I never miss a chance of playing football.
meanings.example_cn: 我从来不错过踢足球的机会。

meanings.meaning_en: increasing to a higher level
meanings.example: upward pressure on bank interest rates
meanings.example_cn: 针对银行利率的越来越大的压力

meanings.meaning_en: If someone moves or looks upward, they move or look up towards a higher place
meanings.example: They climbed upward along the steep cliffs surrounding the village.
meanings.example_cn: 他们沿着环绕村庄的陡峭悬崖向上爬。

meanings.meaning_en: related to language, words, or linguistics
meanings.example: a child’s linguistic development
meanings.example_cn: 儿童的语言发展

meanings.meaning_en: belonging to a simple way of life that existed in the past and does not have modern industries and machines
meanings.example: a primitive society
meanings.example_cn: 原始社会

meanings.meaning_en: a particular type of clothing worn by all the members of a group or organization such as the police, the army etc
meanings.example: The police wear dark blue uniforms.
meanings.example_cn: 警察穿深蓝色制服。

meanings.meaning_en: the ability to see
meanings.example: She suffered temporary loss of vision after being struck on the head.
meanings.example_cn: 她头部受撞击以后出现暂时性失明。

meanings.meaning_en: to touch something lightly while passing it, sometimes damaging it
meanings.example: A bullet grazed his arm.
meanings.example_cn: 一颗子弹擦过他的手臂。

meanings.meaning_en: a long thin round vegetable with a dark green skin and a light green inside, usually eaten raw
meanings.example: The "gurkophone" is one of their classics, made from a hollowed cucumber, a pepper and a carrot.
meanings.example_cn: 黄瓜管"是他们的经典乐器之一,那是用掏空的黄瓜、辣椒和胡萝卜做的。

meanings.meaning_en: something or someone that is not included in a general statement or does not follow a rule or pattern
meanings.example: It’s been cold, but today’s an exception.
meanings.example_cn: 天气一直寒冷，但今天是个例外。

meanings.meaning_en: having a lot of small parts or details put together in a complicated way
meanings.example: pure silks embroidered with elaborate patterns
meanings.example_cn: 绣有精美图案的真丝衣服

meanings.meaning_en: to give more details or new information about something
a lack of success in achieving or doing something
meanings.example: Successful people often aren’t very good at dealing with failure.
meanings.example_cn: 一帆风顺的人往往不太擅长应对失败。

meanings.meaning_en: a situation that is secure is one that you can depend on because it is not likely to change
meanings.example: There are no secure jobs these days.
meanings.example_cn: 如今已经没有铁饭碗了。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something safe from being attacked, harmed, or lost
meanings.example: We want a secure future for our children.
meanings.example_cn: 我们希望我们的孩子未来生活无虞。

meanings.meaning_en: a hole or container that has been specially made and filled with water so that people can swim or play in it

meanings.meaning_en: an event, situation etc that people do not understand or cannot explain because they do not know enough about it

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of clothing with long sleeves that is worn over your clothes to protect them or to keep you warm

meanings.example_cn: 比利！穿上外套，外面很冷！

meanings.meaning_en: to put clothes on your body

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of metal, usually flat and round, that is used as money

meanings.meaning_en: a hard block of baked clay used for building walls, houses etc

meanings.example_cn: 像纤维、钙可以和脂肪分子结合，帮助他们彻底的通过肠道。

meanings.example_cn: 把显示器调成256色彩模式。

meanings.example_cn: 飞机的螺旋桨在快速旋转。

meanings.example: her wonderfully expressive eyes
meanings.example_cn: 她那双会说话的眼睛

meanings.meaning_en: a line of things or people next to each other
meanings.example: (= many rows ) of shelves stacked with books
meanings.example_cn: 一排又一排堆满书的架子

meanings.meaning_en: to hide something
meanings.example: The money had been secreted in a Swiss bank account.
meanings.example_cn: 这笔钱藏匿在一个瑞士银行账户里。

meanings.meaning_en: If someone or something discourages you, they cause you to lose your enthusiasm about your actions
meanings.example: It may be difficult to do at first. Don't let this discourage you.
meanings.example_cn: 开始时做起来也许比较困难。不要让这个泄你的气。

meanings.meaning_en: very big, fast, powerful etc
meanings.example: Suddenly, there was a tremendous bang, and the whole station shook.
meanings.example_cn: 突然一声巨响，整个车站都晃动了。

meanings.meaning_en: a sea animal with a hard shell, five legs on each side, and two large  claws
meanings.example: crab meat
meanings.example_cn: 蟹肉

meanings.meaning_en: the area of land next to a house, where there are flowers, grass, and other plants, and often a place for people to sit
meanings.example: He’s outside in the garden.
meanings.example_cn: 他在外面花园里。

meanings.meaning_en: a scientist who studies the stars and  planet s
meanings.example: My ideal is to be an astronomer.
meanings.example_cn: 我的理想是当一个天文学家。

meanings.meaning_en: not covered by clothes
meanings.example: a ragged child with bare feet
meanings.example_cn: 一个衣衫褴褛、光着脚的小孩

meanings.meaning_en: a member of a North American Indian people formerly living south of Lake Erie
meanings.example: They drove north back home, where he would start chemotherapy at a cancer center in Erie.
meanings.example_cn: 他们驱车向北返回家中，要在伊利肿瘤治疗中心开始进行化疗。

meanings.meaning_en: to prevent something from growing or developing well
meanings.example: An unhappy family life may inhibit children’s learning.
meanings.example_cn: 不幸福的家庭生活可能会阻碍儿童的学习。

meanings.example: This is the brochure for Mexico, Yucatan is at the back, and this is the brochure for Guatemala.
meanings.example_cn: 这是墨西哥的旅游宣传册，尤卡坦半岛在背面，这是危地马拉的旅游宣传册。

meanings.meaning_en: a substance that forms a chemical salt when combined with an acid
meanings.example: The extremely salty, alkali lake holds little life, but its waters are a favorite spot for wading birds.
meanings.example_cn: 其味极咸，碱湖保存了湖中的小生命，但其水域仍为涉水鸟所喜欢的地方。

meanings.example: To get similar characteristics from composites, the carbon fibres are first chemically treated with an alkali which creates lots of tiny pits on their surface.
meanings.example_cn: 为了在复合碳材料上获取与电容器相似的性质，这种碳纤维首先经过碱化学处理以令其表面生成许多细微的凹点。

meanings.meaning_en: the state of being complicated
meanings.example: a design of great complexity
meanings.example_cn: 一项非常复杂的设计

meanings.meaning_en: made of the solid substances that settle at the bottom of the sea, rivers, lakes etc
meanings.example: sedimentary rock
meanings.example_cn: 沉积岩

meanings.meaning_en: if a process accelerates or if something accelerates it, it happens faster than usual or sooner than you expect
meanings.example: measures to accelerate the rate of economic growth
meanings.example_cn: 加快经济增长速度的措施

meanings.example: They are touring in Spain.
meanings.example_cn: 他们正在西班牙旅游。

meanings.meaning_en: a space or an area of glass in the wall of a building or vehicle that lets in light
meanings.example: Television provides us with a useful window on the world.
meanings.example_cn: 电视为我们提供了了解世界的有用渠道。

meanings.meaning_en: the writing that forms the main part of a book, magazine etc, rather than the pictures or notes
meanings.example: There should not be too much text in children’s books.
meanings.example_cn: 儿童书籍里不应该有太多的文字。

meanings.meaning_en: to produce a musical sound with your voice
meanings.example: She can sing beautifully.
meanings.example_cn: 她唱歌很好听。

meanings.meaning_en: to help someone to do something
meanings.example: The family decided to assist me with my chores.
meanings.example_cn: 家人决定分担我的琐事。

meanings.meaning_en: a painting, sign, description etc that shows something
meanings.example: Puerto Ricans are U.S. citizens but they have no representation in Congress.
meanings.example_cn: 波多黎各人是美国公民，但是他们在国会中没有代表。

meanings.meaning_en: an official rule or order
meanings.example: There seem to be so many rules and regulations these days.
meanings.example_cn: 如今好像条条框框很多。

meanings.meaning_en: if a price or amount fluctuates, it keeps changing and becoming higher and lower
meanings.example: Insect populations fluctuate wildly from year to year.
meanings.example_cn: 昆虫的数量每年变化很大。

meanings.meaning_en: a large container for a very hot fire, used to produce power, heat, or liquid metal
meanings.example: We had better fire up the furnace.
meanings.example_cn: 我们最好把炉子生起来。

meanings.meaning_en: a type of animal, such as a snake or  lizard  , whose body temperature changes according to the temperature around it, and that usually lays eggs to have babies
meanings.example: Bird evolved from reptiles, so the first bird must have come out of an egg--laid by a reptile.
meanings.example_cn: 禽类是由爬虫类进化而来，所以，第一只禽鸟肯定是从爬虫类孵化的蛋里出来的。

meanings.meaning_en: when something or someone is liked or supported by a lot of people
meanings.example: The president’s popularity has declined considerably.
meanings.example_cn: 总统的支持率大大下降了。

meanings.example: From whom shall I get comfort?
meanings.example_cn: 我从谁那儿能得到安慰呢?

meanings.meaning_en: to cook something using dry heat, in an  oven
meanings.example: I’m baking some bread.
meanings.example_cn: 我在烤一些面包。

meanings.meaning_en: the ash that remains when a dead person’s body is burned
meanings.example: His ashes were scattered at sea.
meanings.example_cn: 他的骨灰被撒向大海。

meanings.meaning_en: a large organization that has a particular kind of work or purpose
meanings.example: powerful institutions such as world banks
meanings.example_cn: 诸如世界银行之类的强大机构

meanings.meaning_en: a symbolic action is important because of what it represents but may not have any real effect
meanings.example: Each element of the ceremony has a symbolic meaning .
meanings.example_cn: 仪式的每一个元素都具有象征意义。

meanings.meaning_en: a belief in one or more gods
meanings.example: The U.S. Constitution promises freedom of religion.
meanings.example_cn: 美国宪法保证宗教信仰自由。

meanings.meaning_en: to protect something and prevent it from changing or being damaged
meanings.example: We must conserve our woodlands for future generations.
meanings.example_cn: 我们必须为子孙后代保护林地。

meanings.meaning_en: a hole in the ground, especially one made by digging
meanings.example: The female digs a pit in which to lay the eggs.
meanings.example_cn: 雌性挖坑产卵。

meanings.meaning_en: the vehicles moving along a road or street
meanings.example: There wasn’t much traffic on the roads.
meanings.example_cn: 路上车辆不多。

meanings.example: A: He got the scholarship to Harvard.
meanings.example_cn: 他得到了哈佛大学的奖学金。

meanings.example: From the deck of a ship, the island makes a startling apparition, like the Himalaya just emerged from the Flood.
meanings.example_cn: 坐船从甲板上看，这个岛屿简直是个惊人的神迹，就像喜马拉雅山在一片洪水中耸立。

meanings.meaning_en: to change food that you have just eaten into substances that your body can use
meanings.example: Most babies can digest a wide range of food easily.
meanings.example_cn: 大多数婴儿能轻易地消化很多种食物。

meanings.meaning_en: a formal, usually written, request for something such as a job, place at university, or permission to do something
meanings.example: We receive hundreds of job applications each year.
meanings.example_cn: 我们每年收到数百封求职信。

meanings.meaning_en: the force that causes something to fall to the ground or to be attracted to another  planet
meanings.example: the force of gravity
meanings.example_cn: 重力

meanings.meaning_en: someone who travels through an unknown area to find out about it
meanings.example: ...the travels of Columbus, Magellan, and many other explorers.
meanings.example_cn: …哥伦布、麦哲伦和许多其他探险家的旅行。

meanings.meaning_en: to teach a child at a school, college, or university
meanings.example: The Ormerod School educates handicapped children.
meanings.example_cn: 奥默罗德学校的教育对象为残疾儿童。

meanings.meaning_en: happening, coming, or done quickly or when you do not expect it
meanings.example: a sudden change in the weather
meanings.example_cn: 天气的突然变化

meanings.meaning_en: the act of doing something too quickly in a way that is not sensible
a farm animal that is kept for its wool and its meat
meanings.example: Sheep were grazing on the hillside.
meanings.example_cn: 羊群在山坡上吃草。

meanings.meaning_en: if someone shows mercy, they choose to forgive or to be kind to someone who they have the power to hurt or punish
meanings.example: He showed no mercy to his enemies.
meanings.example_cn: 他对敌人毫不仁慈。

meanings.meaning_en: a lifting device for heavy stone or concrete blocks consisting of a number of curved pieces of metal or wedges fitting into a dovetailed recess cut into the block
relating to the ocean
meanings.example: an oceanic island
meanings.example_cn: 大洋岛

meanings.meaning_en: something such as a prize or money given to someone to reward them for something they have done
meanings.example: The movie has won a number of awards.
meanings.example_cn: 该片获得了多个奖项。

meanings.meaning_en: to officially give someone something such as a prize or money to reward them for something they have done
meanings.example: an award-winning restaurant
meanings.example_cn: 获奖餐厅

meanings.meaning_en: making you feel physically relaxed, without any pain or without being too hot, cold etc
meanings.example: I was so comfortable and warm in bed I didn’t want to get up.
meanings.example_cn: 床上又舒服又暖和，我都不想起来。

meanings.meaning_en: to travel on or across an area of water in a boat or ship
meanings.example: Three tall ships sailed past.
meanings.example_cn: 三艘大船驶了过去。

meanings.meaning_en: to remember a particular fact, event, or situation from the past
meanings.example: You don’t happen to recall his name, do you?
meanings.example_cn: 你不会恰巧还想得起他的名字吧？

meanings.meaning_en: an official order telling someone to return to a place, especially before they expected to
meanings.example: As I recall, it was you who suggested this idea in the first place.
meanings.example_cn: 我记得，是你首先提出这个想法的。

meanings.meaning_en: a person or company whose business is to arrange the writing, production, and sale of books, newspapers etc
meanings.example: The publishers planned to produce the journal on a weekly basis.
meanings.example_cn: 出版社计划将这份杂志做成周刊。

meanings.meaning_en: a place where you can sit, especially one in a vehicle or one from which you watch a performance, sports event etc
meanings.example: I was in the back seat and Jo was driving.
meanings.example_cn: 我在后座，乔开车。

meanings.meaning_en: if a place seats a number of people, it has enough seats for that number
meanings.example: a 10,000-seat stadium
meanings.example_cn: 万人体育场

meanings.meaning_en: happening, done, or existing most of the time or in most situations
meanings.example: Make a cheese sauce in the usual way.
meanings.example_cn: 按通常的做法做奶酪酱。

meanings.meaning_en: if two things touch, or one thing touches another thing, they reach each other so that there is no space between them
meanings.example: As our glasses touched, he said ‘Cheers!’
meanings.example_cn: 我们的酒杯相碰时，他说了声:“干杯！”

meanings.meaning_en: a quick increase of business activity
meanings.example: The boom has created job opportunities.
meanings.example_cn: 经济繁荣创造了就业的机会。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a loud deep sound
meanings.example: the economic boom of the 1950s
meanings.example_cn: 20世纪50年代的经济繁荣

meanings.meaning_en: the activities that are involved in managing the work of a company or organization
meanings.example: We’re looking for someone with experience in administration.
meanings.example_cn: 我们正在寻找一个有管理经验的人。

meanings.meaning_en: when money, goods etc leave a bank, country etc
meanings.example: the outflow valve
meanings.example_cn: 外流阀，排放阀

meanings.meaning_en: staying in good condition for a long time, even if used a lot
meanings.example: Wood is a durable material.
meanings.example_cn: 木头是耐用材料。

meanings.meaning_en: to accept that you are responsible for a piece of work, and start to do it
meanings.example: She undertook the task of monitoring the elections.
meanings.example_cn: 她承担了监督选举的任务。

meanings.meaning_en: the management of money by governments, large organizations etc
meanings.example: leasing and other forms of business finance
meanings.example_cn: 租赁及其他商业金融形式

meanings.meaning_en: to provide money, especially a lot of money, to pay for something
meanings.example: Russia’s finance minister
meanings.example_cn: 俄罗斯财政部长

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of rubber or plastic that keeps air, water, dirt etc out of something
meanings.example: When assembling the pie, wet the edges where the two crusts join, to form a seal.
meanings.example_cn: 捏合馅饼时，弄湿两块面皮封合的边缘，以形成一个封口。

meanings.meaning_en: something that you think is true although you have no definite proof
meanings.example: You would be making an assumption that's not based on any fact that you could report.
meanings.example_cn: 你会做出不以你能报道的任何事实为依据的一种假设。

meanings.example: And the next day, he gave a speech in Ohio about faith.
meanings.example_cn: 第二天，他还在俄亥俄州做一场关于信仰的演讲。

meanings.meaning_cn: 领路人,指南 vt指导, 支配
meanings.meaning_en: a book or piece of writing that provides information on a particular subject or explains how to do something
meanings.example: Follow our step-by-step guide .
meanings.example_cn: 跟着我们的分步指南去做。

meanings.meaning_en: to be more than a particular number or amount
meanings.example: Working hours must not exceed 42 hours a week.
meanings.example_cn: 工作时间每周不得超过42小时。

meanings.meaning_en: to improve a system, law, organization etc by making a lot of changes to it, so that it operates in a fairer or more effective way
meanings.example: plans to radically reform the tax system
meanings.example_cn: 彻底改革税收制度的计划

meanings.meaning_cn: 开关 vt转换, 转变
meanings.meaning_en: a piece of equipment that starts or stops the flow of electricity to a machine, light etc when you push it
meanings.example: Where’s the light switch ?
meanings.example_cn: 电灯开关在哪儿？

meanings.meaning_cn: 西南的, 来自西南的
meanings.meaning_en: in or from the southwest part of a country or area
meanings.example: southwestern Colorado
meanings.example_cn: 科罗拉多的西南部

meanings.meaning_en: infantile behaviour seems silly in an adult because it is typical of a child
meanings.example: infantile jokes
meanings.example_cn: 幼稚的玩笑

meanings.meaning_en: a male who has the same parents as you
meanings.example: I have two brothers, William and Mark.
meanings.example_cn: 我有两个兄弟，威廉和马克。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is crucial is extremely important, because everything else depends on it
meanings.example: The conservation of tropical forests is of crucial importance .
meanings.example_cn: 保护热带雨林至关重要。

meanings.example: We tend to think that a person who is a complete victim of amnesia is still the same person as before.
meanings.example_cn: 我们倾向于认为，一个彻底的健忘症患者，他与以前没有患病时仍然是同一个人。

meanings.meaning_en: an object for children to play with
meanings.example: some toys for the baby
meanings.example_cn: 宝宝玩的一些玩具

meanings.meaning_en: without any sound, or not making any sound
meanings.example: The large house was silent and lonely.
meanings.example_cn: 这幢大房子寂静荒凉。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the substances in food that help you to stay healthy
meanings.example: Cooking vegetables for too long lessens their nutritional value.
meanings.example_cn: 烹饪蔬菜时间过长有损其营养价值。

meanings.meaning_en: to eat or drink a small amount of something to see what it is like
meanings.example: It’s always best to keep tasting the food while you’re cooking it.
meanings.example_cn: 做菜的时候最好是边做边尝。

meanings.meaning_en: if one statement, story etc contradicts another, the facts in it are different so that both statements cannot be true
meanings.example: The witness statements contradict each other and the facts remain unclear.
meanings.example_cn: 目击者的说法互相矛盾，真相依然未明。

meanings.meaning_en: spoken rather than written
meanings.example: They were jostled and subjected to a torrent of verbal abuse.
meanings.example_cn: 他们被推来搡去，并受到了潮水般的辱骂。

meanings.example: It is possible to attach executable program files to e-mail.
meanings.example_cn: 可以在电子邮件上附上可执行程序文件。

meanings.meaning_en: something that you add to something else to improve it or make it complete
meanings.example: vitamins and other dietary supplements
meanings.example_cn: 各种维生素和其他膳食补充剂

meanings.meaning_en: the act of bringing goods, letters etc to a particular person or place, or the things that are brought
meanings.example: Most Indian restaurants offer free delivery.
meanings.example_cn: 大多数印度餐馆提供免费外送服务。

meanings.meaning_cn: 可比较的, 比得上的
meanings.meaning_en: similar to something else in size, number, quality etc, so that you can make a comparison
meanings.example: A car of comparable size would cost far more abroad.
meanings.example_cn: 同样大小的汽车在国外要贵得多。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone feel pleased by doing what they want
meanings.example: Nothing I did would ever satisfy my father.
meanings.example_cn: 我做什么都不能让父亲满意。

meanings.meaning_en: a board in a car, plane, boat etc that has the controls on it
meanings.example: He assembled a panel of scholars to advise him.
meanings.example_cn: 他集结了一个学者小组为他出谋划策。

meanings.meaning_en: to behave in a particular way or show a particular emotion because of something that has happened or been said
meanings.example: He reacted angrily to the suggestion that he had lied.
meanings.example_cn: 说他撒谎，他非常生气。

meanings.example: There are bright prospects for freshwater fish farming.
meanings.example_cn: 淡水养鱼大有可为。

meanings.meaning_en: coming or following one after the other
meanings.example: The team has had five successive victories.
meanings.example_cn: 这支球队已经连胜五场了。

meanings.example: You'd better declare the camera to the official.
meanings.example_cn: 你最好把照相机向海关官员申报纳税。

meanings.example: The reporter trapped the official into giving away a secret.
meanings.example_cn: 记者用计诱使那个官员泄露了一个秘密。

meanings.meaning_en: to keep something so that you can use or enjoy it in the future
meanings.example: We’ll save the rest of the food and have it later.
meanings.example_cn: 我们把剩下的食物留着以后吃。

meanings.meaning_en: used to thank someone in a polite way or to say that you are grateful for something they have done
meanings.example: Thanks ever so much for your help, I really appreciate it.
meanings.example_cn: 多谢你的帮助，我真的很感激。

meanings.meaning_cn: 朋友, 赞助者, 助手
meanings.meaning_en: someone who you know and like very much and enjoy spending time with
meanings.example: Jerry, this is my friend Sue.
meanings.example_cn: 杰里，这是我的朋友休。

meanings.meaning_en: the main ideas or facts about something, without the details
meanings.example: a research proposal outline
meanings.example_cn: 研究计划梗概

meanings.meaning_en: to show the edge of something, or draw around its edge, so that its shape is clear
of or relating to the earth's crust
meanings.example: As geologic forces pulled the crustal plate apart, new volcanoes formed in parts of the rift.
meanings.example_cn: 当地质作用力（试图）把地壳版块分开，版块开裂的一些地方就会形成新的火山。

meanings.meaning_cn: 恐吓, 凶兆, 威胁
meanings.meaning_en: a statement in which you tell someone that you will cause them harm or trouble if they do not do what you want
meanings.example: Your threats don’t scare me.
meanings.example_cn: 你的那些威胁吓不倒我。

meanings.meaning_en: a substance that is in foods such as sugar, bread, and potatoes, which provides your body with heat and energy and which consists of oxygen,  hydrogen  , and  carbon
meanings.example: Around one third of our meals should be based on carbohydrate, with roughly one half of these grains being whole.
meanings.example_cn: 我们每餐食物应当差不多有三分之一是碳水化合物，大概有一半谷物食品为全麦的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 周期的, 定期的 n期刊, 杂志
meanings.meaning_en: Periodical events or situations happen occasionally, at fairly regular intervals
meanings.example: She made periodical visits to her dentist.
meanings.example_cn: 她定期去看牙医。

meanings.meaning_en: the number 9
meanings.example: He’s only been in this job for nine months.
meanings.example_cn: 他干这份工作才九个月。

meanings.meaning_en: to become stronger or make something stronger
meanings.example: Our friendship has steadily strengthened over the years.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的友谊逐年加深。

meanings.meaning_en: a hard mineral substance that is used in making electronic watches and clocks
meanings.example: quartz crystals
meanings.example_cn: 石英晶体

meanings.example: The findings of this sociologist are very interesting because they illustrate once again the relationship that exists between what we do in the present and the results we obtain in the future.
meanings.example_cn: 这个社会学家的发现是非常有趣的，因为他们在一次的说明我们现在做的和我们未来获得的结果有关系。

meanings.meaning_cn: 最优秀的,标准的 n杰作
meanings.meaning_en: of excellent quality
meanings.example: Roy scored a classic goal in the 90th minute.
meanings.example_cn: 罗伊在第90分钟时踢进了漂亮的一球。

meanings.meaning_en: the total produced when you add two or more numbers or amounts together
meanings.example: You will have to pay the sum of the two sets of costs.
meanings.example_cn: 你得支付那两笔费用的总和。

meanings.meaning_en: made skilfully and with attention to the smallest details
meanings.example: a plate with a delicate pattern of leaves
meanings.example_cn: 有精致树叶图案的碟子

meanings.meaning_en: the position of being the leader of a group, organization, country etc
meanings.example: The US must now take a firm leadership role.
meanings.example_cn: 美国现在必须扮演一个强有力的领导人角色。

meanings.meaning_en: a man who rules a country because he is from a royal family
meanings.example: On 2 December Henry VI was crowned king (= made the king at an official ceremony ).
meanings.example_cn: 12月2日，亨利六世加冕为王。

meanings.meaning_en: someone you work with – used especially by professional people
meanings.example: a colleague of mine from the bank
meanings.example_cn: 我在银行的一位同事

meanings.meaning_en: The seafloor is the ground under the sea
meanings.example: Sea urchins brandish their spines on the seafloor near the Channel Islands.
meanings.example_cn: 海胆在海峡群岛附近的海底挥舞着它们的棘突。

meanings.meaning_en: a hard metal that is a mixture of  copper  and  tin

meanings.meaning_en: a way of expressing your ideas, especially as a writer or an artist

meanings.meaning_en: of middle size, level, or amount
a round roof on a building

meanings.example_cn: …国会大厦的穹顶。

meanings.meaning_en: writing done by hand

meanings.meaning_en: A hotel is a building where people stay, for example on holiday, paying for their rooms and meals

meanings.meaning_en: two times

meanings.example_cn: 他昨天被警察审问了两次。

meanings.meaning_en: the written information that tells you how to do or use something

meanings.meaning_en: to become very successful or very strong and healthy

meanings.meaning_en: books and stories about imaginary people and events

meanings.meaning_en: the part of a machine that makes it work or move, by changing power, especially electrical power, into movement

meanings.example_cn: 德国与法国接壤。

meanings.meaning_en: someone or something that is beautiful is extremely attractive to look at

meanings.example_cn: 她比我记忆中更美。

meanings.meaning_en: a machine with an engine that is used to take people or things from one place to another, such as a car, bus, or truck

meanings.meaning_en: an area of low flat ground that is always wet and soft

meanings.meaning_en: goods that are carried by ship, train, or aircraft, and the system of moving these goods

meanings.meaning_en: to send goods by air, sea, or train

meanings.meaning_en: to believe that someone is honest or will not do anything bad or wrong

meanings.meaning_en: if something intrigues you, it interests you a lot because it seems strange or mysterious

paintings and other objects produced by artists

meanings.example_cn: 该博物馆藏有6000件现当代艺术作品。

meanings.meaning_cn: 孵化 vt孵出, 策划

meanings.meaning_en: a special oven for baking clay pots, bricks etc

meanings.example_cn: 它们被称作“超级电车”，这是暗指它们比先前的型号更先进。

meanings.example_cn: 光伏电池依赖于非晶态或晶态的硅，碲化镉或者硒化、硫化铜铟。

meanings.meaning_en: the speed of something that is moving in a particular direction

meanings.meaning_en: if something bursts, or if you burst it, it breaks open or apart suddenly and violently so that its contents come out

meanings.example_cn: 水管爆裂，房子被水淹了两英尺。

meanings.meaning_en: an official organization which encourages the development of literature, art, science etc

meanings.example_cn: 美国艺术和文学学会

meanings.meaning_en: the direction or line along which something or someone is moving

meanings.meaning_cn: 宾夕法尼亚州（美国州名）

meanings.example_cn: 信已由宾夕法尼亚州寄到我这里。

meanings.meaning_en: a hard and very heavy metal that is combined with  platinum  to make jewellery and is used in scientific instruments. It is a chemical  element  : symbol Ir

meanings.example_cn: 他们分析了这个小地区的化石层，一共计算了在铱层下面的52个不同物种。

meanings.example_cn: 几周前价值30美分的1杯米如今卖到了1美元。

meanings.example_cn: 他没有成功融入到意大利的生活方式中去。

meanings.meaning_en: when you work with someone to achieve something that you both want

meanings.example_cn: 塑料工业

meanings.meaning_en: relating to genes or genetics

meanings.example_cn: 遗传性缺陷

meanings.meaning_en: one side of a piece of paper in a book, newspaper, document etc, or the sheet of paper itself

meanings.example_cn: 这是我们的蓄电池，那已经氮过度增压,面临着在核心里压力的损失,那会自动的加入冷却剂到,核心去，然后就会产生一个破裂。

meanings.meaning_en: having a good effect

meanings.example_cn: 有益于免疫系统的一种药物

meanings.meaning_en: one of the two soft parts around your mouth where your skin is redder or darker

meanings.example_cn: …不使用任何购买的化学品、肥料或杀虫剂的耕作。

meanings.meaning_cn: 刷子, 毛刷, 画笔 vt刷, 掸, 拂

meanings.example_cn: 硬毛刷，板刷

meanings.meaning_en: a member of a North American Indian people formerly living around Massachusetts Bay

meanings.example_cn: 我住在马萨诸塞州。

meanings.meaning_en: the quality of being or seeming real

meanings.example_cn: 他在1925年娶了贝亚。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the main groups that humans can be divided into according to the colour of their skin and other physical features

meanings.example_cn: 该校欢迎各种族的学生就读。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使适应,使朝向 n东方

meanings.example_cn: 你需要时间适应新的吃法。

meanings.meaning_en: land or soil that is barren has no plants growing on it

meanings.example_cn: 很久很久以前，地面还是一片荒漠。

meanings.meaning_en: when people have money and everything that is needed for a good life

meanings.example_cn: 经济繁荣时期

meanings.meaning_en: hot liquid rock that flows from a volcano,or this rock when it has become solid

meanings.example_cn: 墨西哥科利马山昨晚开始喷发熔岩和火山灰。

meanings.example_cn: 他沿着圣安托万街轻快地走着。

meanings.meaning_en: a group of countries that are all controlled by one ruler or government

meanings.example_cn: 罗马帝国

meanings.meaning_en: an official agreement between two or more people, stating what each will do

meanings.meaning_en: giving a description of something

meanings.example_cn: 小说中的描写性段落

meanings.meaning_cn: 反刍动物(的), 沉思的
meanings.meaning_en: an animal such as a cow that has several stomachs and eats grass

meanings.example_cn: 反刍动物将纤维素转化为营养素的效率和经济性有可能经过食品化学家来改进。

meanings.meaning_en: pots, bowls etc that are made from a special hard clay

meanings.example_cn: ...手绘青花粗陶器。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of special glass that you can look at and see yourself in

meanings.example_cn: 他老是照镜子！

meanings.example_cn: 我看着镜子简直不敢相信，我看上去棒极了！

meanings.meaning_en: the sharp curved point of a hook,  arrow  etc that prevents it from being easily pulled out
food supplies for horses and cattle

meanings.meaning_en: to move in a continuous curve that gets nearer to or further from its central point as it goes round
