meanings.example_cn: 她身材修长，穿着时髦。

meanings.meaning_en: to agree unwillingly that something is true or that someone else is right
meanings.example: ‘Okay, so maybe I was a little bit scared,’ Jenny admitted.
meanings.example_cn: “行了，也许我是有点害怕。”珍妮承认道。

meanings.meaning_en: (in the European Alps) an area of pasture above the valley bottom but below the mountain peaks
something that happens or exists in many places, so that it is not unusual
meanings.example: Women’s groups have become a commonplace.
meanings.example_cn: 妇女团体已经成了常见事物。

meanings.meaning_en: a container used to put flowers in or for decoration
meanings.example: ...a vase of red roses.
meanings.example_cn: …一个插着红玫瑰的花瓶。

meanings.meaning_en: done in a way that is intended or planned
meanings.example: He deliberately upset her.
meanings.example_cn: 他故意惹她不开心。

meanings.meaning_en: to advise someone to do something, especially because you have special knowledge of a situation or subject
meanings.example: Doctors strongly recommend that fathers should be present at their baby’s birth.
meanings.example_cn: 医生极力建议孩子出生时父亲应该在场。

meanings.meaning_en: having two of something or two parts
meanings.example: a dual system of education
meanings.example_cn: 二元[双元]教育体系

meanings.meaning_en: a small furry animal with a pointed nose and a long tail that lives in people’s houses or in fields
meanings.example: The cat laid a dead mouse at my feet.
meanings.example_cn: 猫把一只死老鼠放在我的脚边。

meanings.meaning_en: the special skill that someone uses to make something beautiful with their hands
meanings.example: high standards of craftsmanship
meanings.example_cn: 很高的工艺水准

meanings.meaning_en: an animal, especially a large or dangerous one
meanings.example: You beast! Let go!
meanings.example_cn: 你这畜生，放开我！

meanings.meaning_en: a close relationship between two things because of qualities or features that they share

meanings.example: Next, move to the diagonal section at the back-right side of the diamond.
meanings.example_cn: 下一个,在钻石的背面-正确的边移到对角线的区段。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone feel extremely tired
meanings.example: A full day’s teaching exhausts me.
meanings.example_cn: 讲一整天课令我精疲力竭。

meanings.meaning_en: if there is a resemblance between two people or things, they are similar, especially in the way they look
meanings.example: There was a remarkable resemblance between him and Pete.
meanings.example_cn: 他和皮特有一个惊人的相似之处。

meanings.meaning_en: not traditional; unconventional
meanings.example: nontraditional lifestyles

meanings.meaning_en: to show that something is wrong or not true
meanings.example: These figures disproved Smith’s argument.
meanings.example_cn: 这些数据证明史密斯的论点是错误的。

meanings.example: So how do we strengthen our skeptical skills?
meanings.example_cn: 那么，我们如何加强自身的怀疑技能呢？

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of clothing that covers the upper part of your body and your arms, usually has a collar, and is fastened at the front by buttons
meanings.example: I have to wear a shirt and tie to work.
meanings.example_cn: 我上班要穿衬衫打领带。

meanings.meaning_en: a situation in which there is a lot of food and goods available for people
meanings.example: a land of plenty
meanings.example_cn: 一片富饶的土地

meanings.example: Try to dress appropriately for each occasion.
meanings.example_cn: 试图为每个场合适当地打扮。

meanings.meaning_en: If something is freshly made or done, it has been recently made or done
meanings.example: ...freshly baked bread.
meanings.example_cn: …刚烤出的面包。

meanings.example: It is unbelievable, but I like that.
meanings.example_cn: 这很难以置信，但是我喜欢它。

meanings.meaning_en: things that are simultaneous happen at exactly the same time
meanings.example: They grabbed each other’s hands in simultaneous panic.
meanings.example_cn: 他们俩同时惊慌起来，相互抓住对方的手。

meanings.meaning_en: to cause a particular physical condition
meanings.example: Patients with eating disorders may use drugs to induce vomiting.
meanings.example_cn: 患有进食障碍的人可使用药物催吐。

meanings.meaning_en: a person who works in wood, such as a carpenter, joiner, or cabinet-maker
meanings.example: Recalling the talented woodworker, the finest tools are useless without the creative application of a trained and talented artisan.
meanings.example_cn: 回到前面的木工身上，如果没有天赋和相关的培训，最好的工具也没有用处。

meanings.meaning_en: an informal talk in which people exchange news, feelings, and thoughts
meanings.example: a telephone conversation
meanings.example_cn: 电话交谈

meanings.meaning_en: to change written or spoken words into another language
meanings.example: Poetry doesn’t usually translate well.
meanings.example_cn: 诗歌通常都译不好。

meanings.meaning_en: a business deal or action, such as buying or selling something
meanings.example: The bank charges a fixed rate for each transaction.
meanings.example_cn: 银行对每一笔业务收取固定费用。

meanings.meaning_en: very keen and excited about something that is going to happen or about something you want to do
meanings.example: He’s a bright kid and eager to learn.
meanings.example_cn: 他是个聪明的孩子，热爱学习。

meanings.example: With a skillful movement he rounded the small fishing-boat.
meanings.example_cn: 他以灵巧的动作使小渔船调过头来。

meanings.meaning_en: the things that happen to someone or something, especially unpleasant things that end their existence or end a particular period
meanings.example: I wouldn’t wish such a fate on my worst enemy.
meanings.example_cn: 就算是我不共戴天的仇敌，我也不希望他遭遇这样的命运。

meanings.meaning_en: something that you own or have with you at a particular time
meanings.example: He had sold all his possessions and left the country.
meanings.example_cn: 他变卖所有财产后离境了。

meanings.meaning_en: if something invariably happens or is invariably true, it always happens or is true
meanings.example: It invariably rains when I go there.
meanings.example_cn: 我每次去那儿都下雨。

meanings.meaning_cn: 巴比伦人(的), 巴比伦语（的）
meanings.meaning_en: an inhabitant of ancient Babylon or Babylonia
meanings.example: It allowed Hebrew society and Judaism to strengthen for another crucial century—by which time the Babylonian king Nebuchadrezzar could banish the Hebrew people but not obliterate them or their faith.
meanings.example_cn: 它使得希伯莱社会和犹太教在关键的一个世纪内不断强大。 在这重要的时间内，巴比伦王尼布甲尼最多撒流放希伯莱人，而无法消灭他们，抑或扼杀他们的信仰。

meanings.meaning_en: Urbanization is the process of creating cities or towns in country areas
meanings.example: Much of this, she says, is due to increased urbanization.
meanings.example_cn: 而这些，主要是由于不断增加的都市化造成的。

meanings.meaning_en: a vehicle for passengers, which travels along metal tracks in the street
meanings.example: You can get to the beach easily from the centre of town by tram.
meanings.example_cn: 你可以很容易地在市中心坐有轨电车到达海滩。

meanings.example: But no one knew where the sulfur came from.
meanings.example_cn: 但是，没有人知道硫来自何处。

meanings.meaning_en: a line of colour, especially one of several lines of colour all close together
meanings.example: a shirt with black and white stripes
meanings.example_cn: 黑白条纹衬衫

meanings.example: All of us ought to go.
meanings.example_cn: 我们大家都应该去。

meanings.meaning_cn: 动荡不定的,反复无常的
meanings.meaning_en: a volatile situation is likely to change suddenly and without warning
meanings.example: an increasingly volatile political situation
meanings.example_cn: 日益动荡的政治局势

meanings.example: The most densely developed areas appear white and gray, while suburban areas appear grayish green—a mixture of houses, streets, and lawns.
meanings.example_cn: 图中人口最稠密的发达地区呈现为白色或灰色，郊区则是由房屋、街道和草坪组成的灰绿色。

meanings.meaning_en: a book that tells what has happened in someone’s life, written by someone else
meanings.example: ...recent biographies of Stalin.
meanings.example_cn: …近年的斯大林传记。

meanings.meaning_en: to carefully cut, print, or write words on something, especially on the surface of a stone or coin
meanings.example: Inside the cover someone had inscribed the words ‘To Thomas, with love’.
meanings.example_cn: 在书的内封上，有人题写了“托马斯惠存”几个字。

meanings.meaning_en: happening between two or more cities, or going from one city to another
meanings.example: intercity rivalry
meanings.example_cn: 城市之间的竞争

meanings.example: We use the whiteboards alongside one of the walls, where you just write down your name if you have a question.
meanings.example_cn: 用其中一面墙壁旁边的白色书写板，如果有问题，你只要在那里写下你的名字。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is erratic does not follow any pattern or plan but happens in a way that is not regular
meanings.example: His breathing was becoming erratic.
meanings.example_cn: 他的呼吸越来越不均匀。

meanings.meaning_en: Overly means more than is normal, necessary, or reasonable
meanings.example: Employers may become overly cautious about taking on new staff.
meanings.example_cn: 雇主在雇用新员工的问题上可能会过于谨慎。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone feel happier
meanings.example: We need a little something to help sometimes, to uplift us and make us feel better.
meanings.example_cn: 我们有时需要一些事来帮助我们打起精神并且让我们感觉好点儿。

meanings.meaning_en: the amount of time that you spend working in a day
meanings.example: a 10-hour workday
meanings.example_cn: 十小时工作日

meanings.meaning_en: having a bright yellow colour like gold
meanings.example: golden hair
meanings.example_cn: 金发

meanings.example: The new church was officially opened on July 5th.
meanings.example_cn: 新教堂于7月5日正式启用。

meanings.meaning_en: when you decide not to have something valuable, in order to get something that is more important
meanings.example: The minister stressed the need for economic sacrifice.
meanings.example_cn: 部长强调了在经济上作出牺牲的必要性。

meanings.meaning_en: something you do in order to deceive someone
meanings.example: Pretending he doesn’t remember is an old trick of his.
meanings.example_cn: 假装不记得是他的老花招了。

meanings.meaning_en: to deceive someone in order to get something from them or to make them do something
meanings.example: He didn’t really lose his wallet - that’s just a trick.
meanings.example_cn: 他并没有真的丢了钱包——这只是一个骗局。

meanings.meaning_en: a song or tune
meanings.example: They played some lovely melodies.
meanings.example_cn: 他们演奏了一些动听的曲子。

meanings.meaning_en: a set of numbers or signs, or of computer memory units, arranged in lines across or down
meanings.example: We visited the local markets and saw wonderful arrays of fruit and vegetables.
meanings.example_cn: 我们参观了当地的市场，看到了漂亮地摆放着的水果蔬菜。

meanings.meaning_en: a storm with thunder and lightning
meanings.example: We enjoyed the picnic until a thunderstorm intervened.
meanings.example_cn: 一场暴风雨影响了我们野餐时的兴致。

meanings.meaning_en: a small green animal that lives near water and has long legs for jumping
meanings.example: The tadpole has become a frog.
meanings.example_cn: 这个蝌蚪已长成青蛙。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of deliberately making someone believe something that is not true
meanings.example: She didn’t have the courage to admit to her deception.
meanings.example_cn: 她没有勇气承认自己的欺骗行为。

meanings.meaning_cn: 喀嚓折断,拍快照 n吧嗒声
meanings.meaning_en: If something snaps or if you snap it, it breaks suddenly, usually with a sharp cracking noise
meanings.example: He shifted his weight and a twig snapped.
meanings.example_cn: 他挪了挪身子，一根树枝随即喀嚓一声折断了。

meanings.meaning_en: If something or someone typifies a situation or type of thing or person, they have all the usual characteristics of it and are a typical example of it
meanings.example: These two buildings typify the rich extremes of local architecture.
meanings.example_cn: 这两座建筑物代表着当地建筑风格的迥异。

meanings.meaning_en: in a gentle way
meanings.example: ‘You go back to bed now,’ he said gently.
meanings.example_cn: “你回去睡觉吧。”他温柔地说道。

meanings.meaning_en: astronomical prices, costs etc are extremely high
meanings.example: Houses in the subdivision are going for astronomical prices.
meanings.example_cn: 该小区里的房子在以天价出售。

meanings.meaning_en: to calculate the value of something and express it as a number or an amount
meanings.example: an attempt to quantify the region’s social and economic decline
meanings.example_cn: 对该地区社会和经济衰退进行量化的尝试

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone suddenly surprised or slightly shocked
meanings.example: Sorry, I didn’t mean to startle you.
meanings.example_cn: 抱歉，我不是故意吓你一跳的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 游隼 a外来的,移住的
meanings.example: Fringe benefits here include a cigar club, the fastest lifts in the world, and the chance to snap peregrine falcons as they migrate past your no doubt hermetically sealed expanse of window.
meanings.example_cn: 这里的额外好处包括了一个雪茄俱乐部，世界上最快速的电梯，以及当游隼迁徙飞过你的绝对密封的巨大玻璃窗户时，抓住它们的机会。

meanings.meaning_en: the best or most suitable
meanings.example: If you find yourself waiting to be great, yearning for the optimal time when you can “afford” to do more, then you are saying at some level, if you can’t help everyone, you help no one.
meanings.example_cn: 如果你发现自己等着变得伟大 渴望着最佳时间当你可以 负担得起 去做更多事情的时候 那么在一定程度上说，如果你不能帮助每个人，你对谁都没有好处。

meanings.meaning_en: a large piece of heavy cloth on which coloured threads are woven to produce a picture, pattern etc
meanings.example: a colourful tapestry depicting a hunting scene
meanings.example_cn: 描绘狩猎场面的彩色壁毯

meanings.meaning_en: to make something smooth, bright, and shiny by rubbing it
meanings.example: I spent all afternoon polishing the silver.
meanings.example_cn: 我整个下午都在擦拭银器。

meanings.meaning_en: the natural ability, skill, or power that makes a machine, person, or organization able to do something, especially something difficult
meanings.example: the country’s manufacturing capability
meanings.example_cn: 该国的生产能力

meanings.example: We are speeding up the mechanization of our agriculture.
meanings.example_cn: 我们正在加快农业机械化的步伐。

meanings.meaning_en: the arrival of large numbers of people or large amounts of money, goods etc, especially suddenly
meanings.example: ...problems caused by the influx of refugees.
meanings.example_cn: …难民大量涌入所造成的问题。

meanings.meaning_en: Sculptural means relating to sculpture
meanings.example: He enjoyed working with clay as a sculptural form.
meanings.example_cn: 他喜欢用黏土来做雕塑。

meanings.meaning_cn: 镇定的,平静的 v(使)平静
meanings.meaning_en: relaxed and quiet, not angry, nervous, or upset
meanings.example: Glen was calm and composed at the funeral.
meanings.example_cn: 格伦在葬礼上表现得平静而镇定。

meanings.meaning_en: to officially tell people about something, especially about a plan or a decision
meanings.example: They announced their engagement in ‘The Times’.
meanings.example_cn: 他们在《泰晤士报》上宣布了订婚的消息。

meanings.meaning_en: time when you are not working or studying and can relax and do things you enjoy
meanings.example: Most people now enjoy shorter working hours and more leisure time.
meanings.example_cn: 现在大多数人都喜欢工作时间短些，闲暇时间多些。

meanings.meaning_en: the most basic and important quality of something
meanings.example: In essence his message was very simple.
meanings.example_cn: 实质上他想表达的意思很简单。

meanings.meaning_en: a large area of land such as a continent
meanings.example: Veiled beneath the Persian Gulf, a once-fertile landmass may have supported some of the earliest humans outside Africa some 75,000 to 100,000 years ago, a new review of research suggests.
meanings.example_cn: 一项新的研究评论表明，在波斯湾的海底，也许存在过一片肥沃的土地，它曾在约75,000到100,000年前供养着除非洲大陆之外最早的人类先祖。

meanings.meaning_en: a small sea creature that you can eat, which has ten legs and a soft shell
decoration on an object that makes it look attractive
meanings.example: a bronze plate with gold ornamentation
meanings.example_cn: 带有金饰的青铜盘子

meanings.meaning_en: without anyone stopping or limiting something
meanings.example: the country’s first freely elected president
meanings.example_cn: 该国首位自由选举产生的总统

meanings.meaning_en: something or someone that is undesirable is not welcome or wanted because they may affect a situation or person in a bad way
meanings.example: punishment of undesirable behaviour
meanings.example_cn: 对不良行为的惩罚

meanings.meaning_en: a round object with a map of the Earth drawn on it
meanings.example: We export our goods all over the globe.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的商品出口到世界各地。

meanings.meaning_en: an insect that has long back legs for jumping and that makes short loud noises
meanings.example: One day a grasshopper came upon an ant at work in a garden.
meanings.example_cn: 一天， 蚱蜢碰到了一只正在花园里干活的蚂蚁。

meanings.meaning_en: beautiful, attractive, or graceful
meanings.example: a tall, elegant young woman
meanings.example_cn: 身材高挑、举止优雅的年轻女子

meanings.meaning_en: smooth and bright
meanings.example: shiny black shoes
meanings.example_cn: 锃亮的黑皮鞋

meanings.example: A glassmaker places a rounded piece of clay material on the end of a long metal stick.
meanings.example_cn: 一个玻璃制造商的地方长的金属棍年底的粘土材料的圆形片。

meanings.meaning_cn: 壮观地, 令人吃惊地
卫星导航系统(供氮系统)

meanings.meaning_en: to cover something completely with water or another liquid
meanings.example: The tunnel entrance was submerged by rising sea water.
meanings.example_cn: 隧道入口被涨起的海水淹没。

meanings.meaning_en: the technical words or expressions that are used in a particular subject
meanings.example: computer terminology
meanings.example_cn: 计算机术语

meanings.meaning_en: difficult to understand or be sure about, so that there is doubt or confusion
meanings.example: The terms of the contract are very unclear.
meanings.example_cn: 合同的条款非常含糊。

meanings.meaning_en: not important
meanings.example: unimportant details
meanings.example_cn: 无关紧要的细枝末节

meanings.meaning_en: seeming to be everywhere – sometimes used humorously
meanings.example: Coffee shops are ubiquitous these days.
meanings.example_cn: 如今好像到处都是咖啡馆。

meanings.meaning_en: death
meanings.example: the mystery surrounding Elena’s untimely demise
meanings.example_cn: 埃琳娜猝然早逝之谜

meanings.meaning_en: very easy to notice
meanings.example: The notice must be displayed in a conspicuous place.
meanings.example_cn: 通告一定要贴在显眼的地方。

meanings.meaning_en: a mistake
meanings.example: an error message
meanings.example_cn: 出错信息

meanings.meaning_en: likely to cause death
meanings.example: a deadly poison
meanings.example_cn: 致命的毒药

meanings.meaning_en: to exchange goods, work, or services for other goods or services rather than for money
meanings.example: They have been bartering wheat for cotton and timber.
meanings.example_cn: 他们一直在用小麦交换棉花和木材。

meanings.meaning_en: nomadic people are nomads
meanings.example: nomadic herdsmen
meanings.example_cn: 游牧民

meanings.meaning_en: to combine, or to join things together to form one thing
meanings.example: The company plans to merge its subsidiaries in the US.
meanings.example_cn: 该公司计划合并其在美国的几家子公司。

meanings.meaning_en: the land at the edge of the sea, consisting of sand and rocks
meanings.example: She takes her inspiration from shells and stones she finds on the seashore.
meanings.example_cn: 她从她在海岸边发现的贝壳和石头里获取灵感。

meanings.meaning_en: Nonhuman means not human or not produced by humans
meanings.example: Hostility towards outsiders is characteristic of both human and nonhuman animals.
meanings.example_cn: 敌视外来者是人类和其他动物共有的特征。

meanings.meaning_en: a small house in the country
meanings.example: a country cottage
meanings.example_cn: 乡间小屋

meanings.meaning_en: an open space on which a  fair21  takes place
meanings.example: Measuring appeal is as exact a science as guessing the number of sweets in a jar at the fairground.
meanings.example_cn: 对吸引力的衡量就像猜测露天游乐场中一个罐子里有多少糖果一样充满“技术性”。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something longer or to become longer
meanings.example: Can you lengthen this skirt for me?
meanings.example_cn: 你能不能帮我把这条裙子改长？

meanings.meaning_en: a stick of  wax  with a string through the middle, which you burn to give light
meanings.example: The candle flickered in the wind.
meanings.example_cn: 烛光在风中闪烁不定。

meanings.meaning_en: a unit for measuring weight, equal to 1,000 grams
meanings.example: ...a parcel weighing around 4.5 kilograms.
meanings.example_cn: …一个重约4.5公斤的包裹。

meanings.meaning_en: a style of art or literature which tries to show the world and people exactly as they are
meanings.example: Still, I sympathize with one motive behind naturalism — the aspiration to think in a scientific spirit.
meanings.example_cn: 尽管如此，我还是支持自然主义背后的一个动机——用科学精神来思考的渴望。

meanings.meaning_en: information that is put into a computer
meanings.example: If the input data specified it, the file will close and the process terminates.
meanings.example_cn: 如果输入数据指定，该文件就会关闭，数据处理终止。

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling of great pleasure and satisfaction
meanings.example: Her fabulous recipes will delight anyone who loves chocolate.
meanings.example_cn: 她那些绝妙的配方将使每一个爱吃巧克力的人感到愉悦。

meanings.meaning_en: an old-fashioned method of sending messages using radio or electrical signals
meanings.example: Once he knew where we were, Lewis telegraphed every few hours.
meanings.example_cn: 一知道我们在哪里，刘易斯就每隔几小时发一份电报来。

meanings.meaning_en: an opinion that is stated publicly
meanings.example: a fighting stance
meanings.example_cn: 搏击姿势

meanings.meaning_en: the room where you prepare and cook food
meanings.example: Sam went into the kitchen to make a pot of tea.
meanings.example_cn: 萨姆走进厨房去沏一壶茶。

meanings.example: He devilled her during the tour.
meanings.example_cn: 他在旅行中拿她打趣逗乐。

meanings.meaning_en: a tree which grows mainly in northern countries such as Canada. Its leaves have five points and turn red or gold in autumn.
meanings.example: ...a solid maple worktop.
meanings.example_cn: …一张结实的枫木工作台。

meanings.meaning_en: a very strong and painful movement of a muscle, especially the muscles around the  womb  during birth
meanings.example: the contraction of metal as it cools
meanings.example_cn: 金属冷却时的收缩

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of metal fastened to a door, lid etc that allows it to swing open and shut
meanings.example: The wider the hinge, the further it folds.
meanings.example_cn: 铰链角度越大，它能折的距离越远。

meanings.meaning_en: of or relating to living organisms
meanings.example: The researchers think that their biotic games could be educational to help people learn about biology, and they also think that such a forum could serve as a place to conduct real experiments.
meanings.example_cn: 研究人员认为他们的生物游戏有教育意义，可以帮助人们学习生物知识，他们还认为这样的论坛可以作为进行真实实验的场地。

meanings.meaning_en: the quality of behaving in a sensible way like an adult
meanings.example: Beth shows a maturity way beyond her 16 years.
meanings.example_cn: 贝丝表现出一种远远超出她16岁年龄的成熟。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is honest always tells the truth and does not cheat or steal
meanings.example: He was a hard-working, honest man.
meanings.example_cn: 他勤奋老实。

meanings.meaning_en: wood that has been cut or collected in order to be burned in a fire
meanings.example: Young Geoffrey made money by chopping and selling firewood.
meanings.example_cn: 年轻的杰弗里靠砍柴卖柴挣钱。

meanings.meaning_cn: [农]谷仓, 畜棚, 畜舍, 机器房

something that you say or do to make people laugh, especially a funny story or trick
meanings.example: I couldn’t go out with someone for a joke, could you?
meanings.example_cn: 我可不能拿谈恋爱当儿戏，对不对？

meanings.meaning_en: consisting of granules

meanings.example_cn: ...一种粒状化肥。

meanings.meaning_cn: 未工业化的, 工业化前的
meanings.example: Am I suggesting that we should return to the preindustrial mode of production or to nineteenth-century "free enterprise" capitalism?
meanings.example_cn: 我是否在建议我们应回到工业化前的生产模式或回到十九世纪"自由企业"资本主义时期呢？

meanings.meaning_en: a period of warm weather during which snow and ice melt
meanings.example: The thaw begins in March.
meanings.example_cn: 解冻期从3月份开始。

meanings.meaning_en: a place where large amounts of stone or sand are dug out of the ground

meanings.example_cn: 板岩采石场

meanings.meaning_en: to dig stone or sand from a quarry

meanings.meaning_cn: 动物行动学, 人种学
meanings.meaning_en: the study of the behaviour of animals in their normal environment
meanings.example: On the next page, we'll delve into the world of ethology .
meanings.example_cn: 下面一页我们将探究一下动物行为学的世界。

meanings.meaning_en: a small change, improvement, or addition that is made to a law or document, or the process of doing this

meanings.example_cn: 宪法修正案

meanings.meaning_en: wanting to know about something

meanings.example_cn: 小狗天生好奇。

meanings.meaning_en: a strong feeling of trust or confidence in someone or something
meanings.example: People have lost faith in the government.
meanings.example_cn: 人们已失去了对政府的信心。

meanings.meaning_en: to go past a moving vehicle or person because you are going faster than them and want to get in front of them
meanings.example: He pulled out to overtake the van.
meanings.example_cn: 他把车驶出所在车道想超过那辆小货车。

meanings.meaning_en: the part of your body that joins your head to your shoulders, or the same part of an animal or bird
meanings.example: Mike rubbed the back of his neck.
meanings.example_cn: 迈克揉了揉后颈。

meanings.meaning_en: a substance of a low quality that is contained in or mixed with something else, making it less pure
meanings.example: All natural minerals contain impurities.
meanings.example_cn: 凡天然矿物都含有杂质。

meanings.meaning_en: very powerful or impressive, and often frightening
meanings.example: The building is grey, formidable, not at all picturesque.
meanings.example_cn: 那幢建筑呈灰色，气势凛然，与漂亮沾不上边。

meanings.meaning_en: good enough to be used for a particular purpose or to be considered satisfactory
meanings.example: Students who achieve an acceptable standard will progress to degree studies.
meanings.example_cn: 达到一定程度的学生可以进一步攻读学位。

meanings.meaning_en: (esp of something threatening) to be about to happen; be imminent

meanings.example: One animal captured on video looks like a flower, covered with glasslike needles, but scientists think it is probably a carnivorous sponge.
meanings.example_cn: 在视频中拍摄到的一种动物看上去像是朵花，覆盖着玻璃状的针，不过科学家认为这可能是一种食肉海绵。

meanings.meaning_en: not trans-parent, but clear enough to allow light to pass through

meanings.example_cn: 她半透明的皮肤下青筋显现。

meanings.meaning_en: the upper level of soil in which most plants have their roots

meanings.example_cn: 把表土倒在这里。

meanings.meaning_en: a connection between two things that makes them affect each other

meanings.example_cn: ...失业、犯罪和监禁之间的相互关系。

meanings.meaning_en: the flat cutting part of a tool or weapon

meanings.example_cn: 剃刀刀片

meanings.meaning_en: a type of small bag in or on a coat, trousers etc that you can put money, keys etc in

meanings.example_cn: 卢克走了进来，双手插在口袋里。

meanings.meaning_en: the sloping side of a hill

meanings.example_cn: 飞机在山坡上坠毁。

meanings.meaning_en: next to or very close to the side of someone or something

meanings.example_cn: 温迪走过来，坐在我身边。

meanings.meaning_en: to pay money, usually once a year, to have copies of a newspaper or magazine sent to you, or to have some other service

meanings.example_cn: 我订阅《新科学家》的主要原因是要跟上科学的进步。

meanings.meaning_en: someone or something that protects one thing or person from being harmed by another
meanings.example: Keep savings as a buffer against unexpected cash needs.
meanings.example_cn: 备有存款来作为急需现金时的缓冲。

meanings.meaning_en: To embody an idea or quality means to be a symbol or expression of that idea or quality

meanings.example_cn: 杰克•肯尼迪体现了20世纪60年代的全部希望。

meanings.meaning_en: having feelings of pleasure, for example because something good has happened to you or you are very satisfied with your life

meanings.example_cn: 房子很漂亮，我们住在这里非常开心。

meanings.meaning_en: the system that allows millions of computer users around the world to exchange information

meanings.example_cn: 布鲁斯晚上大多在网上浏览信息。

meanings.meaning_en: Litter is rubbish or waste that is left lying around outside

meanings.example_cn: 如果你看到走廊里有垃圾，就把它捡起来。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is not accepted as a member of a particular social group

meanings.example_cn: 我是个外人，是这群人里唯一的外国女人。

meanings.meaning_en: a generally white or grey mineral, found in sedimentary rocks and as deposits from hot springs. Composition: calcium carbonate. Formula: CaCO3. Crystal structure: orthorhombic
meanings.example: So will corals, especially those whose skeletons are composed of aragonite, a particularly unstable form of calcium carbonate.
meanings.example_cn: 珊瑚礁对此也受到同样的危险，对于骨骼由霰石（极不稳定的碳酸钙）构成的珊瑚来说，情况更是如此。

meanings.meaning_en: the quality of being suitable or useful for a particular purpose, especially by making something easier or saving you time
meanings.example: Ready meals sell well because of their convenience.
meanings.example_cn: 即食餐因为方便销路好。

meanings.meaning_en: a move to a more important job or position in a company or organization

meanings.example_cn: 我想要一份有良好晋升机会的工作。

meanings.meaning_en: Something that remains unaltered has not changed or been changed

meanings.example_cn: 从那时起公寓的其余部分就幸运地未曾改变过。

meanings.meaning_en: if you take a bath, you wash your body in a bath

meanings.example_cn: 我露营了一个星期，实在得洗个澡了。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the direction in which something is pointing or moving

meanings.example_cn: 除非给他配备一个定向扬声器，否则谁也听不见他。

meanings.meaning_en: showing strong feelings of love

meanings.example_cn: “我过生日时汤姆总是给我送红玫瑰。”“多浪漫啊！”

meanings.meaning_en: a treeless area has no trees in it

meanings.example_cn: 寸木不生的地貌

meanings.meaning_en: A recorder is a machine or instrument that keeps a record of something, for example in an experiment or on a vehicle

meanings.example_cn: 数据记录仪器也能很快查明机械故障，减少维修时间。

meanings.meaning_en: A seller of a type of thing is a person or company that sells that type of thing

meanings.example_cn: …一个卖花的人。

meanings.meaning_en: Plunge is also a noun

meanings.meaning_en: to completely get rid of something such as a disease or a social problem

meanings.example_cn: 为消除通货膨胀所作的努力

meanings.example_cn: 大部分的印度上层种姓都信奉卡莉女神。

meanings.meaning_en: to receive money, property etc from someone after they have died

meanings.example_cn: 继承的财富

meanings.meaning_en: a young  goose
officially

meanings.example_cn: 我们宣布了一个决定，正式承认新政府。

meanings.meaning_cn: 嘎嘎作响n咯咯声;吵闹声

meanings.example_cn: 丹砰砰地敲她的门，还把门把手拽得咯吱作响。

meanings.meaning_en: a house, especially a large or official one

meanings.example_cn: 大使官邸

meanings.example: That's an antecedent standard. Moral desert.
meanings.example_cn: 道德应得，那是一个先行标准。

meanings.example_cn: 一些患者指出，病灶出现在先前的创伤部位。

meanings.meaning_en: a pointed piece of wood, metal etc, especially one that is pushed into the ground to support something or mark a particular place

meanings.example_cn: 已对某些被怀疑有不忠行为的官员提出指控。

meanings.meaning_en: the state of being completely certain

meanings.example_cn: 这一结果完全无法确切预测。

meanings.meaning_en: an antibiotic obtained from the bacterium Streptomyces noursei: used in the treatment of infections caused by certain fungi, esp Candida albicans

meanings.example_cn: 这份文件是由卫生部汇编的。

meanings.meaning_en: very large or great in a surprising or impressive way

meanings.example_cn: 那位艺术家惊人的高产

meanings.example: This work is clearly connected with The Last Supper: the Christ has the same ethereal and elusive quality as the faded figure at the centre of Leonardo's sublime mural.
meanings.example_cn: 这幅画显然和《最后的晚餐》有某种关联：画中的基督，和达·芬奇最伟大的壁画中心那已褪色的基督形象一样，同样空灵缥缈。

meanings.meaning_en: a structure from which water is pushed up into the air, used for example as decoration in a garden or park

meanings.example_cn: …第16街商业区的喷泉。

meanings.example_cn: 信息收集者

meanings.example: In fact, he once took a hiatus from acting to study shoemaking.
meanings.example_cn: 事实上，他曾经一度中断演艺生涯跑去学习制鞋。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is generous is willing to give money, spend time etc, in order to help people or give them pleasure

meanings.example_cn: 一大杯葡萄酒

meanings.meaning_en: one of the coloured parts of a flower that are shaped like leaves

meanings.example_cn: 玫瑰花瓣

meanings.example: However, if the inhabitants are technologically inferior, you should find a small tribe of primitives as soon as possible.
meanings.example_cn: 然而，如果这些居民的科技次于地球，你应该尽快找到一个小的原始部落。

meanings.meaning_en: a brittle crystalline grey element that is a semiconducting metalloid, occurring principally in zinc ores and argyrodite: used in transistors, as a catalyst, and to strengthen and harden alloys
meanings.example: It s also the first germanium laser to operate at room temperature.
meanings.example_cn: 这同样也是第一速在室温下得到控制的锗激光。

meanings.meaning_en: the degree to which something can reasonably be expected to happen

meanings.example_cn: 如果我拒绝，那我十有八九会丢掉工作。

meanings.meaning_en: to pay a company for the use of their aircraft, boat etc

meanings.example_cn: 我们包了一条船带我们到一些较小的岛上去。

meanings.meaning_en: the entrance to a room or building, or the area of floor or ground at the entrance

meanings.example_cn: 她打开门，跨过门槛。

meanings.meaning_en: existing only in small amounts

meanings.example_cn: 他那稀疏的棕色头发

meanings.meaning_en: statues

meanings.example_cn: 一批精美的希腊雕塑藏品

meanings.meaning_en: any of the filaments that constitute the body (mycelium) of a fungus

meanings.example_cn: 双核某种真菌中的状态，在这种真菌中，每个菌丝体都含有两个核，而每个核都是从不同的母体上衍生的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 有先见之明的, 远视的
meanings.meaning_en: If you describe someone as farsighted, you admire them because they understand what is likely to happen in the future, and therefore make wise decisions and plans
meanings.example: Haven't farsighted economists been telling us that in the future we will work less, not more?
meanings.example_cn: 有远见的经济学家们不是一直在告诉我们，将来我们会工作得更少而不是更多吗？

meanings.meaning_en: If you say that someone is fattening something such as a business or its profits, you mean that they are increasing the value of the business or its profits, in a way that you disapprove of
meanings.example: They have kept the price of sugar artificially high and so fattened the company's profits.
meanings.example_cn: 他们一直人为地使糖价居高不下，以此为公司牟利。

meanings.meaning_en: the watery liquid that is produced in your mouth
meanings.example: And ink from soot and spit.
meanings.example_cn: 墨水用煤灰和唾液来做。

meanings.meaning_en: to move along on your hands and knees with your body close to the ground

meanings.example_cn: 车辆放慢速度，缓缓行进。

meanings.meaning_en: careful to avoid danger or risks

meanings.example_cn: 一位谨慎的司机

meanings.meaning_en: a very large area of water, sky, land etc

meanings.example_cn: 文华东方的游泳池在现实中是很小的，只适合快速浸泡一下......一点都不像宣传照片上那一大片宽阔的蓝色水域。

meanings.meaning_cn: 黎明 vi破晓,开始出现
meanings.meaning_en: the time at the beginning of the day when light first appears
meanings.example: When dawn broke (= the first light of the day appeared ) , we were still 50 miles from Calcutta.
meanings.example_cn: 破晓的时候，我们离加尔各答还有50英里。

meanings.meaning_en: a small vehicle with four wheels in which a baby can lie down while it is being pushed
meanings.example: a young woman pushing a pram
meanings.example_cn: 推着婴儿车的年轻女子

meanings.meaning_en: to remove dirty or harmful substances from something
meanings.example: chemicals used to purify the water
meanings.example_cn: 用于净化水质的化学品

meanings.meaning_en: If you describe something or someone as wonderful, you think they are extremely good
meanings.example: The cold, misty air felt wonderful on his face.
meanings.example_cn: 那凉凉的雾气使他脸上感觉好极了。

meanings.meaning_en: an ancient language of India

meanings.example_cn: 他们从波斯人那里得知的名字，而波斯人是依次从梵文、从印第安人他们自己得知的名字。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the orbit of one object around another

meanings.example_cn: 地球的运行轨道

meanings.meaning_en: to leave a job, school etc, especially without finishing it completely

meanings.example_cn: 他和一个同事争吵后就辞职了。

meanings.meaning_en: if a problem, difficulty etc confronts you, it appears and needs to be dealt with

meanings.example_cn: 新政府面临的难题是巨大的。

meanings.meaning_en: an animal like a large cow, with hair on its head and shoulders
meanings.example: Sixty acres of woods and ponds are home to camels, zebra, bison, water buffalo, ostrich and antelope.
meanings.example_cn: 六十英亩的森林和池塘是骆驼，斑马，野牛，水牛，鸵鸟和羚羊的家园。

meanings.meaning_cn: 希克索斯王朝(古埃及王朝之一)
meanings.meaning_en: a member of a nomadic Asian people, probably Semites, who controlled Egypt from 1720 bc until 1560 bc
involving a lot of strength and effort

meanings.example: Imagine trying to balance a chest of drawers on just one of its legs, on top of a boulder, and you get an idea of what Gray gets up to.
meanings.example_cn: 想像自己尝试仅仅依靠衣柜的一个腿把它平稳地放到一个大圆石上，你就知道格雷达到了什么境界。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is given the title ‘saint’ by the Christian church after they have died, because they have been very good or holy
meanings.example: Saint Patrick
meanings.example_cn: 圣帕特里克

meanings.meaning_en: A bathhouse is a public or private building containing baths and often other facilities such as a sauna
meanings.example: For personal hygiene, Wang and her family go to a public bathhouse in the neighborhood.
meanings.example_cn: 至于个人卫生问题，王秀丽一家去附近的公共澡堂洗澡。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a liquid weaker by adding water or another liquid
meanings.example: diluted fruit juice
meanings.example_cn: 稀释的果汁

meanings.meaning_en: mainly
meanings.example: The money is principally invested in stocks and shares.
meanings.example_cn: 这笔钱主要投资于股票。

meanings.meaning_en: a lack of a fair or correct balance between two things, which results in problems or unfairness
meanings.example: a hormonal imbalance
meanings.example_cn: 内分泌失调

meanings.meaning_en: to form ions or make them form
meanings.example: So if we can figure out the binding energy, we can also figure out how much energy we have to put into our atom in order to a eject or ionize an electron.
meanings.example_cn: 所以如果我们可以计算出结合能，我们也可以计算出,我们需要注入多少能量到原子中,去逐出或电离一个电子。

meanings.meaning_en: the process of entering another country in order to live there permanently
meanings.example: He called for a common European policy on immigration.
meanings.example_cn: 他要求欧洲国家实施共同的移民政策。

meanings.meaning_en: when you are so anxious, nervous, or upset that you cannot think calmly
meanings.example: She was in a state of considerable agitation.
meanings.example_cn: 她处于相当焦虑的状态。

meanings.meaning_en: vivid memories, dreams, descriptions etc are so clear that they seem real

meanings.example_cn: 我对那年夏天记忆犹新。

meanings.meaning_en: to make it necessary for you to do something

meanings.example_cn: 由于缺乏资金，只能改变计划。

meanings.meaning_en: You use Hollywood to refer to the film industry that is based in Hollywood, California

meanings.example_cn: ...一家好莱坞大制片厂。

meanings.meaning_en: the situation or experience of being poor

meanings.example_cn: 数百万老年人生活在贫困之中。

meanings.meaning_en: a flower or the flowers on a tree or bush

meanings.example_cn: 淡粉色的花朵

meanings.meaning_en: if trees blossom, they produce flowers
meanings.example: The cherry tree was covered in blossom.
meanings.example_cn: 樱桃树花满枝头。

meanings.example: She accidentally erased the tape.
meanings.example_cn: 她意外地抹去了录了音的磁带。

meanings.meaning_en: the industry of making ships

meanings.meaning_en: a situation in which two people or groups have had a serious disagreement and begun to dislike and not trust each other

meanings.example_cn: 他着手弥合党内的裂痕。

meanings.meaning_en: a thin metal container that is fastened to a wall and through which hot water passes to provide heat for a room

meanings.meaning_en: very many

meanings.meaning_en: a musical instrument like a piano, that was played especially in the past

meanings.example_cn: 它被称作古钢琴。 这是一个被动语态的句子。

meanings.meaning_en: a type of  fossil  of a small sea creature

meanings.example_cn: 它看起来像一只电子三叶虫，当你在电脑上阅读蒸汽朋克小说的时候，这款鼠标用起来准让你爱不释手。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of equipment that changes the form of something, especially so that it can be more easily used

meanings.example_cn: 让你可以在旧电视机上收看数字电视的转换器

meanings.meaning_en: the way in which something such as a town, garden, or building is arranged

meanings.example_cn: 大楼里所有的公寓布局都是一样的。

meanings.meaning_en: a sharp curved nail on an animal, bird, or some insects

meanings.example_cn: 猫的爪子抓进了我的腿中。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone who is attacking you go away, by fighting them

meanings.example_cn: 军队已准备好击退进攻。

meanings.meaning_en: fair or reasonable

meanings.meaning_en: used to show that one number or amount is added to another

meanings.meaning_en: a sea creature with eight tentacles (= arms )

meanings.meaning_en: related to or limited by time

meanings.example: The danger lies in its unpredictability. Yet that may also be a reason for hope.

meanings.meaning_en: very enjoyable, exciting, or romantic, in a strange or special way

meanings.meaning_en: the part of a store that faces the street

meanings.example_cn: 一个小的店面通向由迪尼斯经营的英语语言学校。

meanings.meaning_en: made to be used for a short time only when nothing better is available

meanings.meaning_en: a very bad situation that someone is in

meanings.meaning_en: a desert plant with sharp points instead of leaves

meanings.meaning_en: very serious and not happy, for example because something bad has happened or because you are at an important occasion

meanings.meaning_en: to cut and collect a crop of grain

meanings.meaning_en: to do something without any preparation, because you are forced to do this by unexpected events

meanings.meaning_en: an arrangement for a meeting at an agreed time and place, for a particular purpose

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to advise people about laws, write formal agreements, or represent people in court

meanings.example: But his obeying the ordinary driving commands of the Alaskan trail is no demonstration that he is yours. Any dog in Alaska would obey you as he obeyed.
meanings.example_cn: 他遵守阿拉斯加的驱赶命令并不意味着他就是你的狗，任何阿拉斯加的狗都会像他一样对你俯首贴耳。

meanings.meaning_en: to limit something

meanings.meaning_en: the development and use of minerals, forests, oil etc for business or industry
a set of beliefs that form an important part of a religion or system of ideas

meanings.meaning_cn: 无法计量地, 无限地

meanings.meaning_en: determination to be successful, rich, powerful etc

meanings.meaning_en: the life that some people believe people have after death

meanings.example: And on each of those issues we have said that we would consider that and, in fact, have provided some humanitarian support.

meanings.example_cn: 朱先生是一个来自离香港不远的佛山的鞋匠，这是他第二次来非洲。

meanings.meaning_en: A prairie is a large area of flat, grassy land in North America. Prairies have very few trees.

meanings.example_cn: 他将林地和草原改造成为农田，使江河变成湖泊和水库，用于灌溉或用于水力发电。

meanings.meaning_en: an activity such as sewing or making baskets, in which you use your hands in a skilful way to make things

meanings.example_cn: 一家出售手工艺品的商店

meanings.meaning_en: relating to cows

meanings.meaning_en: serious and quiet because you are thinking a lot

meanings.meaning_en: to start burning, or to make something start burning

meanings.example_cn: 油箱突然着火了。

meanings.meaning_en: a long thin pointed piece of ice hanging from a roof or other surface
meanings.example: Missis walked in', she said, `as chill as an icicle, and as high as a princess.
meanings.example_cn: “夫人走进来了，”她说，“跟个冰柱似的，冷冰冰的，又像个公主似的高不可攀。

meanings.meaning_cn: 过分讲究的, 挑剔的

meanings.meaning_en: an animal like a rabbit but larger, which can run very quickly

meanings.meaning_en: any tobacco plant having broad leaves, used esp in making cigars

meanings.meaning_en: slightly blue

meanings.example_cn: 麻醉药和奶瓶喂养在战后早些年代非常流行。

meanings.example_cn: 大量的白猫头鹰，白鹅，黑雁，北极狐，海象以及其它动物在这里生存。

meanings.example_cn: 他每当心烦意乱时，就会去向她寻求安慰和建议。

meanings.example_cn: 国民议会中的34个选举席位

meanings.example_cn: 你不必替我担心。我是一个游泳健将。

meanings.example_cn: 她年轻而且身体健康。

meanings.example_cn: 两国间的贸易摩擦是由贸易保护主义者引起的。

meanings.example_cn: 他把他的自行车斜靠在树干上。

meanings.meaning_en: one of ten equal parts of something
not able to be obtained

meanings.example_cn: 女权主义者们已重新定义了女性角色。

meanings.example_cn: 中士叫斯威夫特守着入口。

meanings.meaning_en: to protect a person, place, or object by staying near them and watching them
meanings.example: a lioness guarding her cubs
meanings.example_cn: 守护着幼狮的母狮

meanings.example: It will be clearer if you delete the last paragraph.
meanings.example_cn: 如果你删去最后那一段，它将会更清楚。

meanings.meaning_en: an arrangement of numbers, letters, or signs in rows and  column s  that you consider to be one amount, and that you use in solving mathematical problems
meanings.example: a matrix table
meanings.example_cn: 矩阵表

meanings.meaning_en: a statement in which someone complains about something
meanings.example: If you wish to make a complaint, you should see the manager.
meanings.example_cn: 如果你要投诉，应该去找经理。

meanings.meaning_en: the time when you complete a university degree course or your education at an American  high school
meanings.example: After graduation Neil returned to Ohio.
meanings.example_cn: 尼尔毕业以后回到了俄亥俄州。

meanings.meaning_en: if a group of people huddle together, they stay very close to each other, especially because they are cold or frightened
meanings.example: We lay huddled together for warmth.
meanings.example_cn: 我们紧紧挤在一起取暖。

meanings.meaning_en: if a plant or a flower blooms, its flowers appear or open
meanings.example: The roses bloom every few days.
meanings.example_cn: 玫瑰每隔几天开花。

meanings.meaning_en: a group of similar plants or animals that is smaller than a  species
meanings.example: Several other subspecies of gull are found in the region.
meanings.example_cn: 几个海鸥的其他亚种在此地区被找到。

meanings.meaning_en: a small piece of paper, cloth etc
meanings.example: a rug made out of old scraps of material
meanings.example_cn: 用旧零碎材料拼做的一块小地毯

meanings.meaning_en: to decide not to use a plan or system because it is not practical
an occasion or party when you celebrate something
meanings.example: the lively New Year celebrations in the city centre
meanings.example_cn: 市中心热闹的新年庆祝活动

meanings.meaning_en: a light cloud low over the ground that makes it difficult for you to see very far
meanings.example: We could just see the outline of the house through the mist.
meanings.example_cn: 薄雾中我们只能看到房子的轮廓。

meanings.meaning_en: great happiness and pleasure
meanings.example: the look of joy on her face
meanings.example_cn: 她脸上的喜悦表情

meanings.meaning_en: to move, drive, or push something forward
meanings.example: a boat propelled by a small motor
meanings.example_cn: 由小马达驱动的小船

meanings.meaning_en: small sticks of a white or coloured substance like soft rock, used for writing or drawing
meanings.example: a box of coloured chalks
meanings.example_cn: 一盒彩色粉笔

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to weave cloth
without any limit
meanings.example: The system can support an unlimited number of users.
meanings.example_cn: 该系统可以支持无限多的用户。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who has to defend their own case in a law court, especially in a  divorce  case
meanings.example: Upon receipt of a copy of the arbitration application, the respondent shall, within the time limit prescribed by the Arbitration Rules, submit its defence to the arbitration commission.
meanings.example_cn: 被申请人收到仲裁申请书副本后，应当在仲裁规则规定的期限内向仲裁委员会提交答辩书。

meanings.meaning_en: the way someone or something is described or shown in a book, film, play etc
meanings.example: ...a moving portrayal of St. John the Evangelist by Simone Martini.
meanings.example_cn: …西蒙纳·马蒂尼创作的福音传道者圣约翰的感人画像。

meanings.meaning_en: to state officially and publicly that a particular situation exists or that something is true
meanings.example: A state of emergency has been declared.
meanings.example_cn: 已宣布进入紧急状态。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of hanging cloth that can be pulled across to cover a window, divide a room etc
meanings.example: red velvet curtains
meanings.example_cn: 红色的丝绒窗帘

meanings.meaning_en: a shape with six sides
meanings.example: He presses the bolt against a small hexagon tattooed on his forearm. The sizes match.
meanings.example_cn: 他将螺钉与他前臂的一个小六边形纹身比了比，尺寸是一样的。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to poetry, or typical of poetry
meanings.example: poetic expression
meanings.example_cn: 诗歌的表达方式

meanings.meaning_en: not interrupted or moved
meanings.example: At last I was able to work undisturbed.
meanings.example_cn: 我终于可以安安静静地工作了。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of climbing something or moving upwards
meanings.example: the first ascent of Qomolangma
meanings.example_cn: 首次攀登珠穆朗玛峰

meanings.example: The photograph was taken by William Henry Fox Talbot, the inventor of the negative / positive photographic process.
meanings.example_cn: 这张照片是由威廉·亨利·福克斯·塔尔博特摄制，他是负片/正片摄影过程的发明者。

meanings.meaning_en: a question that you ask to get information, or to check that something is true or correct
meanings.example: Staff are always available to answer your queries.
meanings.example_cn: 员工随时为您解答疑问。

meanings.meaning_en: to produce a strong feeling or memory in someone
meanings.example: The photographs evoked strong memories of our holidays in France.
meanings.example_cn: 那些照片勾起了我们到法国度假的深刻回忆。

meanings.meaning_en: if you amass money, knowledge, information etc, you gradually collect a large amount of it
meanings.example: For 25 years, Darwin amassed evidence to support his theories.
meanings.example_cn: 25年间，达尔文收集了大量证据来支持自己的理论。

meanings.meaning_en: the process of finding out what people think about something by asking many people the same question, or the record of the result
meanings.example: A recent poll found that 80% of Californians support the governor.
meanings.example_cn: 最近的一项民意调查发现80%的加利福尼亚人支持州长。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the connection between two things, where one causes the other to happen or exist
meanings.example: Rawlins stresses that it is impossible to prove a causal link between the drug and the deaths.
meanings.example_cn: 罗林斯强调说证实毒品与死亡之间的因果关系是不可能的。

meanings.meaning_en: to move smoothly and quietly, as if without effort
meanings.example: Waiters glide between tightly packed tables bearing trays of pasta.
meanings.example_cn: 侍者们托着一盘盘的意大利面食在拥挤的餐桌间自如穿行。

meanings.example: Some scholars believe that this astrolabe was created by the prince in collaboration with an unnamed metalworker.
meanings.example_cn: 一些学者认为，这个星盘是奥马尔王子与一位无名金属制造工匠共同制作的。

meanings.meaning_en: with many smooth twists and turns
meanings.example: They followed the sinuous trail deep into the mountains.
meanings.example_cn: 他们沿着弯弯曲曲的小径进入深山。

meanings.meaning_en: made of flowers or decorated with flowers or pictures of flowers
meanings.example: a scarf with a bold floral pattern
meanings.example_cn: 印有鲜艳花卉图案的围巾

meanings.meaning_en: to completely understand a fact or an idea, especially a complicated one
meanings.example: At that time, we did not fully grasp the significance of what had happened.
meanings.example_cn: 当时，我们没有完全明白所发生之事的重要性。

meanings.meaning_en: strange, unexpected, or unsuitable in a particular situation
meanings.example: The new theatre looks utterly incongruous in its setting.
meanings.example_cn: 这座新剧院和周围的环境格格不入。

meanings.meaning_en: to not notice something, or not see how important it is
meanings.example: It is easy to overlook a small detail like that.
meanings.example_cn: 那样的小细节很容易被忽略。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who enjoys adventure
meanings.example: an adventurer travelling the world
meanings.example_cn: 周游世界的冒险家

meanings.meaning_en: to put your name or  initial s  on something, or to decorate it in your own way, to show that it belongs to you
meanings.example: Why not do something to personalize your office?
meanings.example_cn: 为什么不做点什么使你的办公室有些个性呢？

meanings.meaning_en: someone who lives in a house, room etc and pays rent to the person who owns it
meanings.example: The desk was left by the previous tenant.
meanings.example_cn: 书桌是上一个房客留下来的。

meanings.meaning_en: plants that are herbaceous have soft stems rather than hard stems made of wood
meanings.example: To their surprise, Ms Sagot and Dr Stevens found that all four of the most sociable species are among those forced to use herbaceous plants, and thus to build ramshackle homes.
meanings.example_cn: 令他们吃惊的是，萨戈女士和史蒂文斯博士发现，所有最善群居的四个种群是那些迫使运用草本植物并因此建造摇摇欲坠的巢穴的蝙蝠。

meanings.meaning_en: the watery substance that carries food through a plant
meanings.example: The leaves, bark and sap are also common ingredients of local herbal remedies.
meanings.example_cn: 树叶、树皮和树液也是当地草药疗法的常用药材。

meanings.meaning_en: used before a plural noun to refer to the different things that belong to each separate person or thing mentioned
meanings.example: We all went back to our respective homes to wait for news.
meanings.example_cn: 我们都各自回家等待消息。

meanings.meaning_en: existing at the beginning of time or the beginning of the Earth
meanings.example: the primordial seas
meanings.example_cn: 原始海洋

meanings.meaning_en: to be in charge of a group of workers and check that a piece of work is done satisfactorily
meanings.example: A team leader was appointed to oversee the project.
meanings.example_cn: 任命了一位组长来监管该工程。

meanings.meaning_en: a god or  goddess
meanings.example: the deities of ancient Greece
meanings.example_cn: 古希腊诸神

meanings.meaning_en: Phosphorus is a poisonous yellowish-white chemical element. It glows slightly, and burns when air touches it.
meanings.example: Because scientists have found a bacterium that can do without phosphorus—live on arsenic instead.
meanings.example_cn: 因为科学家已经发现了一种细菌，可以无需磷生活而以砷代替。

meanings.meaning_en: not deserved
meanings.example: The abolition of incomes unearned by work.
meanings.example_cn: 第十一条，取缔不劳而获的收入。

meanings.meaning_en: a passage in the ground made by an animal such as a rabbit or  fox  as a place to live
meanings.example: Normally timid, they rarely stray far from their burrows.
meanings.example_cn: 它们通常很胆小，极少远离自己的洞穴。

meanings.meaning_en: If an animal burrows into the ground or into a surface, it moves through it by making a tunnel or hole
meanings.example: The larvae burrow into cracks in the floor.
meanings.example_cn: 幼虫钻进地板的裂缝中。

meanings.meaning_en: not happening often
meanings.example: They would make infrequent visits to the house.
meanings.example_cn: 他们偶尔去看一看那所房子。

meanings.example: Blessed are those who have learned to acclaim you, who walk in the light of your presence, O Lord .
meanings.example_cn: 知道向你欢呼的，那民是有福的。 耶和华阿，他们在你脸上的光里行走。

meanings.meaning_en: a short piece of wood, metal, or plastic that is attached to a wall or fits into a hole, used especially to hang things on or to fasten things together
meanings.example: Sarah hung her coat on the peg.
meanings.example_cn: 萨拉把外套挂在衣钩上。

meanings.meaning_en: to set prices, wages etc at a particular level, or set them in relation to something else
meanings.example: a table fitted together with pegs
meanings.example_cn: 一张用钉子钉起来的桌子

meanings.meaning_en: when you translate something, or something that has been translated
meanings.example: She read the letter and gave us a rough translation (= she did not translate everything exactly ) .
meanings.example_cn: 她看了信，给我们大概翻译了一下。

meanings.meaning_en: thick thread made of cotton or wool, which is used to knit things
meanings.example: She still spins the yarn and knits sweaters for her family.
meanings.example_cn: 她仍在为她的家人纺线织毛衣。

meanings.meaning_en: the yellowish liquid part of blood that contains the blood cells
meanings.example: Blood cells like red blood cells float in the plasma.
meanings.example_cn: 血细胞就是像在血浆里漂浮的红色血细胞.

meanings.example: He was nursed in London.
meanings.example_cn: 他是在伦敦长大的。

meanings.meaning_en: when something is completely new and different from anything that anyone has thought of before
meanings.example: Her earlier work shows a lot of originality.
meanings.example_cn: 她的早期作品显示出丰富的独创性。

meanings.meaning_en: a place where a river is not deep, so that you can walk or drive across it
a hole cut in a piece of wood or stone so that the shaped end of another piece will fit there firmly
meanings.example: And there are any metallic connectives on this bed, joggle is between bed leg and bedplate, craftsman certains ably good mortise, this bed combination is together.
meanings.example_cn: 并且这个床上没有任何金属连接物，床腿和床板之间都是榫接的，工匠巧妙地凿好榫眼，将这个床组合在一起。

meanings.meaning_en: to walk slowly across or around an area, usually without a clear direction or purpose
meanings.example: She wandered aimlessly about the house.
meanings.example_cn: 她漫无目的地在房子里走来走去。

meanings.meaning_en: the sexual partner of an animal
meanings.example: He has found his ideal mate.
meanings.example_cn: 他已经找到了理想的配偶。

meanings.meaning_cn: 微生物的,  由细菌引起的
meanings.meaning_en: Microbial means relating to or caused by microbes
meanings.example: ...the question of whether microbial life exists, or once existed, on Mars.
meanings.example_cn: ...这个火星上是否存在或曾经存在过微生物的问题。

meanings.meaning_en: to become involved in an argument, fight, or other difficult situation in order to change what happens
meanings.example: The army will have to intervene to prevent further fighting.
meanings.example_cn: 军队将不得不干预以阻止进一步的战斗。

meanings.meaning_en: fences, gates etc made of iron bent into attractive shapes
meanings.example: ...the ironwork on the doors.
meanings.example_cn: ...这些门上的铁艺部分。

meanings.meaning_en: to find something after searching for it, especially something that has been buried in the ground or lost for a long time
meanings.example: Farmers still sometimes unearth human bones here.
meanings.example_cn: 农民们有时仍然能在这里挖到人骨。

meanings.example: I remember when Jurassic Park came out, a microbiologist friend constantly told me how outlandish it was, but within a few years, he said it was interesting how far things have come.
meanings.example_cn: 我记得当《侏罗纪公园》出现的时候，一个微生物学家朋友不断的告诉我这影片太奇异了，但是在几年之内，他说影片中的科技到底还有多久才能实现很令人感兴趣。

meanings.meaning_en: a wooden hammer with a large end
meanings.example: I even have a wooden mallet that was used by a judge over 300 years ago during condemnation proceedings in Salem.
meanings.example_cn: 我甚至还有一把300多年前的木槌。

meanings.meaning_en: drinks such as beer or wine that contain a substance which can make you drunk
meanings.example: I don’t drink alcohol anymore.
meanings.example_cn: 我不再喝酒了。

meanings.meaning_en: cellulose nitrate containing a relatively large amount of nitrogen: used as an explosive
when a plan, decision, or person is officially accepted
meanings.example: The president has already given his approval to the plan.
meanings.example_cn: 总统已经批准了这个计划。

meanings.meaning_en: happening without being planned or intended
meanings.example: an accidental discharge of toxic waste
meanings.example_cn: 有毒废料的意外排放

meanings.meaning_en: very bad, or ending in failure
meanings.example: a disastrous first marriage
meanings.example_cn: 以失败告终的第一次婚姻

meanings.meaning_en: to do something that has been carefully planned
meanings.example: The job involves drawing up and executing a plan of nursing care.
meanings.example_cn: 这项工作包括拟订和实施一个护理计划。

meanings.example: All these recipes exemplify my cooking: healthy, delicious and quick.
meanings.example_cn: 所有这些食谱例证了我的饭菜：健康、美味、快捷。

meanings.meaning_en: one of six equal parts of something
meanings.example: About one sixth of the children admitted to taking drugs.
meanings.example_cn: 大约六分之一的儿童承认吸毒。

meanings.meaning_en: the physical activity that two people do together in order to produce babies, or for pleasure
meanings.example: All you see on TV is sex and violence these days.
meanings.example_cn: 如今在电视上看到的尽是性和暴力。

meanings.meaning_en: a type of play for children that is performed in Britain around Christmas, in which traditional stories are performed with jokes, music, and songs
meanings.example: They were made welcome with the usual pantomime of exaggerated smiles and gestures.
meanings.example_cn: 他们以那种具有夸张的微笑和动作的一般闹剧受到欢迎。

meanings.meaning_en: a scale of related things on which each one is only slightly different from the one before
meanings.example: The Creole language is really various dialects arranged on a continuum.
meanings.example_cn: 克里奥 耳语其实是多种方言的一个统一体。

meanings.meaning_en: if something is transparent, you can see through it
meanings.example: a transparent plastic container
meanings.example_cn: 透明的塑料容器

meanings.meaning_en: noticing or realizing something
meanings.example: The driver was still conscious when the ambulance arrived.
meanings.example_cn: 救护车赶到时，司机仍然神志清醒。

meanings.meaning_en: having the shape of a sphere
meanings.example: ...purple and gold spherical earrings.
meanings.example_cn: ...紫色和金色的球形耳环。

meanings.meaning_en: the sale of goods in shops to customers, for their own use and not for selling to anyone else
meanings.example: a retail price of £8.99
meanings.example_cn: 8.99英镑的零售价

meanings.meaning_cn: 微波(波长为1毫米至30厘米的高频电磁波)
meanings.meaning_en: a type of  oven  that cooks food very quickly using very short electric waves instead of heat
meanings.example: I’ll heat it up in the microwave.
meanings.example_cn: 我来把它用微波炉热一热。

meanings.example: I heard the news indirectly.
meanings.example_cn: 这消息我是间接听来的。

meanings.meaning_en: to make an animal able to work for people or live with them as a pet
meanings.example: We domesticated the dog to help us with hunting.
meanings.example_cn: 我们驯养狗来帮助我们打猎。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to philosophy
meanings.example: the philosophical problem of whether there is free will
meanings.example_cn: 关于是否有自由意志的哲学问题

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone believe something that is not true
meanings.example: He had been deceived by a young man claiming to be the son of a millionaire.
meanings.example_cn: 他被一个自称是百万富翁之子的年轻人骗了。

meanings.meaning_en: the scientific study of people, their societies,  culture s  etc
meanings.example: "In anthropology, you can't equate third gender with homosexuality," he said.
meanings.example_cn: “在人类学中，你不能将同性恋和第三性别混同，”他说。

meanings.meaning_cn: 功能主义, 机能心理学
meanings.meaning_en: the idea that the most important thing about a building, piece of furniture etc is that it is useful
meanings.example: While criticizing neo-realism and neo-functionalism, researchers adhering to the epistemic community approach (ECA) emphasize the importance of original ideas in the policy-shaping process.
meanings.example_cn: 晚近针对「新现实主义」与「新功能主义」之批判所发展出的「知识社群」研究取向，强调原创理念在政策塑过程中所扮演之重要角色。

meanings.meaning_en: a natural ability to do something well
meanings.example: He has a lot of talent , and his work is fresh and interesting.
meanings.example_cn: 他很有天赋，作品新颖有趣。

meanings.meaning_en: something that continues or follows something else that has happened before, without a stop or change
meanings.example: It's the coalition forces who are to blame for the continuation of the war.
meanings.example_cn: 是联军应对战争的持续负责。

meanings.meaning_en: if you detach something, or if it detaches, it becomes separated from the thing it was attached to
meanings.example: Please detach and fill out the application form.
meanings.example_cn: 请撕下申请表并填好。

meanings.meaning_en: of or concerned with the mechanical properties of fluids
meanings.example: A second type of thermal escape is far more dramatic. This form of thermal escape is called hydrodynamic escape or, more evocatively, the planetary wind.
meanings.example_cn: 热逸过程的第二种情形更为奇特，可称为流体力学逃逸（hydrodynamic escape），用通俗一些的话说，叫做“行星风”（以便和“太阳风”呼应）。

meanings.meaning_en: the land along the edge of a large area of water such as an ocean or lake
meanings.example: the bay’s 13,000 km of shoreline
meanings.example_cn: 这个海湾 1.3 万公里的海岸线

meanings.meaning_en: a plant similar to grass that grows in wet ground and on the edge of rivers and lakes
meanings.example: Victims have ranged from the great auk and the lynx to the humble blue stag beetle and Davall's sedge.
meanings.example_cn: 受害者从大型海雀、猞猁到不值一提的蓝色鹿角虫和Davall's莎草。

meanings.meaning_en: too much or too little in relation to something else
meanings.example: the disproportionate amount of money being spent on defence
meanings.example_cn: 比例失衡的国防开支

meanings.meaning_en: a vehicle or ship specially built to carry large quantities of gas or liquid, especially oil
meanings.example: A Greek oil tanker has run aground.
meanings.example_cn: 一艘希腊油轮已经搁浅了。

meanings.meaning_en: Someone's lament is an expression of their sadness, regret, or disappointment about something
meanings.example: She spoke of the professional woman's lament that a woman's judgment is questioned more than a man's.
meanings.example_cn: 她谈到职业女性的悲哀，即女性的判断会比男性的遭到更多的置疑。

meanings.meaning_cn: 有系统地, 有条理地
meanings.example: Rumours of possible human cases in other parts of the country have been systematically followed up.
meanings.example_cn: 已系统地对关于该国其它地区可能的人间病例的传闻进行跟踪。

meanings.meaning_en: the desire to know about something
meanings.example: I opened the packet just to satisfy my curiosity .
meanings.example_cn: 我打开包裹只是为了满足我的好奇心。

meanings.meaning_en: You use ancestral to refer to a person's family in former times, especially when the family is important and has property or land that they have had for a long time
meanings.example: ...the family's ancestral home in southern Germany.
meanings.example_cn: …这一家在德国南部的祖宅。

meanings.meaning_en: to start doing something again after stopping or being interrupted
meanings.example: She hopes to resume work after the baby is born.
meanings.example_cn: 她想生完孩子后继续工作。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is eligible for something is able or allowed to do it, for example because they are the right age
meanings.example: Stephen was regarded as an eligible bachelor.
meanings.example_cn: 斯蒂芬被认为是一个钻石王老五。

meanings.meaning_en: completely and in every way
meanings.example: He made his reasons for resigning absolutely clear.
meanings.example_cn: 他把辞职的理由讲得一清二楚。

meanings.meaning_en: a member of the Senate or a senate
meanings.example: Senator Kennedy
meanings.example_cn: 肯尼迪参议员

meanings.meaning_en: a farm animal with short legs, a fat body and a curved tail. Pigs are kept for their meat, which includes  pork  ,  bacon  and  ham  .
meanings.example: He kept pigs and poultry.
meanings.example_cn: 他养过猪和家禽。

meanings.meaning_cn: 令人惊奇的事物(或人物)
meanings.meaning_en: You can describe something or someone as a marvel to indicate that you think that they are wonderful
meanings.example: The whale, like the dolphin, has become a symbol of the marvels of creation.
meanings.example_cn: 鲸，和海豚一样，已经成为造物杰作的象征。

meanings.meaning_en: frightened because you think that you may get hurt or that something bad may happen
meanings.example: There’s no need to be afraid.
meanings.example_cn: 没有必要害怕。

meanings.meaning_en: the wide part of a river where it goes into the sea

meanings.example_cn: 泰晤士河河口

meanings.meaning_en: relating to or caused by  earthquakes
meanings.example: increased seismic activity
meanings.example_cn: 越来越频繁的地震活动

meanings.meaning_en: the distance from the centre to the edge of a circle, or a line drawn from the centre to the edge
meanings.example: The shock of the explosion was felt over a radius of forty miles.
meanings.example_cn: 爆炸引起的剧烈震动在方圆40英里内都能感觉得到。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of moving an army, weapons etc away from the area where they were fighting

meanings.example_cn: 大规模撤军

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of wood or coal that stays red and very hot after a fire has stopped burning

meanings.example_cn: 发光的余烬

meanings.meaning_en: to start something, usually something big or important

meanings.example_cn: 为了筹集15万美元，该组织发起了一场募捐活动。

meanings.meaning_en: a type of grain that is grown in tropical areas

meanings.example_cn: 但是一些植物，包括玉米和高粱，进化成了使用C4型的光合作用。

meanings.example: Yet some of the most radical ideas about our primal urges have been harnessed by those who want everyone to drink the same brand of beer.
meanings.example_cn: 然而，那些恨不得人人都喝同一品牌啤酒的守旧派们，则给人类原始冲动中的某些最本质的欲望，套上了枷锁。

meanings.meaning_en: a regulatory authority has the official power to control an activity and to make sure that it is done in a satisfactory way
meanings.example: Partially, that has to do with our regulatory framework, which is built on the idea that medicine is all about disease.
meanings.example_cn: 部分原因跟我们的监管架构有关。 这个架构建立在药物全是用来治病的理念之下。

meanings.example: The variations in isotopic ratios take place on the right time scale, and they mirror those seen in modern corals, he notes.
meanings.example_cn: 他说，同位素比例变化所发生的时间范围恰到好处，这与在现代珊瑚中的发现保持了一致。

meanings.meaning_en: the sailor in charge of a ship, or the pilot in charge of an aircraft
meanings.example: The captain and crew welcome you aboard.
meanings.example_cn: 机长和全体机组人员欢迎各位乘坐本次航班。

meanings.meaning_en: the process of making a road, building etc bigger or longer, or the part that is added
meanings.example: We are thinking of having an extension built, as we now require an extra bedroom.
meanings.example_cn: 我们正在考虑扩建房屋，因为我们现在需要多一间卧室。

meanings.meaning_cn: 最后的, 最终的n终极(限)
meanings.meaning_en: someone’s ultimate aim is their main and most important aim, that they hope to achieve in the future
meanings.example: The ultimate outcome of the experiment cannot be predicted.
meanings.example_cn: 试验的最后结果无法预测。

meanings.meaning_en: to not include someone or something, either deliberately or because you forget to do it

meanings.example_cn: 请不要忽略任何细节，不管它多细小。

meanings.meaning_en: if something is applicable to a particular person, group, or situation, it affects them or is related to them

meanings.example_cn: 对一个家庭合理的标准对于另一个家庭并不适用。

meanings.meaning_en: a storm with strong winds and a lot of snow

meanings.example_cn: 暴风雪增加了我们的困难。

meanings.meaning_en: movement or the ability to move

meanings.meaning_en: (of a room, house, etc) suitable for living in

meanings.example_cn: 他说，“这个目标应该是使村庄适宜居住。

meanings.meaning_en: a woman or child who is pretty has a nice attractive face

meanings.meaning_en: a coin of the US and Canada, worth one tenth of a dollar

meanings.meaning_en: to make a formal statement of what is true, especially in a court of law

meanings.meaning_en: far from the centre of a city, town etc or from a main building

meanings.meaning_en: the standard unit of money in the US, Canada, Australia, and some other countries, divided into 100  cent s  : symbol $

meanings.meaning_en: a cover for the open part of a pot, box, or other container

meanings.meaning_cn: 行为性的,  行为学的

meanings.example_cn: 在Agile2006上，她从动物行为学的角度分析了Bonobo大猩猩的合作行为，并说明了敏捷的合作性是多么“自然”。

meanings.example: He could draw men round him and keep them bound to him; while his powerful attraction was there, disruption was out of the question.
meanings.example_cn: 他能够把人们吸引到他的周围而且保持他们的忠心；而他的强大吸引力所在之处，就不可能有分裂。

meanings.meaning_cn: 生存, 生活, 留存
meanings.meaning_en: the condition of only just having enough money or food to stay alive

meanings.meaning_en: in spite of something

meanings.example_cn: 世界上的宗教尽管各不相同，但都有明显的相似之处。

meanings.meaning_en: the season between summer and winter, when leaves change colour and the weather becomes cooler

meanings.example: The wire is held on with a metal clip.
meanings.example_cn: 电线用金属夹子固定。

meanings.meaning_en: an influence that makes something happen or makes it happen more quickly

meanings.example_cn: 该州的苹果种植者们正在与外来竞争进行艰难的抗争。

meanings.example_cn: 要花好几十年的时间来逐步达到所需要的教育和发展水平。

meanings.meaning_en: providing a lot of useful information

meanings.meaning_en: ordinary and not interesting or exciting

meanings.example_cn: 刚开始，这工作非常乏味。

meanings.example_cn: 如果我是雨滴的话...

meanings.meaning_en: to choose someone for a position or a job

meanings.meaning_en: a continuing increase in prices, or the rate at which prices increase

meanings.example_cn: 你知道怎么把一个简单的向日葵花籽变成一片片美味的肉吗？

meanings.example_cn: 汉纳抬起头，看到戴维和另一个男人站在门口。

meanings.example_cn: 一些炸弹爆炸了，至少5人严重受伤。

meanings.example_cn: 他指责工会领导人煽动骚乱。

meanings.example_cn: 本主题处理森林及森林外树木帮助调节土壤、水文以及水生系统的作用。

meanings.example_cn: 这是近年来第一次有西方人在中国被判犯有与毒品有关的罪行。

a strong feeling of uncontrollable anger

meanings.example_cn: 卡罗尔气得呜呜哭，被送往医院。

meanings.meaning_en: when someone is killed, especially as a legal punishment

meanings.meaning_en: physically or emotionally strong and able to deal with difficult situations

meanings.meaning_en: a printed picture produced by lithography
a tree with dark green leaves and red berries, or the wood of this tree
the business of selling goods in large quantities at low prices to other businesses, rather than to the general public

meanings.example_cn: 当我们从海外购买物资，这在零售和批发制造了一些工作机会。

involving religious,  spiritual  , or magical powers that people cannot understand

meanings.example_cn: 音乐的精神力量以及神秘能力

meanings.meaning_en: to force someone to do something they do not want to do by threatening them

meanings.example_cn: DOM 真正的魔法在于它在方法调用过程中积极而灵活地把各种对象类型强制转换成正确的类型，包括在递归过程中。

meanings.meaning_en: to have an accident in a car, plane etc by violently hitting something else

meanings.example_cn: 这架喷气式飞机起飞后就坠毁了。

meanings.meaning_en: strange or unusual behaviour

meanings.example_cn: 凯特的母亲是个出了名的怪人。

meanings.meaning_en: unpleasant or morally offensive

meanings.example_cn: 接下来是约翰的叙述，其中有些部分也许令人不快，甚至令人震惊。

meanings.example_cn: 后来， 这种灯笼成了沈家的绝活。

meanings.meaning_en: a simple drawing or plan that shows exactly where something is, what something looks like, or how something works

meanings.example_cn: …电路图。

meanings.meaning_en: to form a word by writing or naming the letters in order

meanings.example_cn: juice 怎么拼？

meanings.meaning_en: very plain in appearance, with little or no colour or decoration

meanings.example_cn: 在寒冷的曙光中，城堡看上去了无生气，令人生畏。

meanings.meaning_en: completely crazy

meanings.example_cn: 新墨西哥州的荒凉之美

meanings.meaning_en: to respect and admire someone or something very much

meanings.example_cn: 中国人将谷物奉为天赐礼物。

meanings.meaning_en: to press something so hard that it breaks or is damaged

meanings.example_cn: 他的腿在事故中被压断。

meanings.meaning_en: the cooked meat of this bird

meanings.example_cn: …烤鹅。

meanings.example_cn: 试验项目的结果还没有制成表格。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone happy or satisfied

meanings.example_cn: 希望让顾客满意的一家公司

meanings.meaning_en: a tree with smooth  bark (=  outer covering  )  and thin branches, or the wood from this tree

meanings.example_cn: 在芬兰，纯化论者坚持说只能加白桦树皮。

meanings.example: You can achieve greater flexibility, adaptability, and independence when each layer is only loosely coupled to the layer above and below.
meanings.example_cn: 当每个层仅松散耦合到其上和其下的层时，您可以实现更强的灵活性、适应性和独立性。

meanings.meaning_en: a native or inhabitant of Scotland
to make a great effort to achieve something

meanings.example_cn: 他努力使自己保持非常的健康。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the quality or standard of something rather than the quantity

meanings.example_cn: 不同年龄的儿童和成人在思维方式上有着质的差异。

meanings.meaning_en: the basic unit for measuring weight in the  metric system

meanings.example_cn: 然后他们将一立方厘米的水的重量定为一克。

meanings.example_cn: 禁律

meanings.meaning_en: someone who looks for gold, minerals, oil etc

meanings.example_cn: 他作为采矿者遭遇失败，但作为记者大获成功。

meanings.example_cn: 被告证词中的明显矛盾

meanings.example_cn: 安德森将要在宪法厅的观众席演唱。

meanings.example_cn: 化学的一个分科就是要研究发现利用从农产品中提取的原料来创造新的产品，它被称为农业化学。

meanings.meaning_en: An imitator is someone who copies what someone else does, or copies the way they speak or behave

meanings.example_cn: 他不去碰运气；这就是为什么他得以幸存下来，而他的大部分仿效者却没有。

meanings.meaning_en: a building, especially a large one

meanings.example_cn: 他们的总部大楼是一幢宏伟建筑。

meanings.meaning_en: to guess that something is true, using the information you know already

meanings.example_cn: 几乎没有什么可继续进行的，我们只能猜测发生过的事。

meanings.meaning_en: If you feel disdain for someone or something, you dislike them because you think that they are inferior or unimportant

meanings.example_cn: 珍妮特轻蔑地看着他。

meanings.meaning_en: containing poison or producing poison

meanings.meaning_en: a person who continues something, esp the work of someone else

meanings.meaning_en: a metal frame with bars across it

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone more likely to suffer from a particular health problem

meanings.example: Like his father, he hopes to become a naval aviator.

meanings.meaning_en: completely unreasonable or silly

meanings.meaning_en: the quality that something has when it has been done in a clever or skilful way, with careful attention to small details

meanings.meaning_en: a type of bus that runs on electricity along metal tracks in the road

meanings.example_cn: 她穿着制服上衣和裙子，我明白她原来是有轨电车检票员。

meanings.example: The aptly named Skyline Restaurant provides spectacular views of the city below.

meanings.meaning_en: under your feet where you are walking

a person or company that makes money by buying land and then building houses, factories etc on it

meanings.meaning_en: someone who owns land, especially a large amount of it

meanings.meaning_en: Celsius is a scale for measuring temperature, in which water freezes at 0 degrees and boils at 100 degrees. It is represented by the symbol °C.

meanings.example: Such bioactive mushroom metabolites are believed to have the capability to helping revitalization of our immune system against a large number of pathogenic and non-pathogenic diseases.

meanings.meaning_en: an American leguminous tree, Cercis canadensis, that has heart-shaped leaves and small budlike pink flowers

meanings.meaning_cn: 农场所有权人, 自耕农

to move suddenly from side to side or up and down, usually with a lot of force, or to make something or someone do this

a ball that is on the rebound has just hit something and is moving back through the air

meanings.example_cn: …一场名为“合众国”的演出。

meanings.example_cn: 1947年，肺结核无异于绝症，医生嘱咐他多呼吸新鲜空气和注意有规律的日常饮食。 但市面上出现了一种新的试验性药物——链霉素。

meanings.meaning_en: not changing or making progress, and continuing to be in a bad condition

meanings.example_cn: 政府振兴低迷经济的计划

meanings.example_cn: 可卡因是一种结晶状的莨菪生物碱，是从古柯叶中提取得来的。

meanings.meaning_en: the time of day when the sun disappears and night begins
